name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: My thoughts on Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
One day, I decided to walk around and ask everyone I worked with – waiters, bussers, cooks – what insurance they had.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220405-2923-header&t=1&akid=2923%2E2526796%2EMdudwD)
When I waitressed, I had to pay hundreds of dollars per month for the privilege of paying thousands in deductibles each year for insurance that didn’t really cover prescriptions.
**It was cheaper and the best option financially to just go uninsured and pray nothing happened.**
I remember vividly one day, I decided to walk around and ask everyone I worked with – waiters, bussers, cooks – what insurance they had. Everyone had the same answer: none. It made more sense for us to save up the money we’d otherwise pay on premiums and spend it on actual medicine and care.
That’s one reason why I support Medicare for All.
To this day, I work so my campaign staff is better insured than I am. But as an employer, I hate that their healthcare is tied to employment. When people get debilitating diagnoses, why does our system force us to stress about care ending with employment rather than getting better?
If we had a universal system, the huge sums employers pay for insurance could go into employees’ pockets in other forms (like raises). The answer can’t continue to be subsidizing the Affordable Care Act more and more as premiums go up and up.
The answer is single payer healthcare: Medicare for All.
**Having to choose between bankruptcy or your life is a choice that people shouldn't have to face.** It's possible to treat everybody more affordably with higher-quality care than they ever could get under our current privatized for-profit system.
Thanks for reading and together let’s transform our healthcare system for working families.
Alexandria
Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies including Medicare for All that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and address the climate crisis.
Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220405?refcode=em20220405-2923-P_FND_EGR_M4A&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2923_2526796_MdudwD&akid=2923%2E2526796%2EMdudwD)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220405?refcode=em20220405-2923-P_FND_EGR_M4A&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2923_2526796_MdudwD&akid=2923%2E2526796%2EMdudwD)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220405?refcode=em20220405-2923-P_FND_EGR_M4A&t=22&refcode2=2923_2526796_MdudwD&akid=2923%2E2526796%2EMdudwD)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220405-2923-P_FND_EGR_M4A&t=23&akid=2923%2E2526796%2EMdudwD)**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: This is Interesting
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=1)
---
## More RINOs Lose
### Tuesday, April 5th, 2022
Peter, First of all, I want to say thank you. Clearly you are having an impact in Minnesota politics. The Political Class is shaking its boots right now. Action 4 Liberty invested big on training and activating patriots around Minnesota to attend precinct caucuses on February 1st - nearly 5,000 of our supporters followed through. So thank you! **Last weekend, a couple more left-leaning, RINOs were beat for endorsements. Political newcomer, Bret Bussman,[defeated Sen Paul Utke](https://www.action4liberty.com/bussman_beats_utke_another_rino_goes_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=2) for the GOP endorsement in Senate District 5. Good job Bret!** [****](https://www.action4liberty.com/bussman_beats_utke_another_rino_goes_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=3) Also, conservative voting Rep Steve Drazkowski (Lifetime Rating: 95%) defeated RINO Rep Barb Haley (Lifetime Rating: 40%) for the Senate endorsement. Last weekend would've been all good news, however, the corrupt Morrison County GOP struck again. They, and six other county GOP units, held an endorsing convention on Friday night. RINO Rep Ron Kresha was being challenged by an Army veteran who must've been doing well, because ballots in that race never ended up being counted. Somehow, over the span of a couple hours, the convention was unable to count the ballots and announce vote totals for the senate and house endorsements. Hundreds of patriots gave up their Friday night to make an endorsement, but ended up wasting it because the convention organizers failed them. The Chair shut down the convention at 11 pm and word on the street is they will not hold a new convention. This is a travesty! There are good pro-freedom candidates in that district. The Political Class knows they got beat. So they're going to just avoid endorsements all together.
## [**Read more about the continued Saga of the Morrison County GOP Controversy.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_saga_of_morrison_county_gop?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=4)
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_interesting&n=5)

body:
Become a Senior Democratic Strategist today!
| [](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3686%2E9716520%2ENWWtkT)
---
Hi there -- When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 92 percent of Democrats in our database!**

As one of our **_most active supporters_** , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority.

[**That’s why I’m proud to offer you my personal invitation to become a Senior Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group. Click here to start >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3686%2E9716520%2ENWWtkT)

| | [START THE FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3686%2E9716520%2ENWWtkT)
---

This high-priority focus group is ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **fewer than 8% of our supporters made the cut, and you're one of them.**

Listening to our most active supporters was the most impactful decision we made in the last election. Your critical input helped us elect Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, flip the Senate, and kick Donald Trump out of office -- and now we need you again to help finalize Senate Democrats’ official strategy to expand our razor-thin majority.

**So please, accept your invitation right away and join our focus group exclusively for Senior Democratic Strategists:**
**[www.dscc.org/SeniorDemocraticStrategists/members/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3686%2E9716520%2ENWWtkT)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Biden's economic crisis is only getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
This is just the tip of the iceberg. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b858bf6e9c4a/bidens-economic-crisis-is-only-getting-worse?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

Are you tired of paying $6.00 for your gas and worrying about your grocery bill? What if I told you that's just the tip of the iceberg? Everyone can feel the pain at the pump. Grocery costs are skyrocketing. And at this rate, the average American will experience enough of an inflation hit to equal a month of working for free.

Instead of helping American families, Biden is driving this country off of a cliff. We are in the middle of an energy emergency caused solely by Biden’s policies of dwindling our energy production, like killing off pipelines and exploratory drilling. But instead of making policy changes to alleviate the crisis, he’s now tapping into our emergency Strategic Petroleum Reserve–something otherwise reserved for wartime crises. [_**CHIP IN NOW and help restore American energy security >>>**_](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=a7b6b4d309&e=00856e661d)

---
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=644e3d1e30&e=00856e661d "CHIP IN NOW")
---
| President Biden's administration has gone all in on the nebulous dangers of climate change, to the detriment of our economy, our foreign policy, and urgent environmental protections where we could actually make an impact–like targeting the alarming levels of microplastics, pesticides and chemicals in our food and water.

We know what the Democrats will do if they get the chance: launder money through "green" activism like the BBB bill tried to do, shut down our entire labor force with the "Green New Deal", and buy all our energy and products from foreign adversaries.

It’s already hitting American families hard. Millions of people will lose their jobs. Lines will form at the gas stations. Grocery store shelves will be empty and shortages will become a very significant reality. And we’re just at the beginning. [**_Join the fight now and stop the catastrophe >>>_**](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ce072bb072&e=00856e661d)
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4798da631f&e=00856e661d "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| Democrats are on the march to destroy our country, and establishment Republicans are complicit. It’s time for America First Republicans to step up and take this country back.

Thank you for your support,
Joe Kent
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=00b57e70b1&e=00856e661d)

|

clean_body: This is just the tip of the iceberg. | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Are you tired of paying $6.00 for your gas and worrying about your grocery bill? What if I told you that's just the tip of the iceberg? Everyone can feel the pain at the pump. Grocery costs are skyrocketing. And at this rate, the average American will experience enough of an inflation hit to equal a month of working for free. Instead of helping American families, Biden is driving this country off of a cliff. We are in the middle of an energy emergency caused solely by Biden’s policies of dwindling our energy production, like killing off pipelines and exploratory drilling. But instead of making policy changes to alleviate the crisis, he’s now tapping into our emergency Strategic Petroleum Reserve–something otherwise reserved for wartime crises. | "CHIP IN NOW" | President Biden's administration has gone all in on the nebulous dangers of climate change, to the detriment of our economy, our foreign policy, and urgent environmental protections where we could actually make an impact–like targeting the alarming levels of microplastics, pesticides and chemicals in our food and water. We know what the Democrats will do if they get the chance: launder money through "green" activism like the BBB bill tried to do, shut down our entire labor force with the "Green New Deal", and buy all our energy and products from foreign adversaries. It’s already hitting American families hard. Millions of people will lose their jobs. Lines will form at the gas stations. Grocery store shelves will be empty and shortages will become a very significant reality. And we’re just at the beginning. | "JOIN THE FIGHT" | Democrats are on the march to destroy our country, and establishment Republicans are complicit. It’s time for America First Republicans to step up and take this country back. Thank you for your support, Joe Kent | | | Why is the establishment scared of me? ✅ April 2nd: ✅ April 4th: ✅ April 5th: ✅ April 5th: | | Coming to a door near you in Lewis county! | | | Upcoming Events I want to meet you! Please join me and support OUR fight to push back against the establishment and corporate donor class! | "Donate Now" | Chip in $10, $25, or $50. | | If you’ve already donated, please share this email with your friends and family. Peter,

Joe Biden’s agenda is CRUSHING Americans and [**I need your help to Save America.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aea117c63fb7437ab3fece4dcfa15eee&_e=UPZlnlgqghT48HncGp5_Cp1aRPMQFuL1tfm5PvAI0F6wpNnG5Sgvdw6M_W8O3i2iY9gKwbJqF4XYHbziY77L9nwo2tc9GUAlxH2CvXJq7juhjI6qzA0az5moK2k1uxSPU0YPJJldw_6y9pce14sHxmfcI79Mdyiuyr3GfUsxiJAle6R2gCnmiALrKZYWH2KpSb75eQfXsTZugpmfxNUPQXiD7hapkoP1tpOzGn90j52Vlc4tsaMFQgriT3P5_mBwkogJNe-am2Hnan_HoQp1IkVRCjm9-W7MxOoK8K-tNWBz9ICKCOpH8zPqm_MFdaF0KID6XqVj_sk0LSkeFlwSGjuVpJtWv5lB4VsZ9JQySiaaUoBZhGGhTEfOnIj97RWu97c-HMgFsCgMDNeSioxq7L04mEx29lfUOl5hU2S3ru3d9MN3sATd6TKgmDKMsk2by_s9Nb0CQTiaMlyoUU4TmKXc-thLOkEbMLU7Fb5-q40%3D)

Don’t just take my word for it either.

Does gas cost more today than it did before Joe Biden became President?

**YES.**

Are you paying more for groceries?

**YES.**

Are farmers paying more for fertilizer?

**YES.**

Are you paying more for every input that is associated with energy?

**YES.**

Republicans are BEING OUTRAISED by tens of millions of dollars.

We can fix Biden’s mess and once again become energy independent - we did it under President Trump - but we MUST WIN the Senate and [**WE MUST HEAR FROM YOU TODAY.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aea117c63fb7437ab3fece4dcfa15eee&_e=UPZlnlgqghT48HncGp5_Cp1aRPMQFuL1tfm5PvAI0F6wpNnG5Sgvdw6M_W8O3i2iY9gKwbJqF4XYHbziY77L9nwo2tc9GUAlxH2CvXJq7juhjI6qzA0az5moK2k1uxSPU0YPJJldw_6y9pce14sHxmfcI79Mdyiuyr3GfUsxiJAle6R2gCnmiALrKZYWH2KpSb75eQfXsTZugpmfxNUPQXiD7hapkoP1tpOzGn90j52Vlc4tsaMFQgriT3P5_mBwkogJNe-am2Hnan_HoQp1IgU_dgMXMHyYBNdBeYWF0UHfEkEAHRkNNUOMZiK78ryscprm534EyKcZNwBoVdFwQaOdvHcNNHDE_6ML7MIdmugaHyFrePEeYpeXPJcC5BKu-lWcWUgr4QQOlwWM-jZN9LOsy95uAQQGRwQVubXBAhFmv-cxLWVfzxiUOHUMrTzhF7dmPmxUw5vZNnT6eig9eTbRUlShkdWT9vA1Jr3xtxs%3D)

So we’re asking you to help us hit our $5,000 goal by MIDNIGHT for the sake of our razor-thin majority in the House: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, \- Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 ckq.io/eguhtk The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. name: John Fetterman
subject: This is, frankly, sad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
(In case you were wondering)
#
Derek,
Remember the TV ad that Conor Lamb’s super PAC is spending nearly half a MILLION dollars on?
You know, the one I emailed you about this morning?
Well, my team just confirmed that**the attack ad was pulled down from Channel 6 — one of the largest local television stations in PA — for making false claims against yours truly. 🙄**
In case you were wondering, it’s not often that a political ad debuts, then gets pulled in a matter of hours. To put it this way, I put on my suit more often than this actually happens.
But I guess that’s what you get when you spend money attacking a fellow Democrat with lies. They really posted an L this time.
As much as I wish I could get back to celebrating my son’s birthday (he turned 8 today!) it’s looking pretty likely that Lamb’s super PAC is gonna edit the ad + get it back on the air ASAP.
When they do, we gotta be ready, which is why I have to ask:
**[Will you please help our people-powered campaign stay ahead of these dirty tactics from super PACs? We neutralized the threat for now, but trust me, we don’t have much time until Lamb’s ultra-wealthy donors go back on the attack. If you can, chip in $5 today »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46332?refcode=em20220405-5267&t=1&akid=5267%2E434096%2EJdpMRp)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46332?refcode=em20220405-5267&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5267%2E434096%2EJdpMRp)**
Thanks for having my back, Derek. I just can’t thank you enough 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220405-5267-footer&t=21&refcode2=5267_434096_JdpMRp&akid=5267%2E434096%2EJdpMRp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=5267%2E434096%2EJdpMRp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=5267%2E434096%2EJdpMRp)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Congress will hold a hearing on corporate corruption!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
This week, Congress will finally hold a hearing on congressional insider trading. We’re grateful to our supporters for helping force the controversy when Washington didn’t want to discuss it. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OyUeOBK8MiFYNfuv79NKjaj4eVCjGVDytNF3sRN9Ko9nfPD_HMwrCp1wEEBW73S_dBELhGor4zf6k83pxSyZeHxod7e9bR8Zqr19Tl81TXy3UznkYo9EV2dT1OPre-bHHQpS6I068W_9UUiGAwqMARukNIOwIeoq-MNgXaCmxH60aWH9i2T8KuDZ63XEFHgcYgL0jHvXCTyt-ByS_kL0A3Sf8jpwp2mdMjpU0tBm61uwSbKyKMEzeirEmo3dbqkJymMY4ZP97ugAyNOTK6Il_Bc/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h0/WUZtFoyRG1MbzBONFRt0RnNVDoNtrb-jQzS3agdUdjM)
| | Dear Peter, **** We’ve all been outraged by the corporate corruption of Congress. It might even be why you joined our campaign! It’s also why we’re so grateful to each of our supporters who’ve enabled our work calling out the congressional insider trading that invites and entrenches corporate rule. This Thursday, the House Committee on Administration will hold a hearing on the ethics concerns raised by policymakers trading stocks. We’re eager to see where the discussion leads—and, having raised this issue for years, we’re also eager what issues it will predictably fail to address. [**Can you join us today to continue forcing issues into the headlines that corporate Democrats would rather avoid?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJ4FssD1ozUDf5BrpqafjWoq1Udm-H1-Yt_XlO8_Le-WX9zc0rbrrh_7JU7iZYYIJpvDJdTh9ErYuvq4iuT3Ux4776UgeOu46Mv4ZKKJHc7osa4C2v3oCMOdlWyyfZ7UL9IJLghJ9sA-pslm2iZJGzLWfPd71LQEIri5kPma5zB_IGsrgFR7gjs_VkAjDpDuio-ovhy2H6qbXHWiqhaFgNZuzy3yDtxfHjIGX9aDwy91kjCT2T4NoaV-gMHrip8N-dOliERrhO70UsIK_JsnMtmB4Jr3B8_dLNxcW-m1Kh99HpleZUsbvgqrDcqp3AWq7U/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h1/FrQ4QtNaW9coXEdMsTbyt3s6STmmSFi6992QuAzW06k) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHOgpLvNruWjaZjaaDvcKGySTjKfLk807qHSSblQhGzKnwaxQqVpBL-6k1wFMpIb04lQ4fp6R78qsm0xEWwBSdZaM3nrUJSi5sv0M5DdQqAVM9pkZuUFpqlk77qt9YK2-Vld0aXbFn60Twcw__x03XvdvOG_inBlAU71IY_swDSO2oeqfpoTOUGxrUpCTry9jJpBvOVSGFpsjJWAC2HOrii7Us0iFrcpzcAhoLIFO65V9b0wduzhKDb26stIDVIhBZf6N3qprAHWsJz72M7FA_2CDBt9AbP7QftLoWgcB1ChdIZfmT00n9lpbnSjGpRj2N1yUZtAwj7Fw_EATEyVKi7ene4ImNJRRFt_EhE7t3M_fxW_FEWYa2ETpliYfqyNzUpWo1ff0KlDGMiHutf30Ik/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h2/MVZ7OLAvTfI9gU4Gspvww4WTlApvYonYgT_B4boqyoo) This week’s hearing is long overdue, and is also far from enough. We can’t let Congress slide by with the bare minimum while ultimately doing nothing meaningful to address the issue of corporate corruption invited by conflicts of interest and divided loyalties. If the debate continues as it has, any resulting legislation will include massive loopholes and fail to address the problem. Having raised concerns for years over Pelosi’s legendary conflicts of interest, I’ve also identified several questions that remain unasked. These concerns have not only evaded the long overdue controversy that you helped us force, but also remain absent from the competing reform proposals introduced in response to it. [**Can you contribute $27 today to help us expose the issues that remain absent from the policy debate?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJ4FssD1ozUDf5BrpqafjWoq1Udm-H1-Yt_XlO8_Le-We4Wq8fUG0nwE8h1M6cK7TcbO4yjY0f1H4g8bwQqXJqZgWTRwk4jsJ8vOktE3agN9cYcdj8WVsNJ_lUeQhz1_fvZ0R9jhJrzVxLDRFnroYhelNd9YoffIdXmUVHV5BeFWVaQh7JJjpKRVjhm7Tt6s-zSnE48c6Oyr91awcWIYRgYmjG5YHfVFmkEX7iH3L9rxVnQEsMB_tHlOGDVFkUCoMn1UsGxfhRP2-9mJOjrQRM3gx-MdDKsX0NPWIDrFiejs4qM83LtqKbhr-0IxTBtGPM/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h3/OgGo6fXMo9daClLVZNbBHhfmQitZoz3twF5NBM4a3BQ) Among the several issues that should be at the center of the debate, only a few have been acknowledged, let alone resolved in any way that would favor the public, rather than oligarchs masquerading as policymakers.
1. **Loopholes** : Will the proposed ban on congressional insider trading include members of their families and their staff, as do existing laws constraining corporate executives? Pending reform proposals differ on this point, while entirely ignoring each of those below.

2. **Underinclusion** : What other requirements beyond a proposed ban on insider trading will prevent similar conflicts of interest introduced through other means beyond ownership positions (e.g. relationships with lobbyists, corporate executives, or billionaires)?

3. **Correcting policy impacts** : Which areas of federal policymaking have been skewed as a result of the divided loyalties of Members of Congress? On what schedule will Congress revisit previous policies addressing issues such as healthcare, climate justice, and social needs, on which their decisions were unethically influenced by conflicts of interest?

4. **Other conflicts of interest beyond stock positions** : Beyond insider trading, how else do the financial interests of policymakers undermine their independence and capacity to represent their constituents? For example, Nancy Pelosi’s substantial real estate portfolio introduces conflicts of interest beyond her stock positions that skew her decisions on policies related to housing and financial regulation. Similarly, laws intended to stop money laundering have long blocked transparency into private equity instruments and hedge funds, making them among the preferred methods of money laundering for oligarchs from America to Russia.
**
**
5. **Consequences:** Will the vulture-capitalists-masquerading-as-policymakers be required to return their fraudulent capital gains enabled by insider trading in the past?

6. **The Emoluments Clause** (for which Pelosi twice gave Trump a free pass) prohibits self-enrichment by public officials at the public’s expense. Have policymakers who have traded stocks, equities, commodities, and related derivatives have violated the Emoluments Clause? Who is poised, other than voters, to enforce that constitutional prohibition and hold corrupt politicians accountable?

[**The volume of our message depends on the resources behind it. Can you consider a contribution today to help level the playing field against the corporate establishment?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJ4FssD1ozUDf5BrpqafjWoq1Udm-H1-Yt_XlO8_Le-WXqoJ2PzQEy2NK7-7FJ3E2r8_VRBWAWlLdJ3lPuKo5jGXMhjeBdD6mQdQsMSWJfoCrA_SygT23_pyinBD_CBccU1nDsJTxCuRZqBvxoNedOuxeMQy31SZ2j6czWccHSw36FsSuA7M5iBHTIwJtihlazfCHvhkAJ6yW5FdjGbNPfChG99rmX-DEGO9x3cyyNbASLPL8vSyedaHgbTnYnIR_iuLHvoIvrBYFqWEK3p5-A1wckE9fDzq23T2BGT50XILlkSVhTylgvyquv5s5uL3Vs/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h4/W9wnhgArXE2dndC_Erq-bkJHg0325gMADBx_YtZW8I0) Insider trading is the cornerstone of the corporate corruption infecting every single issue that Congress considers. Just a few weeks ago, members of Congress were caught making private trades to profit from energy prices in the days before escalation in Ukraine drove up the price of oil. Private portfolio positions that profit from international conflict are a perfect example of a disturbing pattern poised to continue even under the reform proposals that have been announced. Media outlets have covered other examples of congressional conflicts of interest, but only voters can take the next step of forcing accountability at the ballot box. Thanks for helping us inform the debate, force this controversy into the public, and hold Congress accountable! We couldn’t do it without you. Your voice,
Shahid |
---|---|---
|
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiK3QYPf9O2YAvIrWYttWwfKbrvdFDWvz82F3fhc9xdSWrEtJBAD45J15pOe3kQprShjyR6uSR33zFd-kkOa2aXCo14Z-1GZQUW1QE5bux9aVP7JsY6gTjFkPO5lirZeGqIv-RB_5i5EKTBJTkREQmSYEZTXttQIcvd5fsgioTTu6ql1MwhUAThQifldVZBiOJNXEWbOl1U6O1R3TPDkrJtRvmAisw0_SUVLB8oxJMEPteBD8GyZS2Qc-DrrjgENeHRfDScBeIayhFjEbpFZw8NkujWqOV_LVIGtaJb9e5Br5w/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h5/eBY9zw_4EdWt2hb6gSG4FIJGFybVYlgWzXt_tf38mpc) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhqFPbIOt_SSei2w6SESbB97ywZMbmRV0RLmqyLIOr_bbzcxyWi_SRA_sPEwXVoD0HJVpyiXnVC57XkC4nK5ZBajnB_wxYQ4ShKljp0RZ-WPIYHBZSn01qOa0BVB8NXYvC2GPiwozqoOK7bGXzt0pubvFMbxlCbkYRVeEM5bCODjZmW6GeUKcS0tHV-AsX1TLbmeH_Wp0D9hyJsmwY2p1I28sO35LRvd7Q_FAK-W2DR_WKJB0zJemRxz6Rmc1N3S3AQVpPxyqPFygPhI6bRudd1gb9K-OJCJjWsqorn7yI7qTt9Me5HlugfK2-F6pse4BJw/3kz/ai11C1lPSqykH_ZHR_7vDw/h6/AbyE5leyi6k1-yALjlDbsy5pWo0CAYg4jD0sKI8EqLw)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Early Voting Starts Today!
body:
Early voting for the May 3rd Primary starts today at your local Board of Elections.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Early Voting Starts Today!
Good afternoon,Early Voting for the May 3rd Primary starts TODAY! Early voting takes place at your county Board of Elections. **For Hamilton County residents:**
Hamilton County Board of Elections - 4700 Smith Road, Cincinnati, OH 45212
For full schedule of times to vote, check out the Board of Election's website [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-y/). **For Warren County residents:**
Warren County Board of Elections - 520 Justice Drive, Lebanon, OH 45036
For full schedule of voting times and days, click the link [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-j/).Make sure you have a plan to get out and vote either early or on Primary Day, May 3rd!If you have any questions, please reach out to my campaign office at 513-662-8000 or ChabotCups@chabotforcongress.com!Yours truly,Steve Chabot [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-t/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-u/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyyddlz-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyyddlz-l-p) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. I have been outraised by my opponent every single quarter, so now, **I need to have a great start to this quarter.** but lately, it's seemed like people think this race doesn't even matter, so I just wanted to give you a quick rundown on this race:
1. **This race is currently separated by 2%, which means it is essentially a toss-up**
2. **_Fox News_ has said this race will be the most expensive in U.S. history**
3. **_Roll Call_ said this race will determine who controls the Senate **
4. **And most recently,_MSNBC_ called my opponent a "breakout fundraising star"**

If we want to have a chance at fighting back and defeating my well-funded liberal opponent, I need to start strong.

**[I'm pleading with you, Friend, even if it is $8...will you give today? People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. Marco Rubio

Friend, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: Joe Biden tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullin for America
body:
But I'm still here, and my fight isn't over.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60051575:6cldmCoMN:m:1:3253819041:9090471BD6887295F9276D34756E8E49:r)
When the Biden administration left Americans behind in Afghanistan, the team and I went to get Americans out. And what did the Biden administration do in response?

**Without question, they tried to kill me. **

They released information about my location while I was in Afghanistan. They didn't care if I got killed. They just didn't want anyone to know that they left Americans behind.

To be quite frank, I didn't do it for political clout or popularity. I didn't even intend for it to get out. Despite the media outing us and putting the mission in jeopardy we were ultimately successful.

**I did this because I care deeply about every single American. It angered me that they got left behind in harm 's way. I care that we have a President who not only left them in a warzone, but that he tried to kill a United States Congressman who went to save them. **

I saw an opportunity to help. As a Christian, helping others is what God intended me to do. I saw a need and I went to it.

Now, I see another need. I'm running for the United States Senate to continue to fight for the American people like I've done my whole life. As the next Senator for Oklahoma, **I will never stop fighting.**

**Even if a corrupt administration tries to stop me.

[It would be my honor if you could join me in this battle today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60051575:6cldmCoMN:m:1:3253819041:9090471BD6887295F9276D34756E8E49:r)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM MULLIN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60051575:6cldmCoMN:m:1:3253819041:9090471BD6887295F9276D34756E8E49:r)
[**FIGHT FOR AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60051575:6cldmCoMN:m:1:3253819041:9090471BD6887295F9276D34756E8E49:r)
God bless America.
Markwayne Mullin

Candidate for US Senate

clean_body: But I'm still here, and my fight isn't over. | | | | | | | | | When the Biden administration left Americans behind in Afghanistan, the team and I went to get Americans out. And what did the Biden administration do in response? Without question, they tried to kill me. They released information about my location while I was in Afghanistan. They didn't care if I got killed. They just didn't want anyone to know that they left Americans behind. To be quite frank, I didn't do it for political clout or popularity. I didn't even intend for it to get out. Despite the media outing us and putting the mission in jeopardy we were ultimately successful. I did this because I care deeply about every single American. It angered me that they got left behind in harm 's way. I care that we have a President who not only left them in a warzone, but that he tried to kill a United States Congressman who went to save them. I saw an opportunity to help. As a Christian, helping others is what God intended me to do. I saw a need and I went to it. Now, I see another need. I'm running for the United States Senate to continue to fight for the American people like I've done my whole life. As the next Senator for Oklahoma, I will never stop fighting. Even if a corrupt administration tries to stop me. God bless America. Markwayne Mullin Candidate for US Senate | | | Paid for by Mullin for America PO Box 470045, Tulsa, OK 74147 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Te
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvq4gjkd7d7lv8hqughok65u5t80akn23v5stfn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9j69oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0ohke8o7dcdkc5qr4sbks9hraohlejhjcp1jm9rb8shjmdqm1dbkcuq3cddmesrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omct72mdiefcljcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) [**DONATE**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/suetwitter?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20220406_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REN_PA-AAN) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7mj2e688gl0fqr0cj6ointhae2qhsg4iqe6170_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9j69oj6c9h2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z7k670jlpqafkbtnouqefermhjvfoloeh4msvou8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrme8f3f1rbvvdbaj0dqji4ssoigoo9brdlihbl8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cjh6cp72cph649fg)

name: James Marter
subject: Introducing the Marter Minute!
body:
Proud to Represent the Families of IL-14
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://www.facebook.com/JTMARTER) [](https://twitter.com/Marter4Congress) [](https://www.instagram.com/marter4congress/)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**It's been an incredible whirlwind of a time on the campaign trail.** Recently, I filed my petitions with over **1,200 signatures:****3x** the amount required. I'm extremely grateful for the 40+ volunteers who helped me achieve this milestone to becoming the next Congressman for Illinois' 14th District.
---
| **Who we send to Congress MATTERS!** It's important that we don't 'sit this one out on the sidelines' folks! Join my campaign and we'll put the Broken Down Biden Economy on the road to recovery!
---
| [Donate To Save America](https://ho941.keap-link020.com/v2/click/57b6c36b982dc5de4f0c62ab58b7f384/eJyNkEFrwkAQhf_LnKNJYwxtbiIiIZpDseeybKZ10cwusxMlhPz3blQ8tdDrvDff470BBEmRlA0UcLRv2QtEwKiNM0iytiRK38RFmr8mWQRnQ6ct285BMfz2-9Sna54vkwikdxgch_fVuirr7eeurKvgdIpDxH8w2SJNn5jNflXuYBz_5GJrZHMJaA-FcIdTn8aETvLB5ylCxPkijj3qjnGuCBsrc23buFUsyLMvyzNt6ZvR-_hqKDCVc0jNY44K-zt5_AHt5Whd)
---
|
---
|
# Mary Miller endorses Jim Marter
---
| |
---
Another highlight came when my campaign secured just over 100 endorsements for me in this race. Most notably, I am honored that Congresswoman Mary Miller recently endorsed me. She is a true conservative fighter who upholds the US Constitution and fights for the people of her district. Please visit my complete campaign endorsement list below

---
| [View All Endorsements](https://ho941.keap-link013.com/v2/click/e49721e514a58ad117a50b9eaede6f09/eJyNkEELgkAQhf_LnCXLFjFvIhGieYg6x6JDLeXuMjsGEf731gpPBV3fe_M93jyAUUvNRQspnM1KLCAAwkZZhZpzo1k2L3MZxclcBHBV-rIh01tIH99uJ39U41gkAfDdok_sd1leFvXmWBV16ZNWkq_4ByOWUTRh1tusqGAYfnKxU7y-ebSDlKnHcU-r_CY-0HWsYLYuDcNOEiOJxugToXOz3oWoW0MOu_E49ChprZc-Xyjx_gYOT2BrZTk=)
---
|
---
|
---
# STAMP PAC EVENT
We had a great "meet & greet" in March. Now: **SAVE THE DATE!** I challenged my primary opponents to a debate back in January and it's finally going to happen! On **April 20th** , plan on attending the IL14 **Debate in Yorkville!**
---
| | [RSVP to the Debate!](mailto:christacolasante@gmail.com)
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Marter at CPAC 2022
In early March, I attended the CPAC 2022 convention in Florida. This was a great convention for the conservative movement in America! It was fantastic to meet with so many conservative people from across our country. 2022 is the year for us to restore the greatness of America! I reconnected with Congressman Jim Jordan (R-Ohio) and many others fighting for us. **I was honored to be featured on Real America's News, Lindell TV and more!**
---
[](https://ho941.keap-link008.com/v2/click/aca7ef79a52f284573c5e5a2e36dfc34/eJyNj0sLgkAUhf_LXUuWylDuRMLEatFj0SqmvOGQzQzTNRHxvzdWuCpoex7f4bRAKLmkNIcQCjULJuCAwbPQAiXFShI_v0zfY9Nx4EAp5DUxqtIQtt-6g9-rjAXMAWo02sRuE8VZuk6Oy3Sd2aTmxk78gwl8zxsw81WULqHrfnLxJmj-sOg7hGQq7P_kwn6ivSn7CSJ9D123URVVoxO628vpUIzrehErW-dao8w_zzNs3pDuCZz3X-c=)
---
|
---
|
---
## **Dekalb County - Meet & Greet**
My message: As the TRUE Constitutional Conservative in this race, I support the First and Second Amendments and I am PRO-LIFE. We shouldn’t be funding Planned Parenthood and I will fight to protect innocent children in the womb. I believe in medical freedom. If you want to wear a mask or not, if you want the vaccine or not, it’s YOUR decision, not the government’s decision. I believe parents are the best advocates for their children and support parental rights when it comes to their education.
---
|
---
|
---
|
# St. Patrick’s Day 2022!
## Plainfield / Lasalle / Yorkville - I will work for you!
Continuing to travel throughout IL-14 has been the honor of a lifetime! Everywhere I go, I see honest and hardworking people, who are taken advantage of by their government. When I am elected to Congress, representation will make a comeback! I will continue to travel the district and meet the hard working and dedicated people who demand and deserve to have a voice who speaks for them.
---
|
---
| **Who we send to Congress Matters!** There will be more newsletters detailing my campaign activities and events. Please know that I will always stand for America and our Constitution, the people of Illinois and our 14th Congressional District. It's where I live, work, enjoy my family and serve my community.
---
---
| | [Let's Save America Together!](https://ho941.keap-link004.com/v2/click/ecabc72c9562c0b5de430c1164fe4b4a/eJyNkEEPwUAQhf_LnFGqaehNRKQpDsJZNtvBhs5uZqdEpP_dFnEicZ333vfy5g6CpEjyEjI42nEygA4wauMMkkwtidJPcRino37SgbOh05xt7SC7f8t-9PaapkmIyM1hcGzWk2mRr-a7Rb4qgtMpDhX_YJJhHH8ws-UkX0DT_ORiZWR2CWgPmXCN7Z7ShE2y5XNbIeJ8FkUedc3YU4SllZ62VVQpFuTu3nJXWzoweh9dDQWmcg6pfL-jwNuL3DwA8HtoYA==)
---
|
---

clean_body: Proud to Represent the Families of IL-14 | | | | | | | | It's been an incredible whirlwind of a time on the campaign trail. Recently, I filed my petitions with over 1,200 signatures:3x the amount required. I'm extremely grateful for the 40+ volunteers who helped me achieve this milestone to becoming the next Congressman for Illinois' 14th District. | Who we send to Congress MATTERS! It's important that we don't 'sit this one out on the sidelines' folks! Join my campaign and we'll put the Broken Down Biden Economy on the road to recovery! | | | Mary Miller endorses Jim Marter | | Another highlight came when my campaign secured just over 100 endorsements for me in this race. Most notably, I am honored that Congresswoman Mary Miller recently endorsed me. She is a true conservative fighter who upholds the US Constitution and fights for the people of her district. Please visit my complete campaign endorsement list below | = | | STAMP PAC EVENT We had a great "meet & greet" in March. Now: SAVE THE DATE! I challenged my primary opponents to a debate back in January and it's finally going to happen! On April 20th , plan on attending the IL14 Debate in Yorkville! | | mailto:christacolasante@gmail.com | | | Marter at CPAC 2022 In early March, I attended the CPAC 2022 convention in Florida. This was a great convention for the conservative movement in America! It was fantastic to meet with so many conservative people from across our country. 2022 is the year for us to restore the greatness of America! I reconnected with Congressman Jim Jordan (R-Ohio) and many others fighting for us. I was honored to be featured on Real America's News, Lindell TV and more! = | | Dekalb County - Meet & Greet My message: As the TRUE Constitutional Conservative in this race, I support the First and Second Amendments and I am PRO-LIFE. We shouldn’t be funding Planned Parenthood and I will fight to protect innocent children in the womb. I believe in medical freedom. If you want to wear a mask or not, if you want the vaccine or not, it’s YOUR decision, not the government’s decision. I believe parents are the best advocates for their children and support parental rights when it comes to their education. | | | St. Patrick’s Day 2022! Plainfield / Lasalle / Yorkville - I will work for you! Continuing to travel throughout IL-14 has been the honor of a lifetime! Everywhere I go, I see honest and hardworking people, who are taken advantage of by their government. When I am elected to Congress, representation will make a comeback! I will continue to travel the district and meet the hard working and dedicated people who demand and deserve to have a voice who speaks for them. | | Who we send to Congress Matters! There will be more newsletters detailing my campaign activities and events. Please know that I will always stand for America and our Constitution, the people of Illinois and our 14th Congressional District. It's where I live, work, enjoy my family and serve my community. | | == | | | To mailto:info@marter4congress.us: - Just click and send a BLANK email. | | | | Marter for Congress Post Office Box 271 Oswego, Illinois 60543 United States (815) 585-8006

| Jake Evans Debuts First Two Television Ads as your Constitutional Warrior.
For immediate release: April 6th, 2022
Contact: news@jakeevans.org

Two spots highlight Jake Evans' fight to successfully protect election integrity, and religious liberty Jake Evans' campaign for Georgia's 6th Congressional District today launched its first two ads of the campaign, which highlight his role as a Constitutional Warrior in court for election integrity and religious liberty. The first ad features Jake at the United States Supreme Court in reference to his defense against liberal activist groups' efforts to weaken election integrity laws in the 2020 election. "Jake Evans is the only candidate who took the fight for President Trump to the U.S. Supreme Court, so only legal votes would count." [Watch Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MDPFJSeb2siUQ77wiDrDIkVBniuflqCYI1xmI6FVA1zUHUD9xqxvXZHjbmVpBB9PCzzGvAAmgGM0AlTt6U3ropjrdt2-dhZGojkSqXvg7jhhFtJIZqFgaB0Vgzf_YqDB3SS8Prz2suoj3J5AInkBeA==&c=fs-3p8xZ3KV2o1QJV8akhX6KCIyWSk5Old3rookKEN8XKFPIaK4P0w==&ch=kBSnnddaAMV0fAxIgXemaG_gG93p8jALMSAt20eAFnI5nTr_a7tdsA==)

body:
You won’t want to miss this video -
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)

| Peter \-
---
| The US Military is the world's premier fighting force made up of the most honest and patriotic women and men in our nation. But the Biden administration is trying to destroy our military by force-feeding it wokeism.
---
| | | [STOP WOKEISM FROM DESTROYING OUR MILITARY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)
---
| Yesterday, [I squared off with Biden's Secretary of Defense, Lloyd Austin](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)[.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==) You may remember Austin as one of the architects of the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan where 13 Americans lost their lives and many were left behind.
I took the fight directly to General Austin - who folded under the pressure when asked about our military funding woke training and socialist teachings. [Just watch:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)
---
| It's clear here that Lloyd Austin is in no position to lead our fighting forces. He's a failure serving an addled President. He faced no accountability as 13 of our service members died in Afghanistan, and now teaches woke Critical Race Theory and pronoun training to our military.
I'm fighting these radical leftists who are letting our military fall behind in critical fields such as hypersonic missile technology. I've been leading this fight, but I need more America-First patriots sounding the alarm on this threat to our nation.
[JOIN THIS FIGHT WITH ME SO WE CAN TAKE ON THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION AND END WOKEISM IN THE US MILITARY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOoJoyxnoY0eBUMcRoNaAY-EPZEOscj8P7AjZPQzFU_jFBI_4C60L9Tbs1RkvT0rK77XgeWxEvzQMSMlnoVZPKFPIMyabrISQjrKv-93tGtBjeJg6JqCjuGIn8CVlxjWpZMQpOLqgZPsVeujXMpCGLSPyoEn-oMntWcJ_9fNRK2hM5jsLLEaEw==&c=bURR3Sm3nj90HRjFIjEusCCVURcQxYRNGRg6XxgE_qomcqfl7w1CWQ==&ch=KMtKXufmkxR0u5HPy2cDEW2b_IdhxU1on2lQr1zud8-IwjSFJs9DZA==)

I've been leading this fight, but I need more America-First patriots sounding the alarm on this threat to our nation. == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, | == | Matt Gaetz (R-FL) | | | | | == == | | | == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: The ONLY Vietnamese American
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) Peter, **[If I win this race in November, I'll be the ONLY Vietnamese-American (or as we call ourselves, Americans with Vietnamese Roots) in Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r)**
This is a **new frontier** for our community, and an opportunity to have our voice heard like never before.

_But I can't do this without you._

_If I'm going to represent our great community in Congress, I desperately need your support._

[**Pitch in now to send a proud Vietnamese-American to Congress who will ALWAYS stand by you.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN $10**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055330:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055331:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055332:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055333:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN $250**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055334:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) Peter, for too long, our people have been swept under the rug by politicians who claim to represent us.

_**That ends now.**_

Many of us escaped the worst horrors imaginable to come to come to this great country.

_If I didn't make it to America out of Vietnam with my family, we might not be alive._

Now that I've been giving this incredible opportunity, I'm not going to waste it.

[**If you're ready for a new era of Vietnamese-American representation in Congress, pitch in TODAY and help us win this critical race.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) [**I'M READY FOR A NEW GENERATION >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) In Liberty, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**PITCH IN - HELP US WIN NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055329:65e_oCoNQ:m:1:3317145305:87D3C419E0D750542A6042DF86E50608:r) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. subject: Get the Winter edition of the Hoover Institution Digest now
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vso9DdSHNE

The Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy
research organization that seeks to improve the human condition
by advancing ideas that
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oso9DdSHNE

Dear
Friend,

The
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance.

Our
flagship publication is the quarterly Hoover Digest, which
features about thirty of our scholar's writings on a variety of
topics including history, economics, national security, and more.

I'm
excited to let you know that the Winter 2022 edition of the
Hoover Digest is available for you to download for free.

Some
highlights of this issue include:

"Tomorrow's Arms Race" - The fundamental contest between Beijing
and its nuclear rivals is not just about ships, missiles, and
warheads, but about technology itself.

"Where Is the Inequality" - "Surging inequality" is the phantom
that just won't go away - despite rising household wealth in the
Trump years, even during the pandemic.

"Escape the Culture Wars" - Let the school boards and the
politicians rage. Parents and teachers can reach common ground on
what really matters: helping kids.

Click
here to get your free copy of the 2022 Winter edition of the
Hoover Digest right now.

I hope
you find this free resource of interest.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

"Where Is the Inequality" - "Surging inequality" is the phantom that just won't go away - despite rising household wealth in the Trump years, even during the pandemic. "Escape the Culture Wars" - Let the school boards and the politicians rage. Parents and teachers can reach common ground on what really matters: helping kids. Click here to get your free copy of the 2022 Winter edition of the Hoover Digest right now. I hope you find this free resource of interest. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES VOTER REGISTRATION CAMPAIGN FOR CONSUMERS ﻿ACROSS METRO ATLANTA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 6, 2022 GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES VOTER REGISTRATION CAMPAIGN FOR CONSUMERS ACROSS METRO ATLANTA ATLANTA - This Saturday, April 9, Greater Georgia will launch a multi-county campaign to register voters at gas stations across Metro Atlanta, highlighting how the Washington agenda has driven historic price increases over the last year on everything from groceries to gasoline. By mobilizing voters at the point of sale, Georgians will be encouraged to take action and vote in the upcoming May primary and November general election.
Part of Greater Georgia's broader mission that has already registered tens of thousands of lean-conservative voters, this latest registration drive will continue at a variety of consumer marketplaces over the coming weeks, including at gas stations, grocery stores, and gun stores. It will also include an accompanying digital and text registration campaign in counties across the metro area.
"Georgia families are running on fumes and cannot afford more of the reckless Washington spending that is draining their wallets on everyday purchases like gas and groceries. That's where Greater Georgia comes in, making sure that everyone knows their vote is their voice," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman and former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler. "Our latest effort will empower Georgia consumers who are feeling the pain of the Left's failed agenda - and encourage them to vote for conservative leaders. We're on the ground engaging with Georgia consumers on the facts: the only way we stop runaway inflation, and get on the road to recovery, is by making our voices heard in May and November."
Read more about how the administration's reckless agenda is hurting Georgia families, and register to vote, [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013viRVWz8KpdIrARrjCao6lVrj29zgAiJ82cnrVKMgOpy9YhEFMzQKjdXwPPrN7qdXIrs9yyE5ZcHIGcG0-BAfm7561zoS9jpBaqLNgVQx5FzuIZVheyqjqnooXPMXci_GH7p3VGHY0ihyoWH2p-UlV_mfQIm8zctRgQNsaIb6jT6wltxZC0jCw==&c=p_7vVOM45y5odUMTlUGA-PYXeqSH9iuYJDPuTlpox-bULjdYLTZdQQ==&ch=yhIWcn0bHY0U043Cc2FzFXX8gG7bQ--WphpySz0hnRoGW6U4M_VCwQ==). The last day to register to vote in the May 24 primary election is on April 25.
BACKGROUND
Atlanta has the worst inflation of any city in the nation, with prices rising 10% in the last 12 months - the highest increase in 40 years. (Marcus K. Garner, "Inflation Highest In Metro Atlanta Over 1 Year: Feds Report," [Patch Atlanta](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013viRVWz8KpdIrARrjCao6lVrj29zgAiJ82cnrVKMgOpy9YhEFMzQKjdXwPPrN7qdViH19lg2JgfMFRIY169F3IbNbIlMPhi740OrmcU9pOJIonuavijZMx4PqTzb5eZAaPiL6gje0ufbxKLX4QuTO0KLO7xYSjXpdCcbR0rmTgZDlpXBuO8Cj5cgIkz9v30iItkrknAz9Llgldq4H3joTAsX_sqLuJqEfzu-ZrejBz8=&c=p_7vVOM45y5odUMTlUGA-PYXeqSH9iuYJDPuTlpox-bULjdYLTZdQQ==&ch=yhIWcn0bHY0U043Cc2FzFXX8gG7bQ--WphpySz0hnRoGW6U4M_VCwQ==), 2/15/2022) One year ago, the average price of gas in Atlanta was $2.71. Today, the average price is almost $4.00/gallon - just short of the highest price ever recorded. ([AAA Gas Prices](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013viRVWz8KpdIrARrjCao6lVrj29zgAiJ82cnrVKMgOpy9YhEFMzQKjdXwPPrN7qdpic-E032UjKSXqkycaDjdVNaC7nnHYiWcdlDgDXoM8df5-FpjKP6mkwD2Xitmi9H9xfC-pdRvmCVYixmBKUAoDMwBfFrTlnSMjzXRxfdAFo=&c=p_7vVOM45y5odUMTlUGA-PYXeqSH9iuYJDPuTlpox-bULjdYLTZdQQ==&ch=yhIWcn0bHY0U043Cc2FzFXX8gG7bQ--WphpySz0hnRoGW6U4M_VCwQ==)) Compared to last year, Atlanta residents are paying 9.6% more for meat and eggs and 5% more for produce. It costs 8.5% more to pay for rent and 11.8% more to afford clothing. ("Consumer Price Index, Atlanta-Sandy Springs-Roswell -- February 2022," [Bureau of Labor Statistics](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013viRVWz8KpdIrARrjCao6lVrj29zgAiJ82cnrVKMgOpy9YhEFMzQKjdXwPPrN7qdXIB6ImUkdf9GzO2x4Gok0fQNThz-V6t6nwa4Vj_S-yF9X6RgDnyaZHESkbWuX122ilZRh2tgqh8tZyrT_6rfjzBQB1nsBkLIlvT3tgw6NHfB_OeKbaHvzVhZWscBmj5uZRQFC4s9_hv1IAOb-c2Fok-bH-sbPZnnghJPvE2BMQA=&c=p_7vVOM45y5odUMTlUGA-PYXeqSH9iuYJDPuTlpox-bULjdYLTZdQQ==&ch=yhIWcn0bHY0U043Cc2FzFXX8gG7bQ--WphpySz0hnRoGW6U4M_VCwQ==), 3/10/2022) Atlanta was officially classified as "unaffordable" by the Federal Reserve for runaway housing prices. (Nikki Gaskins, "Metro Atlanta Housing Market 'Unaffordable': Report," [Patch Atlanta](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013viRVWz8KpdIrARrjCao6lVrj29zgAiJ82cnrVKMgOpy9YhEFMzQKjdXwPPrN7qd3c215Vp4cHJoYeuj7oiD80RxQpNAN0LWxgsf4KajjQxdW4LwhK2dyadJmcHsSNDjdD3si_dL6hpHrer8k82WJSHqR6KX-TV1FRlq45DoPpP0lU3XkUMsCxv0rPh5LjS8BNTt07c0T_NcBVm9zd4pbJvZEgRoVRqg&c=p_7vVOM45y5odUMTlUGA-PYXeqSH9iuYJDPuTlpox-bULjdYLTZdQQ==&ch=yhIWcn0bHY0U043Cc2FzFXX8gG7bQ--WphpySz0hnRoGW6U4M_VCwQ==), 3/31/2022)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Putin is a war criminal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43824303/338873790/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjg1MDQ3Ni1hOWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLJ9kKlKNISpUkX-Wfc7rWnaZVR8zCTIMiQ_aJGupV8=&emci=e33cd92c-56b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f2850476-a9b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43824305/338873794/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjg1MDQ3Ni1hOWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLJ9kKlKNISpUkX-Wfc7rWnaZVR8zCTIMiQ_aJGupV8=&emci=e33cd92c-56b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f2850476-a9b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
The images coming out of Ukraine are horrific. Innocent civilians shot dead in the streets. Mass graves. Entire cities leveled to the ground. Horrific, but expected.
**There is only one word to describe what the Russian army has done: Criminal.**
I was a three-star admiral in the U.S. Navy. I know what war looks like, and it is not the indiscriminate bombing of apartment buildings, shelters, and hospitals filled with children. Those are war crimes.
It is time to evacuate civilians. It is time to play hardball and state publicly which Russian unit, under whose command, did what. The United States and allied intelligence services have the capability to pull back the curtain and expose who, what, when, and where. It can be a powerful tool to stop the next atrocity before it happens.
**No one in Washington – Democrat or Republican – is saying these things right now. But when I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, I’ll be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. These are serious times; maybe we need someone like that right now.**
The polls show I can win, but Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are already raising millions into Super PACs to try to stop me. **The only way I can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is with the help of grassroots donors like you now:**

clean_body: Hello, The images coming out of Ukraine are horrific. Innocent civilians shot dead in the streets. Mass graves. Entire cities leveled to the ground. Horrific, but expected. There is only one word to describe what the Russian army has done: Criminal. I was a three-star admiral in the U.S. Navy. I know what war looks like, and it is not the indiscriminate bombing of apartment buildings, shelters, and hospitals filled with children. Those are war crimes. It is time to evacuate civilians. It is time to play hardball and state publicly which Russian unit, under whose command, did what. The United States and allied intelligence services have the capability to pull back the curtain and expose who, what, when, and where. It can be a powerful tool to stop the next atrocity before it happens. No one in Washington – Democrat or Republican – is saying these things right now. But when I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, I’ll be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. These are serious times; maybe we need someone like that right now. The polls show I can win, but Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are already raising millions into Super PACs to try to stop me. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Another Sellout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Peter: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055586:6jo2GCooN:m:1:3317145305:2496C81872F1F82FE228EC13850F101C:r)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
**[Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055586:6jo2GCooN:m:1:3317145305:2496C81872F1F82FE228EC13850F101C:r)**
_You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year.
**[Let 's make this latest sellout the last one we ever see.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055586:6jo2GCooN:m:1:3317145305:2496C81872F1F82FE228EC13850F101C:r)**
Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee for her Supreme Court confirmation hearings — where her exceptional legal experience and impeccable character were on full display.
At a moment when everything from the future of Roe v. Wade to the fundamental right to vote is at stake, Judge Jackson will be a brilliant and critical voice on our nation's highest court. Yet Senate Republicans and GOP commentators like Tucker Carlson have stooped to baseless, despicable attacks in a desperate attempt to block her confirmation.
**Ahead of the final confirmation vote in the Senate, it's crucial for us to come together to send a clear message that we are standing behind Judge Jackson. I'm looking for 5,000 members of this team to join me in voicing your support by midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to be one of them.**

At a moment when everything from the future of Roe v. Wade to the fundamental right to vote is at stake, Judge Jackson will be a brilliant and critical voice on our nation's highest court. Yet Senate Republicans and GOP commentators like Tucker Carlson have stooped to baseless, despicable attacks in a desperate attempt to block her confirmation. Ahead of the final confirmation vote in the Senate, it's crucial for us to come together to send a clear message that we are standing behind Judge Jackson. I'm looking for 5,000 members of this team to join me in voicing your support by midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to be one of them. | | | Thank you for raising your voice, Kirsten | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. **Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM

---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain what's at stake in this year's midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can't break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That's why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that's why I'm coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday's end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won't sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That's why it's so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it'll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you're able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala

Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
