name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9856%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=mlK4XbOFacpUUgG1AnKGhw&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27401%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ynnRt2e72XNnt%2fyDQgLJJw&sysid=1)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** When it comes to prescription drugs, we all want affordability. But lower prices are meaningless if people can’t get the drugs they need in the first place. Unfortunately, Washington is looking to enact a government takeover of prescription drugs that will lead to drug rationing and leave you with less access to the drugs you need the most. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2beJOB07p7Ro0DBK%2basstg&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on8IeyYMVV%2fASdFvwWFqLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2beJOB07p7Ro0DBK%2basstg&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on8IeyYMVV%2fASdFvwWFqLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27404%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x8rakHuHMtRhcCHDGEOD9w&sysid=1)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2beJOB07p7Ro0DBK%2basstg&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on8IeyYMVV%2fASdFvwWFqLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2beJOB07p7Ro0DBK%2basstg&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on8IeyYMVV%2fASdFvwWFqLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Please take the 1-question survey right now and sign the open letter to lend your voice to the effort to stop a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet now. Thank you for all you do, --Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---

Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States

name: FALLEN OFFICER ALERT
subject: 2 More Tragedies claimed by the War on Cops
body:
Peter: Two Pennsylvania State Troopers were tragically killed by a 21-year-old drunk driver in a single incident weeks after she posted on social media that she was the **_" best drunk driver ever"._** State Troopers Branden T. Sisca, 29, and Martin F. Mack III, 33, were assisting a pedestrian on Interstate 95 when a car struck them. The driver of that car had been pulled over just prior to this incident, but that stop was cut short due to the report of the pedestrian requiring assistance. Mack joined the Pennsylvania State Police in 2014, and Sisca joined in February 2021. Both were assigned to the department's Troop K section in Philadelphia. Trooper Sisca is survived by his expectant wife and Trooper Mack leaves behind a wife and two children. **[That's why we are asking for you to help us today by supporting Trooper Sisca's and Trooper Mack's families as well as families of other fallen officers with a generous financial gift. It is our mission to support these families, especially in their greatest time of need.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055594:6jsawCoNI:m:1:3317145305:2701E0868EF3016E620E90DCC925C5B4:r "That’s why we are asking for you to help us today by
supporting Trooper Sisca’s and Trooper Mack’s families as well as families of other fallen officers with a generous financial gift. It is
our mission to support these families, especially in their greatest time of need.")** **[Any support is appreciated, but we ask for you to consider a gift in the amount of $25, $50, $100 or more.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055594:6jsawCoNI:m:1:3317145305:2701E0868EF3016E620E90DCC925C5B4:r "Any support is appreciated, but we ask for you to consider a gift
in the amount of $25, $50, $100 or more.")** Meanwhile, in Florida, a State Trooper was punched in the face during a traffic stop and in Salt Lake City, an officer was assaulted while making an arrest at an airport (the same one where another assault on an officer occurred just a few weeks ago). I'm heartbroken by the loss of our brave officers who serve their communities every day, and I'm outraged and sickened by the lack of respect for, and increase in assaults on, our men and women in Blue. **Make no mistake, all of these incidents are a result of policies led by politicians who have chosen to side with activists to demean and defund our police. These incidents are increasing exponentially due to the disrespect and lack of support for the law enforcement community.** **All of this must stop ...NOW!** And I pledge to you that we will continue our sacred duty and honor to never forget those officers who fall in the line of duty and to continue to provide for their families. The daily dangers faced by those who protect us are limitless and no one should ever forget or belittle their service. The National Fallen Officer Foundation exists to take care of the families of our brave fallen officers. We will NEVER place any restrictions on donations made to families. **578 officers died in the line of duty last year, and we 've already experienced 84 tragedies this year.** The families of Troopers Sisca and Mack have sacrificed enough, and as long as we have your support, we will do all we can to assist them. **[Please join us in supporting these families today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055594:6jsawCoNI:m:1:3317145305:2701E0868EF3016E620E90DCC925C5B4:r "Please

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Thank you for the support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Peter,

Leaving March behind, we successfully passed the final FEC deadline before voting begins, and I have supporters like you to thank. I’m humbled by and grateful for all your support, which has allowed me to work on your behalf in Congress.

In less than six months in office, I’ve brought substantial funding to Ohio, investing millions in our community resources and good-paying jobs. As one of my first votes, I supported the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, bringing millions in infrastructure dollars to Northeast Ohio. And I’m working every day to redefine justice for Black and brown Americans.

I wouldn’t be here without you! Thank you again for all your support.

The future is bright,

Shontel Brown

P.S. Early voting is underway, and I need your help turning out the vote. Will you donate just $5 today to help make it happen?

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sb-voteroutreach-em?refcode=EM_C_220406Thanks_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_PT
--------------------

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need?

DONATE WEEKLY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sb-recurring-em?refcode=EM_C_220406Thanks_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_PT

Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress

name: Michael Worley, Senior Digital Advisor
subject: Our best month EVER
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Hey Peter,

By now, you’ve probably heard the good news — that at the end of March, we hit our target to raise over $1 MILLION in online donations.

But today, I want to take a second to dive into some of these numbers, because — let me tell you — they’re impressive.

In March, our campaign:

✅ Received 4,570 online contributions— the most we’ve EVER received in a single month
✅ Had an average contribution of under $35
✅ Hit over $1 MILLION in online donations since we launched
✅ Had our BEST EVER month of online fundraising

Last week, I told you that the key to winning this race is smart, targeted engagement of communities across Florida. And these fundraising numbers prove that we’ve already built an incredible movement of Floridians who know that our state deserves better.

But we all know that DeSantis is ready to spend MILLIONS to stay in power. So it’s absolutely critical that we keep this momentum going this month and every month between now and November. Click here to make a donation and help us keep growing our grassroots strength. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=406recapmw]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=406recapmw] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=406recapmw] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=406recapmw] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=406recapmw] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=406recapmw] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-maprar-2022?refcode=406recapmw]

When we win this race, it’ll be because grassroots supporters like you stepped up, stood with us, and never gave up the fight.

Thank you for being on our team,

Michael Worley
Senior Digital Advisor

name: NextGen America
subject: UPDATE: Student loan payment pause extended until August 31
body:
| | Friend, **We’ve got some huge news for you: President Biden just extended the student loan payment pause until August 31, 2022.** This much-needed extension provides an immediate but temporary lifeline for Americans who are struggling to balance paying for food, housing, and health care during this time of economic uncertainty. Let’s make one thing clear: **This payment pause extension is because of the pressure and work from organizers and activists such as yourself.** You shared your stories, signed petitions, and showed up on the ground to ensure the payment pause would not end on May 1. And President Biden listened. Thanks to you, we’ve won a huge victory today, but our work is just beginning. **We’re going to ramp up this pressure and ensure President Biden makes this short-term relief permanent by canceling all federal student loan debt.** [Act now: Keep the pressure up by signing our petition to urge President Biden to take executive action and eliminate all federal student loan debt.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43834860/338916080/-1587301741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWNkNmQyMy1iOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDCdJMBC3pbwxQxbbMBmc9c1PY97IDQypevQBT5sZFs=&emci=3cbaba2a-1ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a9cd6d23-b8b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) There’s a lot going on in the world right now. By extending this payment pause, President Biden is providing comfort for thousands of families and helping lift the burden of student debt off the shoulders who need it most. **But he can do more.** By only temporarily extending the payment pause until August, President Biden is still leaving Americans with a feeling of uncertainty about their student loans. **We’re going to make sure President Biden continues to listen to us as we urge him to take his actions a step further and fully cancel all federal student loan debt. ** This payment pause extension proves that the Biden administration is listening to us, and they need to continue to hear from you. **[Join over 5,000 Americans by signing our petition to cancel all federal student loan debt.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43834861/338916081/1141581614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWNkNmQyMy1iOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDCdJMBC3pbwxQxbbMBmc9c1PY97IDQypevQBT5sZFs=&emci=3cbaba2a-1ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a9cd6d23-b8b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** Thank you for everything you do, NextGen America
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: our last public filing deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43834906/338916140/-2057546413?refcode=20220406_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzBjZTUyYi1iOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xrb6d1tDR-ERvth1jOUocOVhgt4CtjjYZ-Bl3toX0sI=) Folks, Here’s the honest truth: We had set some ambitious online fundraising goals for April—enough, in our estimation, to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and support our grassroots operation to win this election. But our fundraising numbers have slowed down quite a bit and now we’re way off-course. **Our pre-primary filing deadline is April 13th. I can’t overstate how important this moment is for our campaign—it’s the last time our fundraising numbers will go public before the general election kicks off in earnest.** So now, we’re at-risk of falling short on our goals right when it matters most—and we need your help. [**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America before our April 13th filing deadline? Anything you can contribute today to help us flip this seat will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43834907/338916141/2038802527?refcode=20220406_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzBjZTUyYi1iOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xrb6d1tDR-ERvth1jOUocOVhgt4CtjjYZ-Bl3toX0sI=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43834908/338916142/-2057546413?refcode=20220406_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzBjZTUyYi1iOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xrb6d1tDR-ERvth1jOUocOVhgt4CtjjYZ-Bl3toX0sI=)
We’re confident we can get our momentum back if enough of our supporters like you step up. But it’s okay if you can’t afford to donate today. A lot of families are facing financial hardship right now, and the most important thing you can do is take care of yourself and your loved ones. Thanks for everything. — Tim

clean_body: | | | = Folks, Here’s the honest truth: We had set some ambitious online fundraising goals for April—enough, in our estimation, to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and support our grassroots operation to win this election. But our fundraising numbers have slowed down quite a bit and now we’re way off-course. Our pre-primary filing deadline is April 13th. I can’t overstate how important this moment is for our campaign—it’s the last time our fundraising numbers will go public before the general election kicks off in earnest. So now, we’re at-risk of falling short on our goals right when it matters most—and we need your help. = = We’re confident we can get our momentum back if enough of our supporters like you step up. But it’s okay if you can’t afford to donate today. A lot of families are facing financial hardship right now, and the most important thing you can do is take care of yourself and your loved ones. **The Maryland State Education Association (MSEA) officially endorsed Wes and Aruna for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland.**
MSEA is the 76,000-member Maryland affiliate of the National Education Association, making it the largest teacher’s union in the state. This is an extremely coveted endorsement, because _every Democratic candidate in recent history who’s won it has gone on to win the party’s nomination._
What’s even more impressive is that Wes and Aruna won this endorsement with 85% of the vote, an overwhelming amount of support!
Wes and Aruna are ready to get to work on Day 1 to ensure Maryland has access to a world-class public education system for all, giving both students and teachers the resources they need to thrive.

# **Friend — Joe Biden’s regime is ending Title 42, which was put in place by President Trump during COVID to allow for quicker deportation of illegal immigrants. **

---
This is a HUGE mistake. Our southern border is already in crisis — a record number of illegal immigrants have tried to enter our country since Biden took office. Ending Title 42 would make the crisis even worse! **If you agree that we must keep Title 42 in place, then help me send Biden a message: SIGN my Title 42 petition now! **
---
[**KEEP TITLE 42: SIGN NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/181d10cdd3cc5017/813c5cb72d637fddc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Biden and the Democrats want open borders and sweeping amnesty. And evidently, they think kids should still be forced to wear masks on airplanes... but illegal immigrants should be free to enter America and stay. This insanity needs to end, and it needs to end now. **Demand accountability. Help me send Biden a message. SIGN your name now. **

subject: Bill McSwain Releases New Television Ads
body:
McSwain has launched two new ads on broadcast and cable. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/commonwealth-partners-endorses-bill-mcswain-for-governor-of-pa-8868676?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 6, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain releases new television ads
_Two new ads released Wednesday highlight McSwain as the best choice to defeat Josh Shapiro _
**West Chester, Pa. --** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Wednesday released two new television ads, the latest in a series of ads aimed at sharing his message of safety, security, and prosperity with Pennsylvania voters.

The two 30-second ads are airing on broadcast and cable across the Commonwealth. The first, entitled "Bill McSwain for Governor: Help Is On the Way", highlights McSwain's plan to be a pro-energy, pro-economic growth Governor, as well as McSwain's commitment to cutting the PA state gas tax by 50%:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=1aceaad581&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| The second ad, entitled "Don't Gamble for Governor: Vote Bill McSwain," explains that unlike career politicians Dave White, Doug Mastriano, and Lou Barletta, McSwain is a conservative outsider and U.S. Marine who will cut Pennsylvania's gas tax.
---
| The ad continues to explain that White, Mastriano, and Barletta have consistently worked against the best interests of conservatives while in office. This includes:
* Dave White raised property taxes by $20M while in office as a Delco Councilman and called a no tax increase pledge 'irresponsible'
* Doug Mastriano voted for the unconstitutional Act 77, which established no-excuse mail-in balloting
* Lou Barletta supported higher gas taxes

---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=3808ffdaf0&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Additional background on information included in McSwain's latest ad is as follows:
Dave White
* [Increased spending by $20.4 million, primarily on real estate taxes](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=5e0bf18178&e=b1ec95759b)
* [Accepted thousands from indicted liberal Democrat ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d46c6706b4&e=b1ec95759b)
* [Voted for 2.8% tax hike and called a 'No Tax Increase Pledge" irresponsible](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=738f53ca45&e=b1ec95759b)

Doug Mastriano
* [Voted for Act 77](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=8f8895e9ed&e=b1ec95759b)
* Consistently voted in favor of Tom Wolf's spending increases: [2019](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=c64e41738d&e=b1ec95759b), [2020](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0019ad9d8a&e=b1ec95759b) A, [2020](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=881d014aa6&e=b1ec95759b) B,[ 2021](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0fc3ea136f&e=b1ec95759b)

Lou Barletta
* [Advocated for the gas tax ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=4c60444f70&e=b1ec95759b)
* Consistently voted in favor of higher spending: HJRES 48 (2011); HJRES 11 (2012); HJRES 59 (2013); HR2775 (2013); HR 83 (2014); HR 3547 (2014)

###

name: Marine Corps Proud
subject: They support BLM, but trample on the 2A
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Peter: While the world is focused on what Biden has said about Ukraine and Russia, I want to remind you that he is ignoring a much larger-scale invasion on our nation's Southern Border. Over 2 million people have invaded our Southern Border and yet Biden still won't visit it. His lack of interest demonstrates that Biden doesn't care about America's safety. He's let our cities fall into disarray by kowtowing to BLM and Woke companies calling for Defund policies that have created a nationwide crime crisis. Now Biden is having these same corporations come after your 2nd Amendment rights. But I won't let it happen. **That 's why I authored Firearm Industry Non-Discrimination Act, to fight back against woke, boardroom gun control policies that improperly discriminate against gun manufacturers or retailers.** **[If you believe that Woke corporations need to be stopped from canceling our 2A RIGHTS while they embrace the BLM agenda, then please help me keep up the fight in Congress to protect our Rights with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055629:6TnX-CoNR:m:1:3317145305:1BB71ECB3DD7C59809100C42D74C06F6:r "If you believe that Woke corporations need to be stopped from
canceling our 2A RIGHTS while they embrace the BLM agenda, then please help me keep up the fight in Congress to protect our Rights with your donation
of $25, $50, or $100 today.")** You see, Biden and Pelosi aren't waiting on corporations to do their dirty work for them. In fact, Biden just released his budget proposal which includes even more gun control measures bent on eroding our 2A rights. **Like every Veteran who took an oath to uphold our Constitution, I 've fought hard to defend our right to bear arms, and after 40 years of protecting it, I'm not going to fail on my watch now.** I don't care if it's woke corporations, Biden, or Pelosi that's trying to take away our 2A rights. As long as I'm in Congress, I won't let them succeed! **[Can I count on you to help me fight back with your donation of $100, $250, or $500 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055629:6TnX-CoNR:m:1:3317145305:1BB71ECB3DD7C59809100C42D74C06F6:r "Can I count on you to help me fight back with your donation of
$100, $250, or $500 today?")** Biden may have lost sight of what it means to protect our country, but I haven't. I spent years defending our nation as a Marine and saw too many brave men and women give their lives to protect our Constitutional rights to let Biden and these liberals walk all over them. **[But if I'm going to stop Biden and these Woke Corporations, I need your support. If you believe in the 2nd Amendment, I need you to donate $500, $1,000, or any amount from $5 up to the Federal Maximum amount of $2,900 today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055629:6TnX-CoNR:m:1:3317145305:1BB71ECB3DD7C59809100C42D74C06F6:r "But if I’m going to stop Biden and these Woke Corporations,
I need your support. If you believe in the 2nd Amendment, I need you to donate $500, $1,000, or any amount from $5 up to the Federal Maximum amount
of $2,900 today.")** Biden and Pelosi are marching full steam ahead to weaken our 2nd Amendment rights. I'm pushing back against their attempts to take your right to bear arms and throw it in the garbage heap of history, but I need you by my side TODAY as we preserve and protect the 2nd Amendment for future generations of Americans. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055629:6TnX-CoNR:m:1:3317145305:1BB71ECB3DD7C59809100C42D74C06F6:r "Donate today.")** God Bless America,

Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. General, U.S.M.C. (ret.) | | [Protect Our 2nd Amendment Rights](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60055629:6TnX-CoNR:m:1:3317145305:1BB71ECB3DD7C59809100C42D74C06F6:r "Protect Our 2nd Amendment Rights")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Biden is destroying our military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

**Joe Biden's injecting critical race theory and woke gender pronoun training into the United States military.**

It's bad enough Joe Biden's cognitive impairment threatens American national security.

But now, Biden's weakening the most powerful military in human history by infusing woke ideology into military training.

Yesterday I grilled Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin about Joe Biden imposing wokeism on our troops.

**You can watch the video of me taking the fight to Lloyd Austin by[clicking here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT THE WOKE AGENDA
CHIP IN TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r) **After you watch the video, help me elect an America First majority that will support Donald Trump for Speaker and ban wokeism and critical race theory[by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r).**

Instead of formulating a strategy to combat the rise of Communist China, Joe Biden and Lloyd Austin want our troops reciting the tenants of socialism and critical race theory.

And instead of developing cutting-edge weapons systems to defend our nation Lloyd Austin demands our troops use the correct pronouns.

Enough is enough.

**It's time to fire Lloyd Austin and hold Joe Biden accountable for this disaster.**

I'm fighting to ban critical race theory in the U.S. military.

But I need help.

**[Join the fight to ban wokeism and critical theory in the U.S. military by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, pr $250 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r) **Lloyd Austin claimed the Taliban couldn't win.**

_Wrong._

Thirteen brave American troops paid the price for the incompetence in Afghanistan.

**Lloyd Austin claimed Russia couldn't lose.**

_Wrong._

Joe Biden and Llyod are failures that must be held accountable for damaging our military.

**[So please help elect an America First majority that will ban wokeism and critical race theory from the U.S. military by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59921001:WASliSHeN:m:1:2365227053:8F3E71D44436CADA911BFE0CACF8369A:r).** [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK

---
| | | | Friends, There is no sugar-coating this: The disaster at our southern border continues to be a humanitarian, national security, and public health crisis that must be stopped. And President Biden just announced his dangerous plans to make it **EVEN WORSE!** With ** _more than 100,000 attempts to breach our border PER MONTH_** in 2022 already, now the Biden Administration intends to repeal Title 42 in the coming weeks, giving those coming to our country illegally advance notice that they will no longer be stopped. This is more than a mess caused by Joe Biden’s weak border policies; it is a direct threat to our safety. More than 1.7 million illegal immigrants have been denied entry into our country since President Trump instituted Title 42 at the start of the pandemic.

name: Greg Landsman
subject: RE: Affordable Healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | Steve Chabot continues to vote against our children and families: He just voted against lowering the cost of insulin, a lifesaving drug.

I hear the same thing from working families over and over again:

Affordable healthcare is one of your main priorities.

**[_Which is why we need to retire Republican Congressman Steve Chabot._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43840993/338928739/1092196856?refcode=20220406_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzA2Yjg2Yi1iZWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KlzdgwfSi0H8DD0ebpjlbFBnWAUV2JyBczfA0dy-AM=)** **_[We have a historic shot to kick Chabot out of Congress, but I need to raise $840 before midnight to compete with his outside cash. Will you chip in $15 to help me build a campaign that can win? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43840994/338928740/1092196856?refcode=20220406_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzA2Yjg2Yi1iZWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KlzdgwfSi0H8DD0ebpjlbFBnWAUV2JyBczfA0dy-AM=)_** Millions of Americans spend about $5,000 per year on insulin alone.

Yet, my Republican opponent Steve Chabot just voted AGAINST capping the price of insulin -- a lifesaving drug.

Let me repeat that:

\-- Chabot voted against a bipartisan bill to lower costs and save lives.

\-- He voted to put Big Pharma profits over the lives of people in desperate need of care.

\-- To put it bluntly: He voted to trade your health and wellbeing for his political gain.

**[I’m outraged. We need to do everything we can to make sure Chabot NEVER gets to vote on our healthcare again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43840995/338928741/1092196856?refcode=20220406_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzA2Yjg2Yi1iZWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KlzdgwfSi0H8DD0ebpjlbFBnWAUV2JyBczfA0dy-AM=)**

| Fellow Patriot,

Thanks to your continued support, [we launched our first commercial ad on TV today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LPVRibKGcE_mz4-2ZyhRADLsja_T0UbAbh94GqdIuH02nv4Lt9WvUgSIBmCfq3OO-R8xweA_RDwNg-p2Tt6Esan1BB3eNdTdiAtGDVTuCNLzvEp_o8yChBhn9DnJbDlnN0fvDH2i-ou81r6KkVmJIvCq2i8WMM4k3nBJijRoLx6aJoJwLLZGbA==&c=lr1PBH2rBkTVO6DUmS22WZa-V9d_51Us023tnEBisnDPi9hjbaIdQw==&ch=EWpYG7mppYXkzdFeQIlBi27MGOoaOF4xV7WxWfpFjmLp74tFtWuq8Q==)
Herschel Walker was my childhood sports hero. But I also wore a uniform. I ran on the battlefield as a Navy SEAL, and now I'm running to defend America from Biden & Warnock's extreme agenda. You and I know this is not a game. It's a battle to secure America's future, and I'm ready to fight.
With the Republican primary election just 48 days away, it's time for the patriots of Georgia to make a choice: not only for who will fight for them in the United States Senate, but for who can defeat Raphael Warnock and his far-left machine. It's time to make a choice between a warfighter and a celebrity.
Today, we've become the first campaign in this race to launch our statewide TV ads so that voters across this great state know that they have a choice on primary day, between an experienced, next generation America First leader and a celebrity who refuses to debate. Please watch our ad "Battlefield" and share it with your family, friends, and neighbors. Join the fight so we can defeat Raphael Warnock and save our country.

With the Republican primary election just 48 days away, it's time for the patriots of Georgia to make a choice: not only for who will fight for them in the United States Senate, but for who can defeat Raphael Warnock and his far-left machine. It's time to make a choice between a warfighter and a celebrity. Today, we've become the first campaign in this race to launch our statewide TV ads so that voters across this great state know that they have a choice on primary day, between an experienced, next generation America First leader and a celebrity who refuses to debate. Please watch our ad "Battlefield" and share it with your family, friends, and neighbors. Join the fight so we can defeat Raphael Warnock and save our country. | == | == | Together, let's let every patriot in Georgia know that I'm the authentic America First candidate in this race who will defeat Raphael Warnock and fight for Georgia every day. == | == | | == | == | == | | | | Above all, thank you for all of the support that you've shown me as we work to take back our country. Please help us amplify our newest ad by following us on ==, ==, and ==. Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. NE, Suite A #288, Atlanta, GA 39319 | | Sent by mailto:info@lathamsaddler.com

Friend, this latest poll is great news for our campaign — but it’s also a stark reminder that Ron DeSantis and his backers are about to become completely focused on attacking our grassroots movement.

Here's why:

**FIRST:** A new poll showed me leading Ron DeSantis in a general election.

**THEN:** Gov. DeSantis went to the CPAC conference, where he _doubled down_ on his efforts to court far-right billionaires and shore up his position as a top contender for the 2024 Republican nomination. Without Trump on the ballot, **_61% of attendees picked DeSantis as their top choice for president._**

**NOW:** With all the pieces falling into place for Governor DeSantis’ planned presidential run, the only thing standing in his way is our campaign. And since polling shows our campaign has what it takes to defeat him, you can bet that he’s going to go all-in on taking us down.

**THAT MEANS: It’s up to us to put an end to Ron DeSantis’ presidential ambitions by capitalizing on our momentum and building the movement to defeat him.**

clean_body: Let me explain why: | | | | = = = Friend, this latest poll is great news for our campaign — but it’s also a stark reminder that Ron DeSantis and his backers are about to become completely focused on attacking our grassroots movement. Here's why: FIRST: A new poll showed me leading Ron DeSantis in a general election. THEN: Gov. DeSantis went to the CPAC conference, where he doubled down on his efforts to court far-right billionaires and shore up his position as a top contender for the 2024 Republican nomination. Without Trump on the ballot, 61% of attendees picked DeSantis as their top choice for president. NOW: With all the pieces falling into place for Governor DeSantis’ planned presidential run, the only thing standing in his way is our campaign. And since polling shows our campaign has what it takes to defeat him, you can bet that he’s going to go all-in on taking us down. THAT MEANS: It’s up to us to put an end to Ron DeSantis’ presidential ambitions by capitalizing on our momentum and building the movement to defeat him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. name: M. Lopez
subject: Arizona's abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS:
FAILED GOP GOVERNOR DOUG DUCEY SIGNS BILL THAT BANS MOST ABORTIONS AFTER 15 WEEKS**
---
**DONATE NOW to fight back against this assault on arizonans' rights and flip our state blue**
---
| | [RUSH A DONATION NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43842577/338936749/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk603-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVhNjU0ZS1jM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJNsuFokCccuteNUiHpLlRczh_pDQHAnmzgsHqAH7WQ=)
---
Friend, **this is an outrageous attack on reproductive freedom, and we cannot let it stand without a fight.**
Let's be crystal clear: This ban does not protect anyone's health or safety. It is an attack on reproductive freedom, keeping people from being able to make decisions for themselves and chart the course of their own lives. We also know it will primarily hurt women of color as well as low-income and rural women.
As governor, I will focus our time and resources on addressing the issues that affect _all_ Arizonans, like education, health care and jobs. **We need a governor who will bring people together behind commonsense solutions, not tear people apart with divisiveness, bigotry and hate. But I can't become governor – we can't flip Arizona blue – unless our team has the resources to fight the GOP machine. That's why I need your help now.**
**We set a rapid-response goal of raising $5,000 in the next 24 hours to fight back against the Arizona GOP's attack on abortion access and keep running _our_ race to defeat extremism.** **[But we're falling short and won't get there without you. Will you rush $5 or more right now to show we won't stand for GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43842578/338936750/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk603-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVhNjU0ZS1jM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJNsuFokCccuteNUiHpLlRczh_pDQHAnmzgsHqAH7WQ=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43842579/338936751/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk603-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVhNjU0ZS1jM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJNsuFokCccuteNUiHpLlRczh_pDQHAnmzgsHqAH7WQ=)

---
Thanks for fighting back,

Marco Lopez (D)
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. Let's be crystal clear: This ban does not protect anyone's health or safety. It is an attack on reproductive freedom, keeping people from being able to make decisions for themselves and chart the course of their own lives. We also know it will primarily hurt women of color as well as low-income and rural women. As governor, I will focus our time and resources on addressing the issues that affect all Arizonans, like education, health care and jobs. We need a governor who will bring people together behind commonsense solutions, not tear people apart with divisiveness, bigotry and hate. But I can't become governor – we can't flip Arizona blue – unless our team has the resources to fight the GOP machine. That's why I need your help now. name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medici
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmulefep7vjhkpik36t7i6purh312um098gm4758_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8dti6korctjkmcob2sjjc6oe9o5k69j32t34c5gm1or0sphn4s70c8pmbcji63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9hcup70phmcsqr2ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpbqrs9s2g05o1f0adphu5fvnmqfssmhl09gbjf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** When it comes to prescription drugs, we all want affordability. But lower prices are meaningless if people can’t get the drugs they need in the first place. Unfortunately, Washington is looking to enact a government takeover of prescription drugs that will lead to drug rationing and leave you with less access to the drugs you need the most. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk8rs3ou4tp6me839fb639bd8qv42hebfr5sgh6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpot7njluk4pqp61esorelq6l4c26m93ep98k568_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9q2b5rj0lf1dbdfqm9m330tq18608p8qlplradg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8384s4l2cic96lvpj7vqflmgs0dqn4cojvcu688_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk32k27lokea56k7thmceb8si6mm1gnbut7aj41o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zalue5rog6af847tj4tceaunort7nh3rg4fueaog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbc6g5ckrfoq80d04636087fhjf6rq3k8aa1bv68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh5p2ca5m2v04n39uhtte1m9smcdfb9jk5fjbcc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1m2t84ubqtipqb27fj7ruf5s1hrvfctc0ncd9h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
| | Please take the 1-question survey right now and sign the open letter to lend your voice to the effort to stop a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet now. Thank you for all you do, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8lv21gp2p871e259op71cb3o67r0ooedquir7d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zlt8ofmkc3mc4nie4f53tvq3v1g9155b0b0q3vq0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z40vf7r6711joh73o9o1b80ne2o1c3pvp88p0e8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9hm0o71c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter -

It's simple; men shouldn't be allowed to participate in women's sports.

The NCAA is undermining the integrity of female sports by allowing men to compete against women.

**_This organization is putting ideology ahead of opportunity and wokeness ahead of fairness._**

Without a doubt, men should compete against men, and women should compete against women.

[**Don't you agree?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=4aae689b430645ac9fe091464153635d&_e=3CU6NTRVu02zmbTlDM4M7YeTJf1vs3eoqbq-J2k8znPCHMkAgE2kxfIQ6QlLDbFQlqkBNe-67S_E7RK54Prycp3GYP8rreTW_rpDlnQUQyFcN-Y77_Ibv2CrJ4jjOVT_icCddc2c6vUYVwy_fsuaPEEgId_O3XqnB2TVKHDVcKGsBaWNDLUdxj4bm6of29fUQyDueXuAe9qeXofWrgYEciHaCysql-ELgb3XeqHjjmat573mX3cHRtov1nkzHWfBRb4gEmZDAgRlboO9LsibolMNj3dnowcNyFWABKk4Z3NAFXmYblYVi7f2yOmLHS1__xcbLxHyiOV9c08gvAqSlnKuk3x27KEWCMZcoq9PIvtNLAhHmLBsM8YdZefwqbouQMJbUTgvDJevzEKdHZPkcHKJB3X2doBYzCwd-cZlJDdMbmFL1kvJAds_DDiSBJeNjRN3URE5JTSgmgF4f4akB5Vb7WAmgG25Dsq9NCCtsMm3HOKPk9rojjJqfU1UgV7Biuff5Gj17DYjER536AIupgkqntg51-sUw9dy-GsmVnOmwOnV44JjOh9xOS9_dFp2CvXjEjSks3cW6QPKdxrQzzIP-a-Nt3f6J2V1W25n7-gOkOsi-GnORHREhSwDE7xJOA2aWzg_qBBML28V6ChkMw%3D%3D)

Female athletes train hard to become champions; we shouldn't allow men to take that away from them.

**Fair play and competition should always be upheld in sports and never replaced with woke ideologies.**

clean_body: Don't you agree? | Peter - It's simple; men shouldn't be allowed to participate in women's sports. The NCAA is undermining the integrity of female sports by allowing men to compete against women. This organization is putting ideology ahead of opportunity and wokeness ahead of fairness. Without a doubt, men should compete against men, and women should compete against women. Female athletes train hard to become champions; we shouldn't allow men to take that away from them. Fair play and competition should always be upheld in sports and never replaced with woke ideologies. Thanks, Amanda Makki Conservative Republican for FL-13 P.S. subject: 2 days before we gather. Are you ready?

body:
Dear Friend,

Are you ready? We're only two days away from the 13th annual Keystone Progress Summit -- Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit.

We are gathering to hear from our elected officials and candidates and from the community members and organizers so that we can pave a path forward to create a progressive PA. Join Keystone Progress and our 2022 KP Summit sponsoring partner, the ACLU of Pennsylvania.

This is a big deal. We are up against so much right now, and it is UP TO US to protect our rights.

Come to the summit on April 8-9. Register today. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040622]

- Congressman Jamie Raskin & Robert Borosage are keynotes
- U.S. Senate, PA Governor, and PA Lt. Governor candidate forums
- 2022 Special Recognition Award to the U.S. Capitol Police Force
- It's only a $20.22 (Get it, 2022?) suggested donation
- It's virtual, so no commute
- And we need you

The only way forward is to work together, so please register today. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040622]

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

name: Great America Update
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6868%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rbl9VP0mngixRlbnVZDjFQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wb1IPdTjGNAIcN2c978%2b9g&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60585%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=smkWbWR2k5CDVSfDcC2Wzw&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60586%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nEQ4%2fhWfSIK7O8exEozrVA&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60587%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iOmnnWe4kmyGWUGHSNfrtA&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60588%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c8ohww2ugOKeqkbACcCL%2bg&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6868%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rbl9VP0mngixRlbnVZDjFQ&sysid=1)_

The Midterm Elections are going to be close, Peter -- _too close_. And no state is more important (to both sides) than North Carolina.
If Republican Patriots win North Carolina, we’ll win the Majority and defend the accomplishments we made under President Trump’s leadership. But if we fall short, the Democrats will continue forcing us down the path of socialism.

body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
LAST CHANCE!
This is the last post card party of the primary! Come on out and join us as we make this final push!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/PostCardParty_April.jpg]
Hi Peter,
Join us for the final post card writing party! We have quite a few post cards to finish up before Early Voting! We'd love to have your help.
These have been great fun! We provide food, post cards, writing supplies - you provide your time and handwriting.
Request: If you'd like to contribute, please consider bringing post card stamps. These can be purchased at any U.S. Post Office in sheets of 20 or rolls of 100.
This is our final push to get our post cards written to be mailed just before Early Voting begins. I hope you can join us for this final, fun event!
Location:
Duke Memorial United Methodist Church
504 W. Chapel Hill St., Durham, NC
The Commons Room
(Park in the back parking lot and enter through the door at the green awning)
April 14th, 6pm - 9pm
LET US KNOW YOU CAN COME [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Post%20Card%20Party&body=Count%20me%20in%21]

body:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Who I'm endorsing in Los Angeles' mayoral race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Proudly standing with Karen Bass for Mayor.

Hey there —

As a proud Californian and representative of California's 45th congressional district, I've had the privilege to work alongside Karen Bass in Congress and in the communities we serve.

Karen isn't afraid to push for accountability from the powerful every single day. She fights for progress on behalf of working families, and she demands justice and equity on behalf of the people she represents.

**I'm proud to endorse Karen Bass for Mayor of Los Angeles.**

If there's one thing I know about Karen, it's this: **she does not give up.** Karen has been breaking down barriers her entire career. She is the leader Angelenos can count on to tackle once-in-a-generation problems with bold solutions — whether that be the climate crisis, homelessness, or economic inequality.

**[How much Karen's campaign raises right now will determine the investments the campaign makes in the weeks and months ahead. If you are in a place to donate, will you join me in supporting Karen today? Support her campaign to create a pathway to progress for every single Angeleno »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43845504/338950543/-1030761386?ms=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&refcode=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&source=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=9wwyZBZ%2BauucuS4YqSr7Y19TRzI%2FDpjJV8I%2FbDxKnVVC5is4q8XqGNtKajvUaxWG%2FeRQ%2FqRNMxYnfoZUmgij%2F9MR3K0REA%2F13O3R%2Fxesi0p6IJBEnq77EgzM1c0Ju5eyyqDI9L7F7JhsIw17ts%2Bdwg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmE0ZmZjOS1jZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2n9krjLRfZiBwRy_nf6lIO49pNvUfQCY8vd2IYiQrg=&emci=75c221f6-fdb4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=aba4ffc9-cdb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

L.A. is counting on its leaders to put people over profit and tackle poverty, the housing crisis, and a stagnant economy with solutions that won't leave anyone behind. **I know for a fact that Karen is that leader.**

Karen started as a community organizer in South Los Angeles. She's been a nurse and Physician Assistant, she served as the first-ever Black woman to be California's Speaker of the Assembly, and she's been a key voice in the work to rebuild our nation in the face of a deadly pandemic.

I've witnessed first-hand what Karen accomplishes on behalf of working people in Congress. I can't wait to watch her blaze a bold path forward toward recovery and equity for every single person living in L.A. That's why I'm asking for your help today.

**[Karen can't chart a path to victory without the help of grassroots supporters _just like you_. Pitch in whatever you can right away to help Karen take our movement for economic and social justice straight to City Hall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43845505/338950544/-1030761386?ms=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&refcode=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&source=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220405_endors_fndd_gq_act___KP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=9wwyZBZ%2BauucuS4YqSr7Y19TRzI%2FDpjJV8I%2FbDxKnVVC5is4q8XqGNtKajvUaxWG%2FeRQ%2FqRNMxYnfoZUmgij%2F9MR3K0REA%2F13O3R%2Fxesi0p6IJBEnq77EgzM1c0Ju5eyyqDI9L7F7JhsIw17ts%2Bdwg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmE0ZmZjOS1jZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2n9krjLRfZiBwRy_nf6lIO49pNvUfQCY8vd2IYiQrg=&emci=75c221f6-fdb4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=aba4ffc9-cdb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

Thanks,

Katie

Congresswoman Katie Porter (CA-45)

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

| | Growing up on the farm, there were a lot of hard days and early mornings. Honestly, some days I wanted to stay in bed. On those days my grandpa would say **"Chels no matter the job - big or small - do it right, or not at all."** To this day when I face a hard task, I remember my Pawpaw's lesson. I repeat it back to my kids the same way he'd say it when they need a reminder too.
---

clean_body: Donate to help Chelsea Get 'Er Done| | | = | | | Growing up on the farm, there were a lot of hard days and early mornings. Honestly, some days I wanted to stay in bed. On those days my grandpa would say "Chels no matter the job - big or small - do it right, or not at all." To this day when I face a hard task, I remember my Pawpaw's lesson. I repeat it back to my kids the same way he'd say it when they need a reminder too. = Sadly, this isn't a lesson Sec. Frank LaRose was taught. When asked to draw fair maps, LaRose said it was too hard. When ordered by the courts to draw fair maps, LaRose said it was impossible. When held accountable for his failures he said impeach the Chief Justice! I have the grit to do right by Ohioans, and I say let's get 'er done. We're quickly approaching our Primary Election which marks an important turning point. We are building the resources needed to get this done but need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will process automatically. = = = = Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Chelsea Clark | = Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. clean_body: Today we launched our first television ad. I hope that you will take a moment to watch! [] Dear Peter, Today we launched our first television ad. I hope that you will take a moment to watch! [] [] Watch Jennifer-Ruth Green's First TV Ad "Battle Proven" [] I’ve served this country and defended our values in uniform and in combat. Now, I’m ready to continue my service by defeating Frank Mrvan, helping retire Nancy Pelosi and putting an end to Biden’s failed economic policies, woke-ism and weakness that threatens America at home and abroad like never before. In Congress, I’ll fight for jobs, lower taxes, energy independence and fiscal responsibility while defending the Second Amendment, protecting life, and advancing President Trump’s successful America First policies. I hope that you will share this message with your family and friends and encourage fellow Republicans to join our team! Would you prayerfully consider donating to ensure this television ad continues to spread our message? Thank you, [] Jennifer-Ruth Green Republican for Congress (IN-01) DONATE NOW [] VOLUNTEER [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Jennifer-Ruth Green is a member of the Air Reserve Component of the U.S. Air Force. name: Team Cunningham
subject: Please fill out our survey to tell Joe about your top priorities→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| We’re proud to be running a people-powered, issues-focused campaign to improve the lives of South Carolinians.

Joe has already laid out his plans to increase teacher pay, protect voting rights, decriminalize marijuana, fight gun violence, and so much more, but now he needs to hear from you.

**[As we start the second quarter of the election year, can you fill us in on your top priorities? Hearing from supporters like you helps us make sure we’re addressing your most pressing issues. We need to hear from at least 1,000 people in the next 24 hours→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846388/338955262/-1668518145?source=JC_EM_EN_3MO_20220406_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_en_3mo_20220406_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjI1OWE2NS1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zhIZ5oqE5mxPNKjGWAgmB4mRdgUUeDiQZGf7Fo3pAM=&emci=12fb3fea-c4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f6259a65-d3b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18275523)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846390/338955264/-1668518145?source=JC_EM_EN_3MO_20220406_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_en_3mo_20220406_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjI1OWE2NS1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zhIZ5oqE5mxPNKjGWAgmB4mRdgUUeDiQZGf7Fo3pAM=&emci=12fb3fea-c4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f6259a65-d3b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18275523)
While McMaster is focused on pandering to his extremist base and dark-money donors, Joe is committed to addressing the most pressing issues facing South Carolinians.

**Whether it’s infrastructure, the economy, public education, or health care, Joe has always fought for you,_and always will._**

And now, with just months to go until Election Day, we need to hear from you to make sure we’re addressing your top priorities.

We have a clear path to victory, but only if we stay in the loop with what our supporters want.

**[Will you take two minutes to complete our April Priorities Survey to fill us in on the issues most important to you and your family? The survey closes in 24 hours, so please complete it now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846391/338955265/-1668518145?source=JC_EM_EN_3MO_20220406_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_en_3mo_20220406_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjI1OWE2NS1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zhIZ5oqE5mxPNKjGWAgmB4mRdgUUeDiQZGf7Fo3pAM=&emci=12fb3fea-c4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f6259a65-d3b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18275523)**

clean_body: | We’re proud to be running a people-powered, issues-focused campaign to improve the lives of South Carolinians. Joe has already laid out his plans to increase teacher pay, protect voting rights, decriminalize marijuana, fight gun violence, and so much more, but now he needs to hear from you. While McMaster is focused on pandering to his extremist base and dark-money donors, Joe is committed to addressing the most pressing issues facing South Carolinians. Whether it’s infrastructure, the economy, public education, or health care, Joe has always fought for you,and always will. And now, with just months to go until Election Day, we need to hear from you to make sure we’re addressing your top priorities. We have a clear path to victory, but only if we stay in the loop with what our supporters want. Hello,
I have absolutely terrific news.
After March 31st, we are required by federal law to file a report showing how much our campaign raised in the first three months of the year.
**Today, we filed that report, and I’m proud to announce that we raised $1.4 MILLION to defeat Chuck Grassley – more than any other candidate has reported during the entire campaign!**
Over 36,000 donors made more than 51,000 donations with an average gift of just $27. I’m especially proud that not one dime of what we raised came from corporate PACS or special interests. My campaign is 100% funded by people like you. **So thank you.**
We are going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue with a grassroots movement powered by people giving what they can, when they can.
The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. Now, we’re starting 2022 with the resources to do it.
**Senate control is at stake here in Iowa.** Of course, Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already circling. The numbers we announced today are going to send shockwaves through Washington, but they also mean some right-wing billionaire is getting ready to sign another check to attack me with lie-filled ads.
[**The only way to fight back and win is with the continued support of people like you. Please, if you’re able, may I count on you to give now to my campaign – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846924/338957012/-42398318?refcode=em20220406mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWQwOGU1Zi1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U8Edh33k3AxVjaAC-5GYpa8O4usyoluEedWoZOAR1EA=)

clean_body: Hello, I have absolutely terrific news. After March 31st, we are required by federal law to file a report showing how much our campaign raised in the first three months of the year. Today, we filed that report, and I’m proud to announce that we raised $1.4 MILLION to defeat Chuck Grassley – more than any other candidate has reported during the entire campaign! Over 36,000 donors made more than 51,000 donations with an average gift of just $27. I’m especially proud that not one dime of what we raised came from corporate PACS or special interests. My campaign is 100% funded by people like you. So thank you. We are going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue with a grassroots movement powered by people giving what they can, when they can. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. Now, we’re starting 2022 with the resources to do it. Senate control is at stake here in Iowa. Of course, Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already circling. The numbers we announced today are going to send shockwaves through Washington, but they also mean some right-wing billionaire is getting ready to sign another check to attack me with lie-filled ads. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We have come too far to let up or stop now. Thank you for carrying this campaign to the finish line. Iowa needs it; the nation needs it. “All engines ahead full!” Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) subject: Breaking: MAJOR Endorsement
body:
Former Illinois State Representative Jeanne Ives has endorsed our campaign for Congress. Jeanne knows that our campaign has a winning message | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=669fc6fd73&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | _**BREAKING: Jeanne Ives Endorses Jerry Evans to Represent Illinois' 11th Congressional District**_
Friend,
Our campaign just received a MASSIVE endorsement from former state representative Jeanne Ives.

Jeanne has been a champion for Illinois and conservative values for decades, and it is truly an honor to have her support.

Read Jeanne Ives' full endorsement here:
---
| [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=4fba341b71&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| Just like Jeanne Ives, I promise to be a fighter and a WINNER for Illinois.

If you'd like to join Jeanne in supporting our campaign, [you can contribute $10 or more today. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=e2ee93c0fe&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate for Congress, (IL-11)

---
| [JOIN TEAM JERRY](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=abd15c0c33&e=b78e7c4d40 "JOIN TEAM JERRY")
---
|

Jerry Evans for Congress

body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=481d8ca21d&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
---
| Friends,

It’s been one year since I formally announced my candidacy for State Representative of the 182nd District.

It was an honor to stand there surrounded by a coalition of friends and supporters who truly reflect the diversity of this district. Since that day in April 2021, I have spent each day speaking with residents, businesses, and other elected officials about pragmatic progressive solutions to improve our lives, our city, and our state.

Now, with less than six weeks left until election day, I sincerely hope I have earned your vote and your support.

I invite you to reach out to me at [info@dejaforpa.com](mailto:info@dejaforpa.com) with your questions and concerns – I am here to listen.

[_If I have earned your support, please make a donation to our campaign to help get us over the finish line May 17._](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=2a5da698ce&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

_Deja_

| | | **Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy** We’ve got some new swagger in our swag.

**Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy.**

House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b21a05e775&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=541c480bca&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

clean_body: Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | | | Friends, It’s been one year since I formally announced my candidacy for State Representative of the 182nd District. It was an honor to stand there surrounded by a coalition of friends and supporters who truly reflect the diversity of this district. Since that day in April 2021, I have spent each day speaking with residents, businesses, and other elected officials about pragmatic progressive solutions to improve our lives, our city, and our state. Now, with less than six weeks left until election day, I sincerely hope I have earned your vote and your support. I invite you to reach out to me at mailto:info@dejaforpa.com with your questions and concerns – I am here to listen. Deja | | | Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy We’ve got some new swagger in our swag. Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy. Check out our for stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign! | | | | Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2021 Paid for by DEJA FOR PA Our mailing address is: DEJA FOR PA PO BOX 63953 PHILADELPHIA, PA 19147 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Your turn to chip in $3
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If you don’t read, if you don’t donate — Mark won’t hold this seat.
#

Friends —
Since Mark Kelly announced his first campaign for Senate, 982,613 people have donated to help elect him.
Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
You don’t have to give to every email we send — and we don’t expect you to. But the only way this works is if people chip in a few bucks when they can to help Mark Kelly defend this seat.
Because there is no greater source of donations we receive than these emails. It’s a little crazy to think about, but it’s why the response to these messages is so important.
Because if you don’t read, if you don’t donate — Mark won’t hold this seat. Know what happens then? Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
So, please:
[**Can you contribute $3 to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? Make your first donation so Mark can defend this seat in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220406-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2529_6688874_XORgNj&akid=2529%2E6688874%2EXORgNj)

name: Lombardo for Governor
subject: We need real leaders - not weak ones.
body:
Steve Sisolak is playing follow the leader with Gavin Newsom...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGL53Ngx46F105gxPUiNUm0JRhPcLPgO2Aw3YVPOWB8c-Ao0TPEYntefA8BCAOWmGf4pbp4HW4uGPys5QrGh6TR0XWzFXD0DupLMGhHCt2MRkDmjL4ofIv6cj6Ie0aLbZtJWvd5jRLxF2inYvXY6b_yejkSzfSCP0I7XfdaU5uTZTLHSVZCKNUAy4r-asY9-L1pofzQETiGK8DK-VJmrE-_QRePzRQc_&c=eQZvC38pyn401uPY4mxfWnykj5HzH4GZtT7BDYCMNWOErhl4optlow==&ch=8BVCq34mgNruC5UFo-rZ5M3bNnh_xHb0bFCBtDzeeRsV10bk0YZssQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Steve Sisolak is playing follow the leader with Gavin Newsom...
Joe Biden is doing nothing about record inflation and gas prices while his poll numbers continue to fall...
And all of this is leaving Nevadans with just one question: Where are the REAL leaders who will get our state and our country back on track?
Luckily, we have one in the Governor race this year in Sheriff Joe Lombardo. As someone who's kept our communities safe in law enforcement for over 30 years after serving in the Army, National Guard, and Army reserve, Joe has the experience and the REAL leadership Nevadans can trust.
---
| | | [SUPPORT HIS CAMPAIGN! CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGL53Ngx46F105gxPUiNUm0JRhPcLPgO2Aw3YVPOWB8c-Ao0TPEYntefA8BCAOWmGf4pbp4HW4uGPys5QrGh6TR0XWzFXD0DupLMGhHCt2MRkDmjL4ofIv6cj6Ie0aLbZtJWvd5jRLxF2inYvXY6b_yejkSzfSCP0I7XfdaU5uTZTLHSVZCKNUAy4r-asY9-L1pofzQETiGK8DK-VJmrE-_QRePzRQc_&c=eQZvC38pyn401uPY4mxfWnykj5HzH4GZtT7BDYCMNWOErhl4optlow==&ch=8BVCq34mgNruC5UFo-rZ5M3bNnh_xHb0bFCBtDzeeRsV10bk0YZssQ==)
---
| Joe won't follow the far-left policies of California that lead to lawlessness and lockdowns.
Instead, Sheriff Joe will do what he's always done - protect our communities, our rights, and our way of life.
Things are trending in a positive direction for our campaign right now, too. Even according to a Democrat poll, Joe is LEADING Steve Sisolak by 3 points!
This could be a can't-miss opportunity to stop failed, weak, single-party Democrat leadership from ruining the state of Nevada permanently.
[Will you help us keep up the momentum?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGL53Ngx46F105gxPUiNUm0JRhPcLPgO2Aw3YVPOWB8c-Ao0TPEYntefA8BCAOWmGf4pbp4HW4uGPys5QrGh6TR0XWzFXD0DupLMGhHCt2MRkDmjL4ofIv6cj6Ie0aLbZtJWvd5jRLxF2inYvXY6b_yejkSzfSCP0I7XfdaU5uTZTLHSVZCKNUAy4r-asY9-L1pofzQETiGK8DK-VJmrE-_QRePzRQc_&c=eQZvC38pyn401uPY4mxfWnykj5HzH4GZtT7BDYCMNWOErhl4optlow==&ch=8BVCq34mgNruC5UFo-rZ5M3bNnh_xHb0bFCBtDzeeRsV10bk0YZssQ==)
