name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Early Voting Has Started
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011w8kLN_Krdn9OscR0vEhRcwbxRe3qeGTPNB7HKt9WhNHOZz8t1VbnVy2Ox4viYzNmEcqv1KUp5HCYUtQyzPguEWqy1szUpQ6laIFW9Dq1Qlmcpobk7FOaqnUl2L3iY3Z1-jarv109o5mZ5-zPi-bR2eOda-b4MR2bVlwN-5OC5l3H5cumeBASA==&c=T8A62sOjBUdkxmwBItF_epLsU4edJm0h7N2WHq0Ivk8bmMU7rdkBvg==&ch=AcOPU2oHdb4YuZ2VEPcfOsNeBtLUSUeUUjYBIxrBsuZ8HFXPZUwg9g==)
---
| Hello from #TeamGibbons!
It's already April and we have some exciting news.
We have officially completed our 88 county bus tour across Ohio with under one month until the primary election. The bus tour began in January with the goal of reaching as many voters as possible in both urban and rural Ohio communities through local events, meet & greets and small business stops.
We have successfully completed our goal and will continue to campaign across the state and take our message directly to voters during the last three weeks!
---
|
---
| Early voting has officially started with just 27 days left until the primary election. Make sure you know where your local voting location is and remember to vote Mike Gibbons for U.S. Senate.
I believe in America First principles and want to fight for our shared conservative values in Washington. I've had enough of sitting on the sidelines and allowing the Democrats to ruin our great nation. The 2022 elections are going to play a critical role in the future of our country and I hope you will help be a part of the positive change.
---
|
---
| In other exciting news, our veterans coalition has had a great response from people around the state and it continues to gain more support! My son, Ryan, is a Navy pilot currently deployed overseas and my daughter-in-law flies F-18s for the Navy as well. I know full well the sacrifice of our men and women in uniform and their families.
If you stand with veterans and support my campaign, [click here to show your support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011w8kLN_Krdn9OscR0vEhRcwbxRe3qeGTPNB7HKt9WhNHOZz8t1VbnayRh0jLiyR4KulbTDvIXt-egYK0RNLJIjdcxudWnXSMVCge1uzyoKHhzCW5I_zq7kww9XBduruVoSnic3rzihy_8oIz6B5YjOW3gPxGzunqXho57wIjjWY=&c=T8A62sOjBUdkxmwBItF_epLsU4edJm0h7N2WHq0Ivk8bmMU7rdkBvg==&ch=AcOPU2oHdb4YuZ2VEPcfOsNeBtLUSUeUUjYBIxrBsuZ8HFXPZUwg9g==).
---

clean_body: Check out our weekly newsletter... | | | | | | == | Hello from #TeamGibbons! It's already April and we have some exciting news. We have officially completed our 88 county bus tour across Ohio with under one month until the primary election. The bus tour began in January with the goal of reaching as many voters as possible in both urban and rural Ohio communities through local events, meet & greets and small business stops. We have successfully completed our goal and will continue to campaign across the state and take our message directly to voters during the last three weeks! | | Early voting has officially started with just 27 days left until the primary election. Make sure you know where your local voting location is and remember to vote Mike Gibbons for U.S. Senate. I believe in America First principles and want to fight for our shared conservative values in Washington. I've had enough of sitting on the sidelines and allowing the Democrats to ruin our great nation. The 2022 elections are going to play a critical role in the future of our country and I hope you will help be a part of the positive change. | | In other exciting news, our veterans coalition has had a great response from people around the state and it continues to gain more support! My son, Ryan, is a Navy pilot currently deployed overseas and my daughter-in-law flies F-18s for the Navy as well. I know full well the sacrifice of our men and women in uniform and their families. If you stand with veterans and support my campaign, ==. | | | | == | == | Our campaign is in a great spot heading into the last few weeks thanks to our strong grassroots outreach and we are ready to win! If you are interested in volunteering for #TeamGibbons, please sign up below and we will get in contact with you. Don't forget to also sign up for a yard sign to share your support for in your local community. | | | == | | | | If you have any questions or want to get involved, email us at info@gibbonsforohio.com. We are excited for the final sprint of the race and are so grateful for all your support. | Sincerely, Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | == == == | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 14500 Lorain Ave #110644, Cleveland, OH 44111 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

name: John King
subject: Our legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
From investing in equitable schools to combating climate change, I pledge to serve for the generations to come.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43848263/338963234/-1597515454?source=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220406&utm_content=b1_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&amount=25&refcode2=3f67581a-dab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY3NTgxYS1kYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSVDJPj3M_N-13PrEzQyovTq-xBGW8s-HVzW61FIoaA=)
---
| Peter, Recently I've been thinking about the kind of legacy I want to leave as Maryland's next governor and the legacies of trailblazers before me. My own family is a family of firsts, going back to 1894 when my grandmother was one of the earliest graduates of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. It was her perseverance and the power of education that allowed me to serve in the cabinet of the nation's first Black president just three generations after my family was enslaved in this very state. In 2019, I was humbled and honored to give the commencement speech at the same university my grandmother attended all those years ago. The message I told the graduating class is the same one that will guide me as Maryland's next governor, and I wanted to share it with you: Ultimately, our obligation is to live for the generations ahead of us. That's what it really means to be worthy of the legacy of those who came before us. I hope you'll be the kind of people who give back, who lift as you climb, and who help our nation become what it can be. Just remember, when the light of opportunity shines on you, you have the chance to make those who came before you proud by expanding the reach of its glow. I often point out that I was the first Secretary of Education to be kicked out of high school. Like many kids who have experienced trauma, I struggled after losing both of my parents and got in a lot of trouble. I was lucky enough to have incredible teachers who gave me a second chance at opportunity after both my parents passed away, and as a lifelong educator, I've made it my mission to extend that same branch of opportunity to every kid in every school in every zip code. Whether it's investing in equitable schools or combating climate change, my pledge to you is to serve for the generations to come. _**[Peter, will you join my campaign to forge a more just and equitable future for Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43848264/338963235/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220406&utm_content=b1_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&amount=25&refcode2=3f67581a-dab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY3NTgxYS1kYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSVDJPj3M_N-13PrEzQyovTq-xBGW8s-HVzW61FIoaA=)**_ | | **[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43848265/338963236/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220406-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220406&utm_content=b1_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&amount=25&refcode2=3f67581a-dab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY3NTgxYS1kYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSVDJPj3M_N-13PrEzQyovTq-xBGW8s-HVzW61FIoaA=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: Democratic Governors Association on “The Big Lie”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Are they referring to Hunter Biden’s laptop? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7074813?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=7c945e4e08&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| My fellow New Mexico GOP gubernatorial candidates and I were recently chastised for _“embracing Donald Trump’s conspiracy theories with open arms”_ while we _“parade around touting lies”_ isolating ourselves from _“the issues New Mexicans care about - creating better schools, lowering prices, and making communities safer.”_

**Au contraire! As for myself, it is precisely because of issues such as indoctrination in our schools, rising costs from inflation, skyrocketing crime, and the crisis at the southern border, that I’m committing to serve as your Governor!**

As for the gaslighting that revolves around the rhetoric of **The Big Lie** , I stand by my words:**I support anyone who wants to do an audit. I would think that even the declared winners would want to assure the public we have election integrity!**
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=fa44e41f41&e=102b599530)
---
| **Perhaps The Big Lie should refer to the collusion between Big Tech, the intelligence industrial complex, and corrupt politicians who suppressed the findings of Hunter Biden’s laptop reported AND suppressed just weeks before the 2020 Presidential election, _and only begrudgingly acknowledged as legit recently. _**
A recent Rasmussen poll revealed that **66%** of Americans believe the Hunter Biden story is important, and **48%** say it is very important. In another poll of Biden voters in key swing states, **10%** reported that awareness of the Hunter Biden story _would have changed their vote. _

**Representative Darrell Issa stated that the suppression of the Hunter Biden laptop just weeks before Election Day likely changed its outcome.** As Radical Left Democrats continue to gaslight the country with **The Big Lie,** it is more important than ever to unite in support of America First candidates _who will investigate_ the historical collusion that a majority of Americans are concerned about.

**As your next Governor,** _I will do everything in my power_ to restore faith in our elections while upholding the right of the people to conduct forensic audits.**Elections belong to the people,** and the gaslighting is failing to maintain the Radical Left narrative that concerned citizens are just hysterical conspiracy theorists!

Your support**in a donation of any amount today** will show corrupt politicians that New Mexicans _**are**_ concerned about the sanctity of their vote, and will **only** put their faith in public servants who are committed to restoring election integrity!
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: This is why we need more debates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Last Friday's debate revealed critical differences among the candidates | | | |
---
| | |
# **This is why we need more debates.**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Last Friday’s [debate](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=0261149de1&e=1090c5c412) revealed critical differences among the three congressional candidates for PA-7.

Susan Wild is a vulnerable incumbent who has aligned herself with far-left progressives in Washington. Despite her incessant assertions, nobody believes she’s either bipartisan or independent. Susan Wild talks like a moderate in Allentown but votes like a liberal in Washington. The ruse is up.

Lisa Scheller is a compromised candidate who’s partnering with leaders of the Chinese Communist Party to grow her business ([www.asklisascheller.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3b1ee4c559&e=1090c5c412)). As promised, I pressed her on her ties to China and she consistently refused to provide any details about her relationship to the Chinese government. She threw her support behind banning Members of Congress from owning stocks in U.S. companies, but defended herself owning factories in China. She also refuses to have any more debates. After Friday’s debacle, we can understand why.

I am a veteran, a small business owner, and a family man. I’ve had enough of politicians from both parties trying to manipulate me, and I think you have too.

I’m running for office to defeat Susan Wild. But I’m also running to expose hypocrisy. Partnering with communists is just plain wrong, and so is anyone -- Democrat or Republican -- who defends it.

The establishment playbook says that ordinary people like you and me should go away and let the enlightened elites take care of everything. We don't have to accept that. That's what progressives do. It's not supposed to be that way with Republicans.

I have proposed specific policies for Safe Communities, Good Jobs, and Strong Families. They’re summarized on the [Issues](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8c72712613&e=1090c5c412) page of my website and elaborated upon in my [Blog](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b48ec35d13&e=1090c5c412). Please take some time to explore the important subjects that I intend to tackle in Congress. You can contact me [here](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com) if you have any questions.

Susan Wild cannot stay in power and is poised for defeat. But nobody -- Republican, Democrat, or Independent -- wants their leaders partnering with China. Electing Lisa Scheller as the Republican standard-bearer will result in victory for the Democrats.

Please help me win this election and Keep America Free.

Sincerely,

---

---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| Susan Wild is a leading advocate for abortion in the U.S. Congress.

Lisa Scheller is on the record opposing the Constitutional Life Amendment and supporting the RU486 abortion pill. She also said she would vote to allow abortions if the health of the mother is in question, but her life is not in danger.

I have a 100% rating from the PA Pro-Life Federation PAC. I understand that our U.S. Constitution exists to protect life, and that an unborn child is the weakest and most vulnerable human life among us. In Congress, I will work to protect and defend all unborn children. I also will promote policies that help expectant mothers, support fatherhood, and encourage young parents.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e57d0535e8&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| Susan Wild recently blamed American oil companies for inflation. Previously, she blamed COVID-19. She doesn’t acknowledge that flooding the U.S. economy with $2 trillion in new federal spending while targeting the domestic energy industry and paying people not to work is precisely why we have the highest inflation in fifty years.

Lisa Scheller says she’s a fighter for Pennsylvania, but her track record says otherwise. Since taking over the family business, she’s closed two U.S. factories and eliminated 50% of her American workforce. Meanwhile, she’s already got one factory in China and is building another, and she’s increased her foreign workforce by a factor of seven.

I'm a 17-year small business owner who started my company in the basement of my home. I don't outsource jobs overseas. In Congress, I will work to get federal spending under control and pass a balanced budget amendment. I want to unleash American energy producers and tackle the federal bureaucracy. I support training more people in the trades and local jobs for local workers.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1da17a4a9a&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")

---
| Susan Wild sits on the House Foreign Affairs Committee but has done nothing to hold the Biden Administration accountable for the debacle in Afghanistan, appeasement with Iran, or Hunter Biden’s deals with China. She is more concerned about spreading woke policies around the world and discussing climate change than facing down real threats from aggressive foreign powers.

Lisa Scheller is cutting deals with communists to protect her business interests in China. If she wins the primary, Susan Wild’s vulnerabilities on national security will be overshadowed by Lisa Scheller’s liabilities on China. No Member of Congress should be voting on national security matters in Washington while she’s opening a new factory in China.

I'm a 26-year military veteran with four combat-zone deployments. I'm a graduate of Air War College with a master’s degree in Military Operational Arts and Sciences. I'm trusted with our nation’s secrets and have experience as a military intelligence officer. In Congress, I will stand up to China, upgrade our military, and improve our cybersecurity. I’ll also work to secure our borders and defend our police.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Drain the Swamp
body:
---
| | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital.

What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it.

The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people.

What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness.

There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians.

The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control.

For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach.
|
---
| | |
---

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us!

All hands on deck this week preparing the the all-important vote this Friday in Colorado Springs.

Erik has been getting great response from Delegates he's spoken with and he is eager to take The Stage and address the Assembly Friday morning.

In addition to the push, Erik worked in an appearance in Fairplay at the Rocky Mountain Cigar Company for the Candidates Forum. His message was very well received.

Erik spoke on Sunday to an enthusiastic crowd at the Colorado Red Wave rally produced by Danielle Neuschwanger (Candidate for Colorado Governor) and hosted by Bandimere Speedway in Morrison.

Saturday, Erik addressed CD7 Delegates in Arvada at Malone's Clubhouse Grill. After Erik's formal words and lots of one-on-one conversation, several folks stepped up to join Team Aadland Volunteers.
| | |
---
| Quote of The Week
---
"There is nothing to be gained by adding more hatred or vitriol. I'm going to win this race with honor and integrity and character. And the voters are going to see that. If they don't then they're not going to elect me. But I don't think we are going to win by spewing more hatred. We need less of that."
* -Erik Aadland on facing slimy campaigning from Democrats

---
| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

clean_body: | | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022 | | A Word From Erik | | | ---|--- | In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital. What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it. The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people. What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness. There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians. The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control. For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach. | | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us! All hands on deck this week preparing the the all-important vote this Friday in Colorado Springs. Erik has been getting great response from Delegates he's spoken with and he is eager to take The Stage and address the Assembly Friday morning. In addition to the push, Erik worked in an appearance in Fairplay at the Rocky Mountain Cigar Company for the Candidates Forum. His message was very well received. Erik spoke on Sunday to an enthusiastic crowd at the Colorado Red Wave rally produced by Danielle Neuschwanger (Candidate for Colorado Governor) and hosted by Bandimere Speedway in Morrison. Saturday, Erik addressed CD7 Delegates in Arvada at Malone's Clubhouse Grill. After Erik's formal words and lots of one-on-one conversation, several folks stepped up to join Team Aadland Volunteers. | | | | Quote of The Week "There is nothing to be gained by adding more hatred or vitriol. I'm going to win this race with honor and integrity and character. And the voters are going to see that. If they don't then they're not going to elect me. But I don't think we are going to win by spewing more hatred. We need less of that." * -Erik Aadland on facing slimy campaigning from Democrats | A True Grass-Roots Campaign | Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff | | | | == | Upcoming Events | Erik Aadland Hospitality Room Thursday April 7th 6:00PM Erik, family and staff will host a Hospitality Room at the Doubletree Hotel in advance of the Congressional Assembly. We will be in the King Presidential Suite (Room 545) from 6:00 to 9:00PM on Thursday Apr 7th. Join us for friendship and fun conservative conversation The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | == | | | CD7 Assembly begins! Friday Apr 8th 9:30AM The event we've been working toward, Assembly Begins! Registration and check-in begin at 9:30AM and the event gets officially underway at 11:30 in the Grand Ballroom of the Doubletree Hotel in Colorado Springs. You must be a CD7 Delegate to attend this event The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | Colorado Republican Committee Centennial Dinner Friday Apr 8th 6:00PM The Colorado Republican Committee presents the Centennial Dinner at the Doubletree Hotel in Colorado Springs. Tickets are $140 per person The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | Colorado Republican State Assembly Saturday Apr 9th 9:00AM The Republican State Assembly begins Saturday morning in the World Arena in Colorado Springs. Check-in and credentialing begins at 7:00AM. The Assembly and Convention will convene at 9:00AM to designate Republican candidates for Governor, Secretary of State, Treasurer, Attorney General and U.S. Senate primary candidates. You must be a State Delegate to attend this event World Arena is at 3185 Venetucci Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by

Derek, This week New Hampshire Senate Republicans introduced a $109 million dollar tax relief package that is designed to directly lower property taxes for individuals.[

](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbNPoFmfnweQUDdzO7H_2nKVFM_eLwAy0F_0WPZwwW8WRA&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=2)[](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbN8VpbX8uCSwVng0pXaveQ5V090UwaiOfNGL0_Uq9-PyQ&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=3)[](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbN8VpbX8uCSwVng0pXaveQ5V090UwaiOfNGL0_Uq9-PyQ&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=4) [](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbNPoFmfnweQUDdzO7H_2nKVFM_eLwAy0F_0WPZwwW8WRA&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=5) New Hampshire Republicans Senators are working tirelessly to give back to the people of New Hampshire. It is [**OUR JOB**](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbNPoFmfnweQUDdzO7H_2nKVFM_eLwAy0F_0WPZwwW8WRA&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=6) to help them get re-elected and build upon the majority. Can we count on you to help? In 2022 we are at risk of losing the ability to give back to the hard working taxpayers in the Granite State. Without your support [**NOW**](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbNPoFmfnweQUDdzO7H_2nKVFM_eLwAy0F_0WPZwwW8WRA&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmail_new_4_6&n=7) we cannot continue the necessary work to keep our majority in the Senate. If we lose the Republican majority we lose the ability to keep the radical left’s agenda out of New Hampshire! clean_body: My friend, This email is very important. I am encouraging you to VOTE EARLY. This race needs to be about Ohio. Since the start of this campaign, I have sought to directly address the challenges that impact Ohio and offer a concrete set of conservative policy solutions that protect and expand personal freedom, empower job creation, protect Life and build a stronger America. You have supported that vision with your time, treasure, and your voice. For that, I am grateful. Now we must marshal our efforts and these resources to GET OUT THE VOTE. Voting early as never been easier. You can vote this month, in-person in your home county. If you need more information about how or where to do so, please visit: You can also to download your absentee ballot application, follow the instructions and have a ballot mailed to your home. If you have additional questions, you can also call the office of the Ohio Secretary of State at (877) SOS.OHIO (877.767.6446). This Republican Primary carries the potential to shape the future of our state and nation. Our nominee must possess the conservative record to get results for Ohio. We must stop Joe Biden’s failed agenda, retake the U.S. Senate and get American back on the right track. Thank you for all you and I would be honored to receive your early vote! Sincerely, Matt Dolan P.S. I am proud of our Ohio-focused campaign and our work to elevate the issues that directly impact our state and nation. Could you help us get out the vote with a donation today?

Republicans are tough, and with a House majority, we’ll have the numbers to bring back American strength and stand up to enemies like Putin once and for all. _But we can’t rebuild our majority without your help._ **[If you want to make America STRONG again, pitch in now and help us build a Republican majority that ISN’T AFRAID of Vladimir Putin. >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z546tufrhhp2vklgmulq8eiak6gpor6gdbamf8h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9jm8or4c3h2bs)** Thank you, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhcj3i0uqur59uvfoohkere1qa2r0b79d5h53708_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s9jm8or4c3h2bs) Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia

name: Giffords
subject: Can it happen to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How likely do you think it is that you will experience a mass shooting at some point in your life?
#

Friends -
Years ago after mass shootings, we used to hear people saying, “I just never thought it could happen to me.”
Things have changed...
Now after mass shootings, you may hear kids and adults say the opposite—that they aren’t entirely surprised it happened to them. It’s quite a shift, and we wanted to see where you stand.
So today we want to ask you:
[**Can you use this link to take our quick survey letting Giffords know how likely you think it is that you or a loved one will experience a mass shooting at some point in your life?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/happen_survey?source=em220406-1-15&t=1&akid=1784%2E3935704%2E-k7fSl)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/happen_survey?source=em220406-1-15&t=2&akid=1784%2E3935704%2E-k7fSl)**
We’re very interested in your response to this survey. So please take a minute to share your thoughts today.
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1784%2E3935704%2E-k7fSl) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Fox News called Ukrainian President Zelensky “pathetic”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
#
Derek,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. **As the son of a WWII veteran and grandson of a WWI veteran, having the support and endorsement of an organization like VoteVets that gives our veterans a voice is truly special.**
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $20,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you split a donation of $3 or more right now between my campaign and VoteVets – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-franken-split?refcode=em220406-1-15&t=1&refcode2=5218_3013755_-Gb69F&akid=5218%2E3013755%2E-Gb69F)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll evenly split your contribution between Mike Franken and VoteVets instantly:_

clean_body: As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. Derek, As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.” And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. As the son of a WWII veteran and grandson of a WWI veteran, having the support and endorsement of an organization like VoteVets that gives our veterans a voice is truly special. We’ve set a goal of raising another $20,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still short. body:

Friend — we did it!!
With your help, we had a favorable outcome in this election. Georgette's 37% of the primary election vote is neck-and-neck for the top spot and she's headed to a runoff election in June!
This was a tough race. Georgette overcame huge amounts of spending from Big Oil and other corporate interests because of her record of protecting our environment, our workers, and our community.
But the voters in AD-80 have made it clear: that they are ready for Georgette to make change in the State Assembly.
Now, we have the run-off election in June! It's going to be tough, but with the support of folks like you, the hard work of Team Gómez, and the strength of Georgette's message, we will win.
Thanks for everything you do,
-- Georgette HQ

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061171:JGd4JCoNH:m:1:3317145305:2B55D177AAC34FDE5C26DF3A9F3FE1CD:r)**

---

name: Crystal Vanuch
subject: Again? Biden's latest call for gun control
body:
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/750423d665584948/60d042f181d5d098c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
Peter, **Biden is back at it again.** After a tragic act of violence in California, he is once again demanding Congress advance the far left's extreme gun control agenda!** [In a statement Sunday](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/750423d665584948/3513e1a1578a2e22c3d6b838967d376c/40203), he called on Spanberger to **"_Ban ghost guns. Require background checks [Gun Registration] for all gun sales. Ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. Repeal gun manufacturers’ immunity from liability."_** Of course, Biden failed to mention that California already has perhaps the strictest gun laws in the country. Remember when Democrats tried this right here in Virginia?
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/750423d665584948/4a260186de197863c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
| | When Virginia Democrats pushed this extreme agenda after taking control in 2019, our community rallied together to oppose red flag laws, standard capacity magazine bans, and universal gun registration! **We held a Gun Rights Rally with over 2,500 citizens, and I led the effort to make Stafford County a sanctuary county for law abiding gun owners.** _Our Second Amendment rights to keep and bear arms are non-negotiable._ Our Founding Fathers were clear how they felt about the Second Amendment, that’s why they enshrined it in the Constitution – not only to protect our right to hunt or target shoot, but for people to defend themselves and their families. As your Congresswoman, I will always protect the Second Amendment from the radical left and proudly defend our Constitutional rights. I hope you will stand with me! In Liberty,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress
---
[**Stand With Crystal - Donate Today!**](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/750423d665584948/c132087f9d59e213c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---

Of course, Biden failed to mention that California already has perhaps the strictest gun laws in the country. Remember when Democrats tried this right here in Virginia? | | When Virginia Democrats pushed this extreme agenda after taking control in 2019, our community rallied together to oppose red flag laws, standard capacity magazine bans, and universal gun registration! We held a Gun Rights Rally with over 2,500 citizens, and I led the effort to make Stafford County a sanctuary county for law abiding gun owners.** Our Second Amendment rights to keep and bear arms are non-negotiable. Our Founding Fathers were clear how they felt about the Second Amendment, that’s why they enshrined it in the Constitution – not only to protect our right to hunt or target shoot, but for people to defend themselves and their families. As your Congresswoman, I will always protect the Second Amendment from the radical left and proudly defend our Constitutional rights. I hope you will stand with me! In Liberty, | | | | | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220405wu?refcode=lpfe220405wu_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220405wu?refcode=lpfe220405wu_nd]
We made it through the first quarter of 2022!
Thanks to #TeamLizzie’s hard work and generosity ahead of the first FEC reporting deadline of the election year, the campaign ended the quarter in a strong place.
That’s crucial because we have a lot of work ahead of us to reach new voters in TX-07 (70% are new!) before Election Day and tell them about the important work Lizzie is doing for our district in Congress. We’re so grateful to know we can count on your support in the weeks and months to come.
Lizzie endorsed Mike Collier to be Texas’ next lieutenant governor! Mike will work to bring Texans together and deliver the solutions our state needs.
https://www.votetexas.gov/ [https://www.votetexas.gov/]
Mike will be in a runoff election on May 24. Early voting for the runoff begins on May 16 and the last day to register to vote is April 25.
Click here to learn how to register to vote or see if you’re already registered. [https://www.votetexas.gov/]
Houston Chronicle :
“Democrats press Biden to get Planned Parenthood back into Texas Medicaid program”
March 21, 2022
Lizzie led Texas’ Democratic congressional delegation in writing a letter to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services asking the Biden administration to return Planned Parenthood as a Medicaid provider after state leaders removed Planned Parenthood due to false claims.
About 8,000 Texans lost their source of reproductive health care when Planned Parenthood was dropped as a Medicaid provider. This is an issue of health care and it’s an issue of reproductive rights. Texans should be able to choose any qualified provider for their reproductive care needs, and Lizzie will continue fighting to ensure Texans can access the care they need.
Transgender Visibility Day last week holds particular significance for Texans.
Gov. Greg Abbott’s recent, nakedly political order directing the Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents who provide gender-affirming care to their children has sent shock and fear throughout the trans community in Texas and around the country.
As our transgender neighbors become more visible, they can face more discrimination and even violence.
#TeamLizzie stands with the trans community in TX-07 and across the country. Lizzie knows that Gov. Abbott’s directive is at odds with our values as Texans, and that’s why she supports the Equality Act and codifying anti-discrimination protections for the LGBTQ+ community, in TX-07 and everywhere.
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220405wu?refcode=lpfe220405wu_nd]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

subject: Meeting the District Face-to-Face
body:
There is something truly humbling about seeing support for me in this community, with people willing to put my name out publicly. | | | |
---
| | |
## Meeting The District Face-to-Face
---
|
---
|
---
| There is something truly humbling about seeing support for me in this community, with people willing to put my name out publicly. I am honored and it strengthens my desire and resolve to be the best candidate I can be.

I am committed to serving this country once again for the people of Oregon, and the ones that have felt unrepresented by politicians with loyalties that lie with special interests.

If you are interested in learning more about me, would like to have a phone conversation, meet for coffee, or would like to have a yard sign delivered to you, please reach out to me at **cody@codyfororegon.com**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Did you get a chance to sign our petition yet?
[**We’re closing in on our 1,000 signature goal, and we need your help to make a statement that we’re standing up for fairness and putting big corporations on notice:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43841740/338933459/-2080319221?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNThlMDE5Yi1jMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm5wQua3u2drapFl6DmoCU4mlsnyd7gQ9WD-RHQ_ZtM=&emci=eaa5325e-e8aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c58e019b-c2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43841741/338933460/-2080319221?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNThlMDE5Yi1jMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm5wQua3u2drapFl6DmoCU4mlsnyd7gQ9WD-RHQ_ZtM=&emci=eaa5325e-e8aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c58e019b-c2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
For decades, big companies have had almost free rein over our economy. From major tech mergers between companies like Facebook and Instagram to agriculture mergers between companies like Wayne and Sanderson Farms, the mass mergers frenzy has increased unemployment, suppressed wages, and allowed companies to hike up prices even further during this period of inflation.
Along with Senator Elizabeth Warren, Mondaire is working hard to pass the _Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act_ to help empower workers, raise wages, reduce prices, combat inequality, and enable small businesses to thrive.
By banning the biggest, most anticompetitive mergers, overhauling the merger-review process to include consideration of labor-market consequences, and strengthening agencies’ tools to break up harmful mergers, it would enforce our antitrust laws and restore real competition in our markets.
[**Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act_ and support Mondaire’s efforts to tackle corporate consolidation head on and help build a fairer, more vibrant economy that works for everyone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43841742/338933461/-2080319221?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNThlMDE5Yi1jMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm5wQua3u2drapFl6DmoCU4mlsnyd7gQ9WD-RHQ_ZtM=&emci=eaa5325e-e8aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c58e019b-c2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43841744/338933463/-2080319221?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNThlMDE5Yi1jMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm5wQua3u2drapFl6DmoCU4mlsnyd7gQ9WD-RHQ_ZtM=&emci=eaa5325e-e8aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c58e019b-c2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you for joining us in this fight.
— Team Mondaire

clean_body: Did you get a chance to sign our petition yet? For decades, big companies have had almost free rein over our economy. From major tech mergers between companies like Facebook and Instagram to agriculture mergers between companies like Wayne and Sanderson Farms, the mass mergers frenzy has increased unemployment, suppressed wages, and allowed companies to hike up prices even further during this period of inflation. Along with Senator Elizabeth Warren, Mondaire is working hard to pass the Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act to help empower workers, raise wages, reduce prices, combat inequality, and enable small businesses to thrive. By banning the biggest, most anticompetitive mergers, overhauling the merger-review process to include consideration of labor-market consequences, and strengthening agencies’ tools to break up harmful mergers, it would enforce our antitrust laws and restore real competition in our markets. Thank you for joining us in this fight. — Team Mondaire **= | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Neal=20Walia=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Campaign Announces Promotion of Deputy Campaign Manager
body:
Neal Walia for Congress is proud to announce the promotion of the teams Deputy Campaign Manager. | | | |
---
| | |
# PRESS RELEASE: **Alyssa Nilemo Promoted to Campaign Manager of Neal Walia for Congress**
Neal Walia, a grassroots Democrat running for Congress in Colorado’s 1st Congressional District, has promoted Alyssa Nilemo to Campaign Manager of the Neal Walia for Congress campaign. “Alyssa has continuously demonstrated her ability to manage, organize, and lead across all aspects of our people powered campaign. She quickly rose from our campaign’s Director of Operations to Deputy Campaign Manager, and has earned her position as Campaign Manager leading into the most important phase of the campaign. Our whole team is excited and energized by this decision. We believe now more than ever that we are in position to win this year’s June Democrat Primary and make history by becoming the first person of color to ever represent our district in the halls of Congress.”
---
|
---
|
---
|

“I’m proud of this campaign and how far we’ve come together as a team. From the very beginning, I’ve believed deeply in the mission and values of this campaign and what we are fighting for. I’m looking forward to working with and mobilizing the hundreds of volunteers and community members who have helped build this people-powered mile high movement. Our goal is to make sure every single voter in this district knows that they have a choice in this primary. Our district has long been ready to move forward from our corporate backed establishment incumbent of 25 years and become a leading voice in the progressive movement for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and Housing as a Human Right. Neal is the right choice for our communities.” - Alyssa Nilemo
---
| [Learn More ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=ca9058e779&e=e67cbb3f92 "Learn More ")
---
|
---
| Neal’s campaign has been endorsed by Denver City Councilmember Candi CdeBaca, RTD Director Shontel Lewis, Denver School Board Director Scott Esserman, former State Representative the Hon. Joe Salazar, Lafayette Mayor J.D. Mangat, Denver School Board President Xóchitl Gaytán, former presidential candidate Marianne Williamson, the Working Families Party, the Progressive Democrats of America, the Blue America PAC, and has been certified by the Political Workers Guild.
---
|
---
| [Get Involved](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=4583eb55ee&e=e67cbb3f92 "Get Involved")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
### Upcoming events
Please join us this coming weekend, Saturday April 9th, anytime between 11am- 3pm at Whittier Cafe (1710 East 25th Ave). This is an opportunity to get more involved with this people powered movement and meet the Neal Walia for Congress Team!

name: Team Jazz
subject: Decriminalize cannabis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=logo]
ONE-QUESTION POLL
National cannabis legalization must be grounded in equity and restorative justice.
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LITDhFPVtUym5M0K0apJvQ2?contactdata=ywuQpcsjcqWSoXef9N9YrU0gXTXOd%2BHr1J4GecLXyBF9PspC5hxkFAXT3Uif3KTPOT9bbkgA4FW7CHPNd0KVJq8MTz1wppShuKeC%2FUTSL6SN0t1karo%2BQtovFQjkmgcPPVBjnzDRSTYHDy%2FeFWdsv8EbyH7iuczkG5F4F7vHf58%3D&refcode2=btn_yes] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LITDhFPVtUym5M0K0apJvQ2?contactdata=ywuQpcsjcqWSoXef9N9YrU0gXTXOd%2BHr1J4GecLXyBF9PspC5hxkFAXT3Uif3KTPOT9bbkgA4FW7CHPNd0KVJq8MTz1wppShuKeC%2FUTSL6SN0t1karo%2BQtovFQjkmgcPPVBjnzDRSTYHDy%2FeFWdsv8EbyH7iuczkG5F4F7vHf58%3D&refcode2=btn_no]
Folks, if you're not sure, here is some quick background info.
The Problem: Our country’s war on drugs has been heavy-handed, racially-biased, and unsuccessful. These policies have disproportionately targeted communities of color and young Black men ‐‐ leading to lengthy prison sentences for non-violent offenders, broken up communities, and sky-high prison populations.
The Solution: We must overhaul our nation’s drug policies to make them data-driven and focused on racial equity. Part of that must be legislation to legalize and regulate cannabis that is grounded in restorative justice. During Jazz’s time in the Maryland House of Delegates, he's worked to do just that.
The Good News: The Maryland House of Delegates has finally passed legislation to legalize recreational cannabis in Maryland. This legislation has been years in the making and is the result of work from countless lawmakers and advocates.
Though the bill isn't perfect, with it we stand to create a new equitable industry and expunge the records of those with cannabis convictions. Jazz was proud to support this bill and move Maryland forward.
On the national front, the U.S. House has also just passed a decriminalization bill with expungement provisions. Democrats are beginning to make progress in our work to reform our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system.
The Not-So‐Good News: It's possible that both of these bills could be defeated by Republican opposition. And no matter what, we still have much work to do to ensure those most affected by the war on drugs benefit from cannabis legalization. Beyond the expungement of criminal records, we must provide job training and pathways to business ownership for communities that have been disproportionately affected by the war on drugs, with dedicated community investment and local control of the use of funds.
Here's Where You Come In: We need more champions of this critical issue to fight for it on Capitol Hill. One of the reasons Jazz is running for Congress is because communities across the country can’t wait for change when it comes to ending the awful policies of our nation’s war on drugs.
Please, will you let us know if you're with us on this? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LITDhFPVtUym5M0K0apJvQ2?contactdata=ywuQpcsjcqWSoXef9N9YrU0gXTXOd%2BHr1J4GecLXyBF9PspC5hxkFAXT3Uif3KTPOT9bbkgA4FW7CHPNd0KVJq8MTz1wppShuKeC%2FUTSL6SN0t1karo%2BQtovFQjkmgcPPVBjnzDRSTYHDy%2FeFWdsv8EbyH7iuczkG5F4F7vHf58%3D&refcode2=body_link1]
ONE-QUESTION POLL
National cannabis legalization must be grounded in equity and restorative justice.
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LITDhFPVtUym5M0K0apJvQ2?contactdata=ywuQpcsjcqWSoXef9N9YrU0gXTXOd%2BHr1J4GecLXyBF9PspC5hxkFAXT3Uif3KTPOT9bbkgA4FW7CHPNd0KVJq8MTz1wppShuKeC%2FUTSL6SN0t1karo%2BQtovFQjkmgcPPVBjnzDRSTYHDy%2FeFWdsv8EbyH7iuczkG5F4F7vHf58%3D&refcode2=btn_yes2] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LITDhFPVtUym5M0K0apJvQ2?contactdata=ywuQpcsjcqWSoXef9N9YrU0gXTXOd%2BHr1J4GecLXyBF9PspC5hxkFAXT3Uif3KTPOT9bbkgA4FW7CHPNd0KVJq8MTz1wppShuKeC%2FUTSL6SN0t1karo%2BQtovFQjkmgcPPVBjnzDRSTYHDy%2FeFWdsv8EbyH7iuczkG5F4F7vHf58%3D&refcode2=btn_no2]
We've got to keep fighting for progress,
Team Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_photo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_photo]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus.
Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]

Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

**BREAKING: The Oklahoma legislature joins Texas and Mississippi in a near total abortion ban**
The GOP is waging an unprecedented war against the right to choose. **We'll only be able to defend our reproductive rights if grassroots activists like you are willing to fight for them. That's why we need to hear from you before our live poll closes at 11:59 p.m., so please respond now:**

Peter – these new laws are dangerous and incredibly upsetting, but they're not surprising. **This is all going exactly as far-right zealots like Sen. Grassley planned. He's spent his 47 years in Washington doing everything within his power to take away the right to choose.**
From his seat on the Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley has made packing the court with far-right extremists his No. 1 priority – and there's no limit to how far he'll go to get his way. He blocked President Obama's nominee for _293 days_ – the longest confirmation delay in HISTORY – then rammed through Brett Kavanaugh's controversial nomination with the narrowest margin in nearly 140 years.
**He's helped stack the court with anti-choice zealots, and now they're set to rule on the dangerous abortion bans passed by far-right extremists in states like Oklahoma and Texas.** We can still defend the right to choose by codifying Roe v. Wade into law, but we NEED grassroots Democrats to fight back with us.
**Please, in the wake of this terrible legislation, we need to hear from another 59 Democrats before 11:59 p.m. to show a united movement is fighting for the right to choose:**
**Will you defend Roe v. Wade?**

And with the Senate hanging in the balance, we need to keep building momentum and growing our support if we’re going to keep this seat blue. We already know that national Republicans will spare no expense in this race. That’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you chip in $15 to help win in Vermont and protect our Senate majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1759?t=3&akid=187%2E61531%2EBgKC5J)
If Mitch McConnell is majority leader again, our entire agenda will be on the line—Medicare for All, lowering prescription drug prices, climate action, and more. Winning this race will be the difference between progress and failure. And because this election is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the country, we’ve got to make sure we’re doing the work to win.
That’s why we’re asking you to support this campaign with a donation today. Together, we can elect Peter and deliver results. And we know that if Republicans win—they won’t lift a finger to solve any of the problems families are dealing with today.
[**If you can, please chip in a $15 contribution right away to help elect Peter to the Senate and protect our Senate majority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1759?t=4&akid=187%2E61531%2EBgKC5J)

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Drain the Swamp
body:
---
| | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital.

What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it.

The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people.

What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness.

There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians.

The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control.

For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach.

I will continually push to reduce the size of government, as well as for lower taxes, securing our borders, resourcing all levels of law enforcement, and helping Colorado achieve her goals with as few strings as possible from the permanent bureaucracy and career politicians.

Freedom depends on some governing, but its real guarantor power behind America's greatness is a free people unleashed. We must never forget that all power vested in the government is granted by We the People.
|
---

| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us!

All hands on deck this week preparing the the all-important vote this Friday in Colorado Springs.

Erik has been getting great response from Delegates he's spoken with and he is eager to take The Stage and address the Assembly Friday morning.

In addition to the push, Erik worked in an appearance in Fairplay at the Rocky Mountain Cigar Company for the Candidates Forum. His message was very well received.

Erik spoke on Sunday to an enthusiastic crowd at the Colorado Red Wave rally produced by Danielle Neuschwanger (Candidate for Colorado Governor) and hosted by Bandimere Speedway in Morrison.

Saturday, Erik addressed CD7 Delegates in Arvada at Malone's Clubhouse Grill. After Erik's formal words and lots of one-on-one conversation, several folks stepped up to join Team Aadland Volunteers.
| | |
---
| Quote of The Week
---
"There is nothing to be gained by adding more hatred or vitriol. I'm going to win this race with honor and integrity and character. And the voters are going to see that. If they don't then they're not going to elect me. But I don't think we are going to win by spewing more hatred. We need less of that."
* -Erik Aadland on facing slimy campaigning from Democrats

---
| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022 | | A Word From Erik | | | ---|--- | In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital. What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it. The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people. What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness. There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians. The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control. For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach. I will continually push to reduce the size of government, as well as for lower taxes, securing our borders, resourcing all levels of law enforcement, and helping Colorado achieve her goals with as few strings as possible from the permanent bureaucracy and career politicians. Freedom depends on some governing, but its real guarantor power behind America's greatness is a free people unleashed. We must never forget that all power vested in the government is granted by We the People. | | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us! Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8a1fb0dfbf3a4ed9baca753002cfd6e7&_e=tc9GHkrIH2rKOf5MiO6bCEtMnS8gv3GW4nONNJq7I7LIiUuXuQ4QPuhYMmQuJPE4Cn1W6_isXzEtZ4LXFQ_7bZtX5YNWOk0RA5eS6aA27yNfxB-doqn_A7m-cKthmIOSLtSaW4RquxwnRV6N5MeQHkPLYuWtz_YzS0YGUzA2ScOu90t74IgtdpEkviefW69UaZ-6ejMAyxv4apCJaVHlcJJrPzB3M7TdDVBBJ246tg1kYIsEzhngfjzAFvQSM3MMXcM_tvJ0GXrR8FqJBR6eabAWlx9J4kY1cfBxyshyDMnlT6_lfd0q8Dwg8fA7rJO56n2oET4epi31XAZZF3gaFon9u-GQBmkyoKvIHRPAJ7dtFtkSJkyTtoQIccBVIVctUcFv5hnee5BaQReAcMFsetqAiNNAvhngUTVmuVfJi26h3IYYsXeetUZaA6wXcAVzviORvykPI4WmLA5k-UC6sKN14G5HKus-TQi5DxkKxAhCPvzQY2UES07HFnetMN2UcJAFQQvWZCU-ZjQzkuabqRnxbc2dSyAfmrz-qQhPfdY%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8a1fb0dfbf3a4ed9baca753002cfd6e7&_e=tc9GHkrIH2rKOf5MiO6bCEtMnS8gv3GW4nONNJq7I7LIiUuXuQ4QPuhYMmQuJPE4Cn1W6_isXzEtZ4LXFQ_7bZtX5YNWOk0RA5eS6aA27yNfxB-doqn_A7m-cKthmIOSLtSaW4RquxwnRV6N5MeQHkPLYuWtz_YzS0YGUzA2ScOu90t74IgtdpEkviefW69UaZ-6ejMAyxv4apCJaVHlcJJrPzB3M7TdDVBBJ246tg1kYIsEzhngfjzAFvQSM3MMXcM_tvJ0GXrR8FqJBR6eabAWlx9J4kY1cfBxyshyDMnlT6_lfd0q8Dwg8fA7rJO56n2oET4epi31XAZZF3gaFlRBuBpERo0dHZOEUo7BioI5BTmpV2Z_NMtGPjvsvexUWFxYCvAXdFP3YcL1X27OnG9Bwzikd_hYbkCtn66EwkEaYeZVvres2ST5ZfblhxYfKt2IN7Co6dim174vbuXMuqql0boSdGZuoUL_Dp0OQD10rWxztB7fpYW6DDMMYb4UGhb1o_QR241tbBJLg58Pag15jiWPpYsFGudrcpYLVrI%3D)**.
