name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: This Is CRAZY What They Are Now Trying To Do To President Trump
body:
In recent days, a Federal Judge from the Socialist State of California has stated that President Trump “likely” committed a felony by attempting to ob
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4956.1.944363c6d61bd256d89eb176953b7f4f) |
---
In recent days, a Federal Judge from the Socialist State of **_California_** has stated that **President Trump** “ _likely_ ” committed a felony by attempting to obstruct Justice. As a strong supporter of **President Trump** , I am outraged by these improper and inappropriate comments by a Federal Judge. **Trump** faces no charges, no indictment, and is not under investigation yet he is “likely” to have committed a felony? This highlights the politicization in our Justice System today. Our God-given, constitutional rights of Due Process are under attack by the radical left and their minions they call Judges. **Gone are the days of being innocent until you are proven guilty**. The reality of today’s world is this: **If you are a Republican, you are guilty UNTIL proven innocent!** The radical left and their minions that they call judges, are eroding our God-given constitutional rights to "Due Process." Yet Senator [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4957.1.dad8fe213645cc3b8a01e5ece92870be)....does nothing. When I am elected as your next Senator of Oklahoma, I will team with members of the House to file Articles of Impeachment against corrupt Judges who desecrate our Constitution and make decisions based off of radical left wing ideology and I will vote in the Senate to convict and impeach them. I am not a career politician or a political 'insider", I am a pastor, small businessman, husband and father. I am running because I don't like seeing what is happening to our country. If I am elected **I will serve TWO terms** (12 years) and I will come home. Why hasn’t Senator [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4958.1.94272f27f36ff73b16f81460a946fe71) done anything? [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4959.1.1c8a1b2b4b73b6dec0a73ef387de7151) does not take action against those who wish to erode our Constitutional Rights, rather he takes action to ensure he is lining his campaign coffers with millions of dollars of dark money from **Indian Casinos** and big pharmaceutical firms like **Pfizer** who made billions from the COVID-19 vaccination. [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4960.1.0bd62be0c9ac3ce77b0f31f5ac9dc2ea) is too busy concerning himself with how he can stay in power, rather than how he can RESTORE power to us. This is of course the same Senator [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4961.1.1aa6c110cb5bed173ceb9dcd13d4194a) who initially objected to the fraudulent results of the 2020 presidential election. [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4962.1.bd05bd5f2794ecd7dcdd18a58eafc28d) then flip-flopped to support the certification of the election of Joe Biden and then immediately apologized to Black Lives Matter saying that his initial apprehension about the fraudulent election returns was "racist". Then [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4963.1.43605333415e2eda95d587758d0ae42a) said he was open to a "third impeachment" of President Trump, not surprising since as a member of the senate intelligence committee during the four years of Trump's presidency [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4964.1.6a87b9b80438db850b026005da2f4589) never once defended Trump during the bogus Russian Collusion WitchHunt. Although he keeps insisting that he is a "conservative" [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4965.1.5573f9b1f3c356718c39c20b34c47ffc) has a long record of supporting amnesty and citizenship for the illegals pouring over our southern border. It is time to stand up and say no more. We will not give another inch on our Freedom of Speech, our right to practice Religion, and certainty will not give an inch on another MANDATE FROM THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT. If we are going to save our country from the radical left, Antifa, BLM, the socialists, the environmental whackos, the gun grabbers, and the transgender activists who are infiltrating our schools, and radical left wing Judges who wish to erode our Judicial system, we must win primaries and defeat the go-along to get-along RINO politicians like [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4966.1.fdc0c2a4c5080d44563cffced74de439). Defeating [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4967.1.a741bbf1b66401e3159f9dc49e3da350) is a crucial step to taking back control of Congress from radical left wing socialists and the weak kneed RINO leaders who are too scared to fight. Polling for my campaign shows that once Oklahoma Republican primary voters are aware of [Lankford's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4968.1.3c82eda790c5f58e14039ee111d78d2d) shameful record and they realize that he is not the reliable "conservative he says he is, that I will beat him handily. Recently polling firms affiliated with the Republican establishment released polls showing me hopelessly behind career politician and Washington DC veteran, [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4969.1.da365e1699666b00f4695c5a37e1aece). It's disinformation designed to chill my fundraising efforts. My own polling shows me behind but gaining every week. The same poll shows a third of Oklahoma Republicans already disapprove of [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4970.1.2137b65c1f1a2e0c84ae73e5acb19bbc) and the job he is doing. Once the public phase of my campaign advertising on cable and radio begins and the voters learn who [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4971.1.037134f671ecef519b86ae131dde984f)really is - I am confident I will overtake this swamp creature. To be competitive I must raise $750,000 in the next three months, which I know we WILL DO! [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4972.1.f613b0e5a1c03ed9e9e9a7718a828180) has to go and I can defeat him. But I need your help so [CLICK HERE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4973.1.384308a88156ec47d830219fa8cb8aa1) to fund the fight. My wife Kendra and I are all-in in this effort to save our country. I am campaigning day and night, putting in 16 and 18 hour days and rarely returning home before midnight. But I can't do it without your help. Yours in the fight for liberty, Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4974.1.7e2d9e9c249c793576f0ef05dba2fa2b), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4975.1.e73ae9244dc34e23dc3448287a1cd442), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4976.1.7b17fd738f43be609a12d6f0d78ee22b), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4977.1.5f58a5ced2799fc86ecfaa992157a846), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6279985.4978.1.1ac84786fd22b245b4d28b9fdbe1eac5)).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Can you join me for lunch? Douglas Murray in Jackson
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/waronthewest?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Hi Friend

Douglas Murray is a bestselling author, journalist and Fox News contributor. His new book, _The War on the West_ , is published in a few weeks – and he will be here in Jackson to talk about it on Thursday May 5th.

Would you like to join us?

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6e48b39234&e=5703353baa)
---
[Book Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d71d25b6be&e=5703353baa)
|
**If you buy a ticket, we will give you a FREE copy of _The War on the West_ , signed by Douglas Murray. **
* China has concentration camps _now_. Why do Westerners claim our sins are unique?
* If the history of humankind is a history of conquest, prejudice, genocide and exploitation, why are only Western nations taking the blame for it?
* It is perfectly acceptable to celebrate the contributions of non-Western cultures, but why is discussing their flaws and crimes called ‘hate speech’?

If America and the West are to survive, they need to be defended. _The War on the West_ explains how.

Tickets are currently $30 each and we only have limited place.

Following the tremendous success of our event with Lord Daniel Hannan the other week, I know that this event will sell fast!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A federal judge stops Florida’s racist voter suppression law... for now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The House has passed multiple bills to protect voting rights, and there is abundant cause for urgency with Republicans undermining electoral integrity every single day. The Senate must act.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)
“Nonsensical,” Derek.
That’s the word U.S. District Judge Mark Walker repeated over and over again in his recent injunction to block Florida Republican legislators’ voter suppression law targeting Black voters.
You probably remember the law he’s talking about — which made it _illegal_ to hand out bottled water to voters waiting in line. It restricted mail ballot drop boxes and made it harder to vote by mail (all in the midst of a global pandemic that has claimed nearly one million American lives).
Blocking this law was the right step, but it won’t be enough to stop the onslaught of Republican voter suppression in states across the country between now and November.
[**Add your name to my petition demanding the Senate immediately bring voting rights legislation to the floor for a vote. The House has passed multiple bills to protect voting rights, and there is abundant cause for urgency with Republicans undermining electoral integrity every single day. The Senate must act.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220405-voting-rights-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220405-voting-rights-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)
---
There is one central theme that every Republican voter suppression law since the 2020 election has been about — spreading Donald Trump’s Big Lie by promoting the conspiracy theory that millions of illegal ballots were cast in the last election with zero evidence.
Republicans’ so-called “election integrity” laws are nothing more than open justification to keep the GOP legislators writing them in power and hand the next presidential election to Donald Trump.
Florida is but one state that could see its Senate race — and our majority with it — decided in an election where Republican voter suppression laws have been put into effect.
We’re talking about a state where barely 10,000 votes decided the last Senate race in 2018. Not to mention equally vital races in Georgia, Arizona, and many other hotly-contested states that have their own Senate elections this fall as well.
[**With Americans facing their greatest challenge to voting rights in more than 50 years, I’m humbly asking you to add your name to my petition demanding the Senate bring our multiple bills addressing voting rights to the Senate floor for a vote. Let’s put Republicans on the record as their counterparts at the state level work to reverse decades of progress.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220405-voting-rights-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220405-voting-rights-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220406_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)
---
If there is one thing you can count on, it’s that I’ll never back down or stop fighting to protect our democracy, for this generation and the next.
Thanks for having my back.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=162%2E5257348%2EWILSrd)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

name: Sen. Dick Durbin
subject: We’re about to make history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please, your help is critical:
| | |
---
Friend,

The Senate will soon hold a decisive floor vote on the historic nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court.

This is a pivotal moment, and **the only reason we’re able to even talk about voting on Judge Jackson's nomination is because of our narrow 50-50 Senate majority.**

**[Defending that narrow majority is critical to our future progress, which is why I’m asking for your help today. I set a goal of raising $25,000 by midnight for the DSCC to help us win this fight, so please, make a $5 contribution now.](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220406-SenDickDurbin-DurbinSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220406-SenDickDurbin-DurbinSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=3690%2E9716520%2E1KVyao)**

I watched Mitch McConnell single-handedly sink President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee when Republicans were in the majority. The only reason he can’t do the same thing to Judge Jackson is because this grassroots team flipped the Senate. If we'd fallen short by even one seat, **it would have been up to Mitch McConnell to decide whether Judge Jackson even got a hearing.**

And after witnessing first-hand the unrelenting, scurrilous attacks some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle leveled against Judge Jackson in the Committee room, we no longer have to guess what Sen. McConnell would have done with her nomination. He wouldn't have even let her through the doorway.

**That’s why defending our razor-thin Senate majority is so critical.** We can’t risk giving Mitch McConnell the power to block President Biden’s judicial nominees and move the Supreme Court even further to the right.

**[Please, chip in $5 now to the DSCC to help protect our Senate majority from falling _back_ into Mitch McConnell's hands >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220406-SenDickDurbin-DurbinSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220406-SenDickDurbin-DurbinSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=3690%2E9716520%2E1KVyao)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: Please, your help is critical: | | | Friend, The Senate will soon hold a decisive floor vote on the historic nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. This is a pivotal moment, and the only reason we’re able to even talk about voting on Judge Jackson's nomination is because of our narrow 50-50 Senate majority. I watched Mitch McConnell single-handedly sink President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee when Republicans were in the majority. The only reason he can’t do the same thing to Judge Jackson is because this grassroots team flipped the Senate. If we'd fallen short by even one seat, it would have been up to Mitch McConnell to decide whether Judge Jackson even got a hearing. And after witnessing first-hand the unrelenting, scurrilous attacks some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle leveled against Judge Jackson in the Committee room, we no longer have to guess what Sen. McConnell would have done with her nomination. He wouldn't have even let her through the doorway. That’s why defending our razor-thin Senate majority is so critical. We can’t risk giving Mitch McConnell the power to block President Biden’s judicial nominees and move the Supreme Court even further to the right. We need your help to defend our Senate majority. name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]
Hi — just bumping this for you.

There are just hours left until our FEC filing deadline. Chip in now to keep Zoe fighting for us→ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203]

—Begin Forwarded Message—

FIRST: California lost a Congressional seat causing massive redistricting changes all across the state — including Zoe landing in a new district, the newly formed 18th Congressional District.

THEN: Zoe started to introduce herself to thousands of voters because her district contains nearly 60% new territory.

NOW: Zoe is facing her first FEC deadline of this year TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT and needs to show up stronger than ever.

Chip in now to contribute to Zoe’s FEC fundraising goal of $15,000 — we’re still short and need your support → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?amount=25]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?amount=25]If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Chip in $25 immediately >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?express_lane=true&amount=25]

Chip in $50 immediately >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?express_lane=true&amount=50]

Chip in $75 immediately >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?express_lane=true&amount=75]

Chip in $150 immediately >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?express_lane=true&amount=150]

Or, donate another amount >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203]

Zoe has spent her time in Congress fighting for real progress, leading efforts on voting rights, immigration reform, women’s rights, sensible gun safety measures, and so much more.

It is essential we keep Zoe in Congress fighting for us.

Can we count on you to support Zoe tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2203?amount=25]

Thanks,

Team Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. body:
The words that inspired me
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43852520/338985563/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2836-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJiMzEzYS1lZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LLhgMhROEG6KI9BWCtdhOp1EAYqW8xeS2Uvk3QWKwM=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43852521/338985564/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2836-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJiMzEzYS1lZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LLhgMhROEG6KI9BWCtdhOp1EAYqW8xeS2Uvk3QWKwM=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: Do you support Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

**FIRST:** As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Alex participated in the hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
**THEN:** (after a short flight delay) Alex voted earlier this week to advance her nomination out of committee and to a full vote in the Senate.
**SO NOW:** We’re doing everything we can to build grassroots support for Judge Jackson before the full Senate vote later this week. And one of the best ways to do that is to show that there are a LOT of people fired up about this historic nomination.
[**Please add your name to stand with Alex and say you support Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220406-1-subs&refcode2=724.159979.eHHqJ6&akid=724%2E159979%2EeHHqJ6)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220406-1-subs&refcode2=724.159979.eHHqJ6&akid=724%2E159979%2EeHHqJ6)**
Alex has said that Judge Jackson is an outstanding nominee. She has the qualifications, she has the experience, and she’ll bring a much-needed perspective to the Supreme Court — both as the first Black woman to serve as Justice, but also the first federal public defender.
Not only will Judge Jackson be an excellent jurist, but as we saw in these hearings, she has the power to inspire the next generation of Americans.
[**So please, add your name today and help us demonstrate that there’s an overwhelming amount of support for Judge Jackson’s nomination before the full Senate vote later this week.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220406-1-subs&refcode2=724.159979.eHHqJ6&akid=724%2E159979%2EeHHqJ6)
Thank you!
\- Team Padilla

clean_body: FIRST: As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Alex participated in the hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court. THEN: (after a short flight delay) Alex voted earlier this week to advance her nomination out of committee and to a full vote in the Senate. SO NOW: We’re doing everything we can to build grassroots support for Judge Jackson before the full Senate vote later this week. And one of the best ways to do that is to show that there are a LOT of people fired up about this historic nomination. Alex has said that Judge Jackson is an outstanding nominee. She has the qualifications, she has the experience, and she’ll bring a much-needed perspective to the Supreme Court — both as the first Black woman to serve as Justice, but also the first federal public defender. Not only will Judge Jackson be an excellent jurist, but as we saw in these hearings, she has the power to inspire the next generation of Americans. Thank you! \- Team Padilla Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

name: Derek Marshall
subject: A MAJOR success
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Derek Marshall is running in California's newly-created 23rd Congressional District, against incumbent Jay Obernolte, not Kevin McCarthy, who represents the former 23rd district. You may be receiving these emails because you've previously indicated you support progressive and Democratic candidates. Emails are the best way we update our supporters, but y ou can always unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8bb2df5e-11b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/df1de214-cdb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjFkZTIxNC1jZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFhgRWnM54Y-r9HPg9SkaRZ77BUEeMzDYJWUUVrajZY=&id=124407521 here.
Peter,
This week, there is so much to be thankful for. Last weekend, we hosted our VERY first Weekend of Action right here in Victorville, CA, in the center of the High Desert and California’s 23rd district!
We had great turnout and an enthusiastic base of volunteers who were ready to hit the pavement and start knocking doors for this grassroots event. After all, this is how the work gets done: one volunteer at a time, one door at a time, one voter at a time, until we reach every Democrat in CA-23.
Every donation we receive allows us to purchase the buttons, stickers, clipboards, mailers, shirts, and yard signs that we distribute to voters and supporters at the door. They are essential to our field program and making sure my name and message is all over this district. Will you chip in to fund the s e all-important materials? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-5&amount=38]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=4-5_express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=4-5_express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $38 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=38&refcode=4-5_express_lane_38]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=4-5_express_lane_50]
Express Donate: Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane_other=true&refcode=4-5_express_lane_other]
Or, maximize your impact and make your donation monthly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-5&amount=38&recurring=1]
Our base represents the diversity of our community in this district. This movement shows the strength that we have when we all come together as a collective to make change. See for yourself:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_1038.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_1419.jpg]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_1510.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_1468.jpg]
This weekend alone, we knocked 856 doors! And that was just the beginning. We plan to knock thousands more and register thousands of first-time voters, too. But all of that takes resources. Our fundraising goals will only get more ambitious as we get closer to our June primary and our field program expands.
Can you donate any amount today to support our field efforts? Every dollar counts and no donation is too small! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-5&amount=38]
In solidarity,
Derek Marshall
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-5&amount=38]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]

subject: Just 19 more

body:
| Peter! My CM just slacked our fundraising channel, and we only need 19 more people to donate today. Need to know you're with me now. WA-03 will flip this year, but this race will be tough. I'm in a three-way battle with an establishment-backed GOP incumbent and her far-right challenger. While yes, their infighting will clear a path for our campaign, we know massive amounts of outside money will pour into this race to keep the Republicans in power. WA-03 is ready for change -- and we deserve leaders who will prioritize people, not partisan politics. The best way to support our efforts to flip this seat red to blue is by becoming a Sustaining Member of our campaign. Even just $5 monthly will empower my team to plan ahead on things like targeted direct mail campaigns, signage, and our staffing needs. We just need 19 more people to step up today. Will you add your name to our list of Sustaining Members? You can set your donation level and help us flip WA-03 blue here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X6uJyQWcD7gRUrPd-feXxQ5STaj7MuOyg1s7flJPuG8mXc3XEUYD_ayEpR0KVHeYciguUC4Kc4BmH-RmUIl-pqQ8VzwQGBkkySWsT-146lB39Hj7K6K2cz-kwqqP_SRpltJFIrQErZaRAhCQfx1OKMg_bB4xlxYvZjoPa1VXZRyZhU_U88kvzgZfMsr-I5ndZRlNrgJSRTyUEjngVZzF5OrPM45ndShom8Nod-EH2AyaoTwjbWu6udFZb-UHa_dXsxcrLuUr1uk6dI9vOCdpqvIIbms2cgMJBZwlWtsL-aD8Q/3kz/iu9R8RoRTHae9YsVLBZQ0A/h0/vzIEPsmjgTxdoaH8amK-jB4bJ2r9cVOSdPG96EOIx9Y)** Let's do this!

-BH

clean_body: | Peter! My CM just slacked our fundraising channel, and we only need 19 more people to donate today. Need to know you're with me now. WA-03 will flip this year, but this race will be tough. I'm in a three-way battle with an establishment-backed GOP incumbent and her far-right challenger. While yes, their infighting will clear a path for our campaign, we know massive amounts of outside money will pour into this race to keep the Republicans in power. WA-03 is ready for change -- and we deserve leaders who will prioritize people, not partisan politics. The best way to support our efforts to flip this seat red to blue is by becoming a Sustaining Member of our campaign. Even just $5 monthly will empower my team to plan ahead on things like targeted direct mail campaigns, signage, and our staffing needs. We just need 19 more people to step up today. Will you add your name to our list of Sustaining Members? You can set your donation level and help us flip WA-03 blue here: Let's do this! -BH \-- Brent Hennrich Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-03 | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2022 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Team Greitens
subject: Attorney for Eric Greitens: If Karl Rove Encouraged Ex-Wife to Embellish Testimony Then He Is Guilty of Crime and Should Go to Jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Attorney for Eric Greitens: If Karl Rove Encouraged Ex-Wife to Embellish Testimony Then He Is Guilty of Crime and Should Go to Jail
---
| [As reported by The Gateway Pundit...](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzqjdKNSAxgYEixwQtm8CluBTwBfgPoYyvtkojDVtDIam7RGc1CMFZb8xtsC9Ut4TyQ_9LxAa0MvCdOmwxW5-jstKRKTRBkr1AiXFrYPm-ebUpykMrwfN7FUlcuvD2NXyh_U3ct2nd0JtRDLqyn29eE3YvutoftvxZ1HrDoQWw2hSX4DMkWJYs17Ud-IDV6tW1oFjWl-EChu7irULlMugAI6iBZWc1bqfk0hnVPJP7-oQjgy98WhvHYiAafQtOJooFDSf0StOZjLNrAJ46RuCtwdUjLNh2zUhu0reLGaNL0mrvxMWC6jC4G5Uzz4GSemEV0xQydU0KTLGhvQ5-u0-By-V-_2qnuQ&c=2T4AZu4CIv5YmyhplBxk5L6t6CXllhroXYMO_fR_PEZLl--cAxLvag==&ch=0Un71XPpiM3ypR04JiNqjA2diAV-U5AZBq5nYv2a0dvsbsurxi7yew==)
Sheena Greitens, the ex-wife of MAGA Senate candidate Eric Greitens apparently committed felony perjury by making false allegations of abuse.
In a 2020 affidavit, Sheena Greitens swore under oath that no material fact was left out of their divorce and parenting plan of their children, which would include any abuse claims.
Now in 2022, as Greitens dominates the GOP field for Missouri's open US Senate seat being vacated by RINO Roy Blunt, Sheena has come forward with new claims.
But there's only one...er, there are a lot of problems with her new story.
First, [Karl Rove has admitted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzqjdKNSAxgYEixwQtm8CluBTwBfgPoYyvtkojDVtDIam7RGc1CMFQQGjMEMlGwTxYwiYl1T7Uh8c7Q2kMHxU6-YES3tKNgY-REb0NUDSqdL2kSpAG8fHNmnCCfCav7MEGwBuiDyQYMD8itcmoJB5R4MEE4DrhdbmgZAWQWMal4-HW8ObNsUVo_o5rUex0gf4ay1VpGeJYxU1mo7DVztI1FyX8GOyUrDVX6SZrLJCb1mCLkoWeCebvk_jWC_it8pAQo1X5_K5Pd6UNKqa5fJNw==&c=2T4AZu4CIv5YmyhplBxk5L6t6CXllhroXYMO_fR_PEZLl--cAxLvag==&ch=0Un71XPpiM3ypR04JiNqjA2diAV-U5AZBq5nYv2a0dvsbsurxi7yew==) to communicating with Sheena Greitens before she filed this new, perjured affidavit that falsely accuses Eric Greitens. Karl Rove is a well-known anti-Trump RINO notorious for pulling nasty, dirty tricks on political opponents.
Second, medical and dental records show that she is lying. In these records, Sheena told doctors that her son injured his tooth while "roughhousing" with his brother. Emails obtained by The Gateway Pundit also show that Sheena repeatedly attributed the injury to roughhousing.
Third, Sheena claims in her perjured affidavit that she reported this alleged "abuse" to therapists and a mediator--but under Missouri law, all those individuals are mandatory reporters for abuse. Meaning, if Sheena Greitens had in fact told them of abuse, they are required by law to report it to authorities. But no reports were ever filed.
So, Sheena--who recently spent a week in Washington D.C. meeting with McConnell-aligned political operatives--is either lying or she is accusing several licensed therapists and the mediator of committing a crime. You can decide which seems more likely.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzqjdKNSAxgYEixwQtm8CluBTwBfgPoYyvtkojDVtDIam7RGc1CMFZb8xtsC9Ut4M_gFCmD5hnLuw-jxGn80DlWgAb30qZbcbOJYhaEXa6az5TECFuBEXnabEoZQrSeFc2mNz8sifyfTWwAc-pVPVg==&c=2T4AZu4CIv5YmyhplBxk5L6t6CXllhroXYMO_fR_PEZLl--cAxLvag==&ch=0Un71XPpiM3ypR04JiNqjA2diAV-U5AZBq5nYv2a0dvsbsurxi7yew==)
---
| At first [Sheena flat out lied](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzqjdKNSAxgYEixwQtm8CluBTwBfgPoYyvtkojDVtDIam7RGc1CMFZb8xtsC9Ut4cpj8hRZrZOq--iIjUBIR_aQUXHfRLhiXo6hapiaUC5x2KzEU8u-eiTOYv3Vfu4_eg3jdQ4bkTdlk_bu8g9X1wSQcY6VY6O0QyLrXSf9d4zg0L8A-DvFTTNeDD6VmCm0fTAi0Dai1CjWFgtMwPlovImcOMR0VENiBIYYQI82pF_0QMSLFKc6gSUJsa2WScymc&c=2T4AZu4CIv5YmyhplBxk5L6t6CXllhroXYMO_fR_PEZLl--cAxLvag==&ch=0Un71XPpiM3ypR04JiNqjA2diAV-U5AZBq5nYv2a0dvsbsurxi7yew==), claiming that she had no communications with Rove or other political operatives, but then Karl Rove admitted to communicating with her.
Sheena Greitens has since changed her story. Now, she only says that Rove didn't draft the affidavit.
"Sheena Greitens also lied when she claimed that she wanted to keep these family matters private and protect her children from public disclosure because she is the one who leaked her own perjured affidavit to the media to bring public attention on her dispute with Eric," said Tim Parlatore, an attorney for Eric Greitens.
Attorney Tim Parlatore recently joined Steve Bannon and Boris Epshteyn on The War Room to discuss this outrageous attack on Eric Greitens using his children as political pawns.
Eric Greitens has subpoenaed the phone records of Sheena Greitens, Karl Rove, and other political insiders.
"If this thing proves--if you get the phone records and all this--that [Karl Rove] put her up to this and they exchanged correspondence and talked to her, as he has told people, is he guilty of a crime," Steve Bannon asked Tim Parlatore on War Room.
Parlatore responded: "If [Karl Rove] is encouraging [Sheena Greitens] to embellish the story for his own political purposes--and I don't know if he has, we are going to find that out--but anybody who encourages a witness to falsely embellish a story for a courtroom so that they can take advantage in a political campaign, then that person is guilty of a crime and they should go to jail."
Greitens was the first person in the country to say that once elected he will vote against Mitch McConnell as GOP leader.
Eric Greitens blew up the RINO death star, and now the empire is striking back.
---

Why election day starts today for our campaign | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk4dxNjUtyj8YrgXueMsDIA5cev6tbL8FtHi7lCMYJWCyBViFKkqH6FTLa76YfcTMqJN8ln8zKna2_7y0ZRLAkgMZvrw6eHa0fG6r4iyPf_hCBSj1KJYwT0Hk-Zg9pW5PCKlqaG4wkfDlcJH2ouf7br18Xv5JKmKsktOKc_UeAL_IJR2xqrwSl7tqPTywFByDPX5Usl0XaXqT_LwGqpxPtYj/3kz/V-iT4wiKR-Czzs_6O90EGA/h0/rmr7DGJQpI0WPNapG8iNaRd323YEhbC7fD7fn6JmgOs) Dear Team, When you run a progressive insurgent campaign against a machine incumbent, you’re running against decades of reinforcement of the status quo. That’s why, time after time, we see progressive candidates who build late momentum fall short because of early-vote and vote-by-mail. As of this week, any voter in IL-7 can [request a vote by mail ballot](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHt2rQQrl59U-MiOmvoXs2F57V8Yp1Ey_omNaurI9yVITaHpJMzOM9w6uARhF67Ez0LigPeXwd15w0I6alwfd6qUVvmiOjtL41nr2k6bR_XmLiVtCbT6CH-CmG-S1Ro5AFcB2dr_afTyD8DfSypZ-hJq3Ca2L1RaGR9Z6l3IXLVSeuzupiT2tl3x7Vk-SzlZihvVBSZhSIFmipgYt4see-Z8hmqZe6WM8qlzclJdUpaft6AJFE-5yERt1AURstoT-kZX_A7cZrmLko8ILwTCVHyGAU_EIs8CVjpCxDgB-6AO0FMEXgV7jmrP5zIIrC2low/3kz/V-iT4wiKR-Czzs_6O90EGA/h1/XzJZyfJyMjm-Diglon7_SD9SuGBSIekiwRcDyLtGRuk) for the primary election on June 28th. **For our campaign, today is election day.** Starting today we are working against the clock every day until the polls close on June 28th. We need to be communicating with voters on the doors, on the phones, via text, via ads, via mail, and we need to be doing it NOW. **[I am setting a goal to raise enough from digital fundraising to cover our entire phone banking budget for April by the end of the day today. That’s $1,252.35 or 84 people chipping in about $15. Team, can you help us hit our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESCtaFr2vWbiDl1pXQGeKUoQ-H4smBzJLIkla05jToHZ5q0gejx-XmmOLTK6lHUfkEYMHjjqffGqDEtHNvp1q68-mF2Zx6AdRksN0YkZj0vMRgduMaUlK5UpTanGMMh1hf-hUOFEKgR6ULG0s4P574ikYVPf_1RFo5ucfjlSet3aG_y5ckuqar9U4K4AIVpM67XuVhNVqKh1bV_S1NEvhMSNduHh8O0UZCVu5ID5JZecdVjvJUS3lvxxVRbJjY57qCHfjkEhtHziedRmMILSZ-jg/3kz/V-iT4wiKR-Czzs_6O90EGA/h2/_By8pXPfOs0gtfM779WS9S5hFl270F1TQoEqO7UGHvU)** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESeVzRdHWU6U83yrnKnO_etw6enuMVx8xUXciPZUGi3Vqq0O2zkvT0wCTw9hPumbmkgtgloAxzUdLUM_8e_7ILPe_I7ieOP9846Wg6DGhvc4TFmjIQdHWRkxE2Zv0K31uys7Cbs9lS8Uyx2suLIkHoE2RYV5ERQKWEFcM-a5fNMbLZHqn6nilHGYY2ahbB_j7zoySOcBnStqneLRiR6GY3YFTQIvIxRi_DA3kEs-Wx6TCpATE4yq5bpxjDMutrUVs1kGn5ox_dRkJaVGtVFkmqhg/3kz/V-iT4wiKR-Czzs_6O90EGA/h3/oCsWcEOGVQtEXDUaAQhPX5E7EEqWsvPlE6jts0RMmK8) When it comes to voter contact, I am so proud that our campaign started early. clean_body: Why election day starts today for our campaign | | | Dear Team, When you run a progressive insurgent campaign against a machine incumbent, you’re running against decades of reinforcement of the status quo. That’s why, time after time, we see progressive candidates who build late momentum fall short because of early-vote and vote-by-mail. As of this week, any voter in IL-7 can for the primary election on June 28th. For our campaign, today is election day. Starting today we are working against the clock every day until the polls close on June 28th. We need to be communicating with voters on the doors, on the phones, via text, via ads, via mail, and we need to be doing it NOW. When it comes to voter contact, I am so proud that our campaign started early. In fact we’ve already contacted over 150k voters. In order to win, we need to make at least 450k more contacts before election day. It may sound like a lot, but we have the people on our side, and I know our volunteers will carry us through. There is not a moment to waste. Thank you, Isabel Alter \------------ Campaign Manager Kina Collins for Congress | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

clean_body: | | | | Hey Peter Willis, With less than three months until the June primary, Melanie has been criss-crossing New York’s 3rd District, having conversations with voters, and building the winning coalition we’ll need to take down the establishment. Check out some recent highlights! Melanie with some of our incredible volunteers during a Saturday morning canvass. Our volunteers are the foundation of our movement, and we literally couldn’t do this without them. Melanie with supporters at an event in NYC. A conversation with two very important constituents — and their human — at an outdoor festival last weekend. Two more signatures to get Melanie on the ballot! Our on-the-ground operation is the strongest in this race, and it’s how we’re going to win for NY-03’s working people. This is Mayor Oliver Cromwell of CatTwitter, and he was the guest of honor during the “Meows for Melanie: Smash the Pawtriarchy” virtual event. Thanks for supporting Melanie, Mr. Mayor! This race is getting more intense by the day, and we need your help to keep pace with the corporate establishment. Because the only way we’ll finally deliver for working families is by relying on people like you — not corporations or special interests — giving $10 or $25 at a time. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | See you on the campaign trail! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. subject: Breaking via NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
new extreme voter suppression law

---
**BREAKING from NPR: Arizona Republicans enact a controversial new proof-of-citizenship voting law **
Friend – this is not good: **Gov. Doug Ducey (R) just signed a racist voter suppression law that experts say could keep thousands of Arizona voters from the polls.**
We see right through this egregious attack on democracy. After Arizona sent Joe Biden to the White House and helped Democrats flip the Senate, the GOP started PANICKING. They know they can't win with their extremist ideas, so now they're trying to rig the next election.
**The only way we can fight back and protect the right to vote for all Americans is with a groundswell of grassroots support from folks like you. But time is running out, and we still haven't heard from you. Please, friend – take our live poll right now and let us know where you stand:**
**WILL YOU CONDEMN GOP ATTACKS ON VOTING RIGHTS?**

name: Dan Farough
subject: 211 days
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
We’re 211 days from Election Day, friend. That means we have to work hard now to make sure Jocelyn has the tools and resources to get re-elected in November so she can serve another four-year term as our Secretary of State.
If you’re reading this email, then you’re just like me. You know that Jocelyn is the best person for the job, and you know her re-election is a crossroads for democracy in our state. So give me your opinion, friend. What does this campaign need to focus on during these next 211 days?

Take the survey>> secure.ngpvan.com/Tp9MkGNeTEuyCWmTDuXzgg2 [secure.ngpvan.com/Tp9MkGNeTEuyCWmTDuXzgg2

Michigan is a big state with a heck of a lot of diverse opinions and people. Supporters like you,friend, are our boots on the ground - the best people to give us the insights on the issues that matter most to voters. As the chair of this campaign, I’ll take into account all your responses and deliver a campaign strategy that will take Jocelyn to victory in November.
So if you can spare a minute to two, fill out my campaign survey today. And if you have a message of support for Jocelyn, I’ll make sure she reads it.

Dan
Campaign Chair

clean_body: We’re 211 days from Election Day, friend. That means we have to work hard now to make sure Jocelyn has the tools and resources to get re-elected in November so she can serve another four-year term as our Secretary of State. If you’re reading this email, then you’re just like me. You know that Jocelyn is the best person for the job, and you know her re-election is a crossroads for democracy in our state. So give me your opinion, friend. What does this campaign need to focus on during these next 211 days? Take the survey>> secure.ngpvan.com/Tp9MkGNeTEuyCWmTDuXzgg2 [secure.ngpvan.com/Tp9MkGNeTEuyCWmTDuXzgg2 Michigan is a big state with a heck of a lot of diverse opinions and people. Supporters like you,friend, are our boots on the ground - the best people to give us the insights on the issues that matter most to voters. As the chair of this campaign, I’ll take into account all your responses and deliver a campaign strategy that will take Jocelyn to victory in November. So if you can spare a minute to two, fill out my campaign survey today. And if you have a message of support for Jocelyn, I’ll make sure she reads it. Dan Campaign Chair [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Republicans are trying to kick me off the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8348?t=6&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q) Friend,

Washington Republicans are making weak, partisan attempts at dismantling our campaign against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). First, they tried to kick me off of the ballot and give Sen. Grassley a free pass this election cycle - but they FAILED. Now, they've filed a lawsuit in _another_ desperate attempt to remove me from the ballot. **The GOP is clearly scared. Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable, and national Republicans are doubling down in their attacks on me because they know we can beat him.[I need your help to fight back and flip this seat blue. Will you please split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project? Whatever you give at this urgent moment will help us combat these GOP attacks, defeat Sen. Grassley and EXPAND our Democratic Senate majority!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8348?t=7&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q)** Grassroots Democrats like you have been working hard for months to fuel our race here in Iowa. From gathering petition signatures to showing up at events and hitting major fundraising milestones. It's ridiculous that the GOP is trying to delegitimize all of this hard work to keep their pal in office so he can continue doling out handouts to wealthy, corporate elites.

Friend, we're building a movement that will _ensure_ Sen. Chuck Grassley faces the toughest reelection challenge he's had in decades. His approval numbers are the lowest in decades - and the contrast between me and him is SO stark. We can _do_ this. In 2018, I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Now, you have my word: Nobody will work harder than I will to flip this Senate seat and ensure Democrats have a real, working majority in the Senate. **But I need you with me in this fight. As Republicans are still actively trying to kick me off the ballot, my friends at Voter Protection Project and I have set an emergency fundraising goal of $25,000 before midnight tonight.[Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now to fight back against the GOP, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand Democrats' Senate majority?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8348?t=8&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q)** Your support means everything. Together, I know that 2022 is the year that we can retire Chuck Grassley and give Iowans a voice back in the U.S. Senate.

Abby Finkenauer
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1728%2E878179%2EioAv0Q)
---

name: Team Gary
subject: re: Grassroots update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | **Friend — Did you see Gary’s email? We wanted to make sure that each of our top supporters saw his update about our Get Out The Vote Fund. ** Early voting starts in less than a month, and we’re hoping to raise another $3,000 today in order to jumpstart our GOTV Fund. Like Gary said, direct voter contact is what’s going to make the difference in the homestretch of this race. And it’s crucial our field team has the resources it takes to reach as many voters as possible. **So, what do you say? Will you help fuel the effort?[Chip in now to fuel our GOTV Fund.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/6135f67942ba9e2ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)** -Team Gary BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/8b7f243c475e9cf8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — We’re running a campaign for the U.S. Senate unlike any other. It’s a grassroots movement, powered by supporters like you. **

---
We were the first campaign to get organized in all 159 Georgia counties. We have the support of nearly half of all sheriffs across Georgia, more than 50 state legislators, and well over 100 local leaders. This team will not be outworked, and we’re coming up on a critical moment. Early voting gets started in less than a month... and it’s vital that we build up our Get Out The Vote Fund as soon as we can. **Will you contribute to the effort? Take action now. **
---
[**GOTV FUND: DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/fbc37d79152a3b1ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Every dollar raised helps us reach another voter with a phone call, a text, or a digital ad. And that direct voter contact is what’s going to make the difference in the primary in May, and again in November. **Our opponents are relying on out of state donors and elites... we’re depending on conservatives like you fueling our campaign with donations of $100, $50, or even just $5. ** **So I hope you’ll act now and help fund our Get Out The Vote efforts. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/d3fa29f0dd758bcec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**GOTV FUND: DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/61e7cc107cc44234c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/bd2d6754485e9943c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e8c2c16a3bdacaf6/e2c12ac9cfb55e7cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e8c2c16a3bdacaf6&d=32dc8eafd9c7ec53c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e8c2c16a3bdacaf6).
---

Athens, GA 30604

clean_body: WOW... I am so grateful for Elise Stefanik’s kind words. I was happy to receive her endorsement, but to hear her use my leadership as an example is humbling. | | WOW... I am so grateful for Elise Stefanik’s kind words. I was happy to receive her endorsement, but to hear her use my leadership as an example is humbling. | I will continue to use my experience in the State Senate as a veteran, Geriatric Nurse Practitioner, and Mom to help guide my decision-making for what is best for everyday Virginians. Our leadership in Washington has failed us, and Elaine Luria should shoulder as much blame as anyone else. It is not enough to have “just another candidate” against Elaine Luria; Virginia needs a leader. I am happy to be viewed as such, and I am ready to continue my hard work in Congress. | I appreciate Elise Stefanik’s support and all the support I have received along the way. With gratitude, Jen PAID FOR BY KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS Kiggans for Congress, P.O. Box 5042, Virginia Beach, VA 23471

name: Larry Hogan
subject: We defeated the worst gerrymandering in America.
body:
A big step forward for Maryland [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=67e800aec0ec4d25bf65a21c55696672&_e=zk_OBfvcggCgon6vrIq6hgW3PFzI6aziszaOZ8q2RzGBF4saT3vi7cEMCf8rfiSooeyxRYXQgkWxfIfsJN7mhUsRJwds05yQxJ0u3ek2i4E9oBoftCH6jA88nYFGC2vUTU_WX-td-n73i3Ckq8i08NqpL_y_hJesgemOURCkvQyw2-p2PRtnA3MRfafgrOi0gUcb1Kv23FY3wC-sGdnvRZUAjwIEzKjifgPaIdubqVkBJey4Fqq6Uahk8aQRjD9GTnNdxOGplGhDdppXXb5CweoQJFpXMcEkI_PsiEu2i04VWO_AeQsPxRMEi3H4bsdAcaSBFOhTGb1-Ks8oJ1DNi_cB3368AIEcm8GPMgVkadQ%3D) Friend, This is a win for Democracy. **I just signed new, fairer congressional maps for Maryland after we defeated the worst gerrymandered districts in America.** Partisan political players attempted to rig the system and draw unconstitutional maps in favor of Democrats, but we defeated them. This is the first Democratic map in the country that has been thrown out. It is a historic win in Maryland. [_**We can and we must spread this success across the country.**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=67e800aec0ec4d25bf65a21c55696672&_e=zk_OBfvcggCgon6vrIq6hgW3PFzI6aziszaOZ8q2RzGBF4saT3vi7cEMCf8rfiSooeyxRYXQgkWxfIfsJN7mhUsRJwds05yQxJ0u3ek2i4E9oBoftCH6jA88nYFGC2vUTU_WX-td-n73i3Ckq8i08GsdadA0qdfd2VlhNbHC5jkmV6C-SjfcBZiNL80bx0V-a4YuXvrL-8IA5zx4KtwkB2r2-viAVb_YmTrp3cTfstNFXt02Jhr-0tNnufVdEey8U0rOKjkP96U1lID4qow4jjGx8EecUSmD84xtoTTbJUBLd-cdWL1z8BMDYk8tCGOkPwgf70OtpTveyW8Hi6gVkFrB4l7q2IL3lIy2aSrfQEc%3D) I believe _**ALL**_ Americans have the right to free and fair elections, but we have to fight for it. Voters should be the ones who choose their representatives... not the other way around. [**Join An America United >> Donate Now**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=67e800aec0ec4d25bf65a21c55696672&_e=zk_OBfvcggCgon6vrIq6hgW3PFzI6aziszaOZ8q2RzGBF4saT3vi7cEMCf8rfiSooeyxRYXQgkWxfIfsJN7mhUsRJwds05yQxJ0u3ek2i4E9oBoftCH6jA88nYFGC2vUTU_WX-td-n73i3Ckq8i08Fa2fgEZy-N7BmDovJcI-rqOERb6Za3iOMPjXaW4FIZX2hhbQlFqV4SjUwRcOPvp9NLqEAfvHtt80Vs9qrNXPBqhi47Jdx7k-DuKlGF_BS58JL3_glniCs-IDijKpG0euapic3_efwDNgOww2aVcTf_TMKBtVQT7adJK7KhZBUTymWqy3TNHrVo1Sqrv_m2UNlLulkaNtAhp7_b9MAT12Dc%3D) _**Unconstitutional practices like gerrymandering are dangerous to our democracy.**_ We need leaders who will stand up for what is right to build faith in our system rather than political division. If we can make it happen in Maryland over and over again, we can help make it happen anywhere. Our hope is that the model of leadership that went into protecting Maryland's elections will help end gerrymandering across the country. ---
| | Peter, The radical Left is determined to teach young children warped ideas about sex and gender. The same people who tell us to “follow the science” are teaching our kids there’s more than two genders –– and that you can switch genders whenever you feel like it. **The worst part? Parents' are being left in the dark about all of this.**
Republican-led states like Florida and Texas are leading a nationwide movement to restore and protect parents’ rights in education. _It’s making the radical Left furious, and that means we’re doing the right thing._
---
| | [](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=79a0aa9880244700b89e19caa1602fcb&_e=5lVp0RxOiXyrcMzsu1GO50ZG_jrpna20paKwJK36LIU3Yu3n6OoOBrMvmthDjVOLyOMoUFbSoyqSJtl_EImZR-adkrZE-3nyXNXoAWfgW1FvKycBwm3lHKw5j4PGNRAuQJYeWvfbbZAhJ06h3AJI01tNchilT5Z_EJbcJFRo1n6s-L_1XlPNGJVBLJn6I7oecCEErLlYnTFOFfI4r_OXtPlMQx_rDGYJd94KRCxJdYwF-i8eKVkWdP0FR3O62l8w9c2l8yCCT6Bu076NkQYg0j-jPtIU3gEJkyIv-4LEiguw9SXCyUJ3jo2JQpRfdEo1SMAaqLbsT2ARaZH3bsl26oXiLRQwkfsjhda5MVAWN7cyuEIgBTo-KVV03MPmblzt4sCuMQdZfDbvXDwcv09_wJis7FPICnv-aUbbsyvu_zLOuZzuK2bmESiNaaMxsKF0I-Kek_74mq8wdcJlqa8J2FqeKv7j6LihbLmOB1hN3yjuEAWInM1cIWT8wWrMD-yN)

| | **As Governor, I’ll fight to protect parents’ rights and to keep the Left’s warped ideas out of our classrooms so our kids can focus on math, science, and reading.**

body:
**Opinion: "Rising prices are hurting Rhode Islanders"**
_\-- Seth Magaziner, Op-Ed, The Providence Journal_ "Rhode Islanders are grappling with the highest inflation rate in a generation, with the cost of everything from food and fuel to health care reaching all-time highs."

| [READ SETH'S OP-ED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846476/338955458/-1506491126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQwOGU1Zi1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NiiMTo3BUZDFXxXIeRkcT1_7g4woWCUk2aDNGlLgF3g=&emci=66f892e5-c1b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=64d08e5f-d3b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
---

Peter,

Rhode Islanders urgently need relief from the rising cost of living. Right now, even Rhode Islanders with good-paying jobs are getting squeezed by rising prices in food, essential goods, and housing -- just about everything.

The economy isn't working the way it should for middle class Americans. And we need Congress to tackle the issue head-on.

First, Congress needs to temporarily suspend the federal gas tax so Rhode Islanders can see immediate relief at the pump. Then, to combat any lost revenue from freezing the gas tax Congress should implement a minimum 15% tax on corporations and close loopholes that allow big businesses to shift profits overseas.

Also, Congress can lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate prices with the drug companies. This is just common sense and would help people make ends meet.

There are concrete things we can do to help people keep up and I'm ready to lead the fight in Congress.

[**Read my op-ed in _The Providence Journal_ to learn more about my plan to fight for Rhode Islanders by addressing the rising cost of living.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43846479/338955467/-1506491126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQwOGU1Zi1kM2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NiiMTo3BUZDFXxXIeRkcT1_7g4woWCUk2aDNGlLgF3g=&emci=66f892e5-c1b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=64d08e5f-d3b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)

Thank you,

Seth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: It's time for an immigration moratorium
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Close the Border or Lose America Forever. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066265?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0f39528c9c&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

_Our Southern Border isn’t just wide open, it’s gone. It’s been erased._

Remember: A nation without borders is no nation at all. _Millions _of aliens are invading _our _home, and they’re bringing drugs, crime, trash, and the Third World.

**If you have a Third World population, you have a Third World country.**

The Great Replacement is underway. Our government is engaged in ethnic cleansing against the majority population of our nation.

The Regime _hates_ the American people, so it has decided to _replace _us and elect a new people, a nation of aliens.

200, 300, 400, 500 thousand invaders pour into our country _every month_ , and those are just the official numbers.

The truth is even _worse_ than we know. We don’t have any idea how many people are in our country. They’re turning _our _country into a _stinking slum_ from coast to coast.

Just using the official numbers, America’s foreign-born population soared to over 46 million as of November. That means that Third World invaders now comprise over 14% of the population, a number which has tripled since 1970 and doubled since 1990.

_In Swing States like Florida, Michigan, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Nevada, the number of new, foreign-born voters already exceeds the 2016 margins of victory._

Last year, more people than the entire population of the City of Dallas and almost equal to that of San Diego illegally entered America. _If they were all held in one place, they would constitute the 9th largest city in America._

Last year’s illegal border crossers—the ones we know about—could completely displace the citizens of Irvine, Pittsburgh, Orlando, and St. Louis, all put together.

**Enough illegal aliens entered America in 2021 alone to equal or exceed all the Americans who live in each of ten U.S. States: Alaska; Delaware; Maine; Montana; New Hampshire; North Dakota; Rhode Island; South Dakota; Vermont; and Wyoming.**

And 2022 is already showing exponential increases over last year. This death spiral is rapidly accelerating, and if it is not stopped _now_ , America as a singular polity will be lost.

_**_All _immigration into our homeland, legal and illegal, _must_ end. We need a Total Immigration Moratorium, _yesterday_. We’ve got to build the Wall and deport every single illegal in this country—all _thirty_ _plus million_ of them. **_

[If elected, my very first priority will be introducing legislation for a 20-year Total Immigration Moratorium..](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e1113bf477&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our Republican politicians have had DECADES to solve the immigration crisis, only for it to continue __spiraling_ _ out of control_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=604a4efa02&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me, an __Immigration_ _ Patriot, defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4e4866330a&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e6f642fbe1&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2e0611ff9c&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain announces plan to permanently cut the PA gas tax in half
body:
McSwain pledged on Wednesday to cut the PA state gas tax by 50%. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-announces-plan-to-permanently-cut-the-pa-gas-tax-in-half?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 6, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain announces plan to permanently cut PA gas tax in half
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain today held a press conference in Pittsburgh to address Pennsylvania's highest in the nation gas tax and the burden of ever-rising gas prices brought about by Joe Biden, Tom Wolf and Josh Shapiro.

In his remarks, McSwain promised to permanently cut the PA gas tax by 50% as Governor, and stressed that temporary solutions are not enough. McSwain also shared his plan to restore fiscal responsibility to Pennsylvania by reducing the overall tax burden on hard working families and cutting wasteful government spending, so that hard working families can thrive.

McSwain emphasized the importance of electing a conservative outsider who will not allow career politicians to continue wasting taxpayer dollars while imposing crushing taxes on families:
---
|
> _**"Biden, Wolf, and Shapiro are far left, career politicians who offer no solutions when it comes to solving our economic problems here in Pennsylvania. Under Wolf, hard-working families across the Commonwealth have had to grapple with uncontrolled government spending, including the highest state gas tax in the nation. There is no such thing as government money. There is only the people's money, and Pennsylvanians deserve a Governor who will put them first.
>
> As Governor, I will permanently reduce the state gas tax by 50%, ****effectively repealing the tax increase put in place by career politicians in Harrisburg, including some of my opponents in this race. I will fight against intrusive big government policies and restore a business and family-friendly culture so that our economy can thrive. Better days are ahead for Pennsylvania, and I will lead us there." **_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| McSwain was introduced by former gubernatorial candidate and local businessman Jason Richey:
---
| **_"Pennsylvania needs a tough conservative outsider as Governor who won't back down in defense of hard-working citizens. I know that Bill McSwain will be that Governor. McSwain is the only candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro, the only candidate committed to permanently cutting the gas tax, and the candidate who will lead us into a new era of prosperity." _**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming a prosecutor, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=34a9097fa2&e=b1ec95759b)
###

name: USPS' DeJoy Update (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: He is a disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43853931/338992506/2029933579?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwN2ViNzk2LWY1YjUtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sACK84JlDyBydEgT6hTVXKQNFHQQ7XR0Lk1Grtm4Law=)

| The USPS is in **_UTTER TURMOIL_** because of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy -- so Joe Biden’s Attorneys General are acting now. **We know we can SAVE the Post Office from DeJoy’s clutches** , _but it’s going to take a coalition of 900 Democrats to keep the pressure on and urge him to resign._

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What do you want candidates to focus on this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Can you take a moment to fill in this quick survey? | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853978/338992721/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYxNDc4Ni1mNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SAF0_ZVamkuBall3WEtDkY-2_3SwnVrdpos4VkqgU0E=&emci=b7984f2d-e4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45614786-f5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s been a busy week in Washington. President Biden has extended the pause on student loan payments, we’re getting ready to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court, and you’ve helped make it all happen as a member of this team. Thank you for being in this fight. **But I’ve also got one eye on this year’s midterms elections.** Things are heating up: Texas already had their first round of voting, and four candidates we endorsed either won their primaries outright or made it to the runoff — woo-hoo Greg Casar, Jessica Cisneros, Jasmine Crockett, and Michelle Vallejo! And more elections are coming right up. **I’m getting ready to endorse more Democrats who are in this fight to put power in the hands of working people. But first, I want to hear from you.** [_**What are the top issues on your mind right now, and what do you want candidates to focus on this year? Fill in this quick survey to let me know — it should only take a couple of minutes, and it will go a long way to shape our work together for 2022.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853979/338992722/1671184564?refcode=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&ms=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYxNDc4Ni1mNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SAF0_ZVamkuBall3WEtDkY-2_3SwnVrdpos4VkqgU0E=&emci=b7984f2d-e4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45614786-f5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) By protecting and expanding our razor-thin Democratic majorities in the House and Senate, we can accomplish a whole lot more in Congress — including bypassing the Senate filibuster to defend the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted. And by electing strong progressive champions at the state and local level, we can drive progress on so many policy issues that touch people’s daily lives — like the schools they send their kids to, and the doctors they’re able to see. We can also fight back against the extreme right-wing assault on Constitutional freedoms in state houses across the country — from abortion rights to LGBTQ+ equality to voting rights. **I’m fired up — and I want to know what you’re fired up about, too.** [_**Please take a moment to fill in this survey. Your responses will help inform our work together in this powerfully important election year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853980/338992723/1671184564?refcode=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&ms=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYxNDc4Ni1mNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SAF0_ZVamkuBall3WEtDkY-2_3SwnVrdpos4VkqgU0E=&emci=b7984f2d-e4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45614786-f5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853981/338992724/1671184564?refcode=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&ms=EMZ4F_ISS_20220406_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYxNDc4Ni1mNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SAF0_ZVamkuBall3WEtDkY-2_3SwnVrdpos4VkqgU0E=&emci=b7984f2d-e4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45614786-f5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)**

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I want to see your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc

| Dear Fellow Patriot,
$4.4 MILLION dollars worth of TV advertising ads have just been booked in the Denver area by the House Democrats' chief political action committee. Democrats are desperate to maintain their majority by wooing Colorado voters, and We The People are determined to reclaim it!
These ads will saturate the airwaves in the 7th Congressional District, and this initial allocation being spent by the Democrat House Majority PAC in our neck of the woods this early in the midterm campaign season is the 3rd highest investment nationwide!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MVWCNSaTgDFx6NQ8WbXjYpJxIN2_ZYxsREhWhdU1m--4dOs1iVES2dLWrX6S4L1zx5B92T4o27kfp1pV0APR6_kl6lZOHyYPdVWu6LuNoolFdTayKySMjpISstVyxhJp6blFgqahLtxe0DlGYRVP2G9wbCihma1WWcKl81-TFFBZjLhD5WumnAxXjH-W5py2&c=_-gl32mUPJ6fw-8af3Fzbmv6JkTWLQTpaXO7wn3ByCaq-fkTyHlKjA==&ch=aIZ7qjA1hZYtgYUspIPo4YMylyWpkDCInlMmMSLnv6PctAVuqOD2_w==)
---
| The disastrous policies of the Radical Left Democrats cannot be allowed to continue, and that is why we cannot afford to be complacent about our victory in the upcoming midterm election. Uniting behind America First candidates is the only way to reverse the devastation at our southern border, the record high inflation, the indoctrination in our schools, and our shaken national sovereignty.
You can help be a part of this historical Red Wave today by performing THREE actions:

1. Show your support for my America First campaign by completing a Delegate Pledge [HERE ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MVWCNSaTgDFx6NQ8WbXjYpJxIN2_ZYxsREhWhdU1m--4dOs1iVES2aIuTtsJIV2LPzqKsBlAXisnetdlEsAArAX1ln_r7gHQH1Ua8OdYENkp8uzQpqdkmMAgiH1g0V4OQkKTv662mUtsUNnboVG5o3C96cD08XuDLQU1zYJ0pkw=&c=_-gl32mUPJ6fw-8af3Fzbmv6JkTWLQTpaXO7wn3ByCaq-fkTyHlKjA==&ch=aIZ7qjA1hZYtgYUspIPo4YMylyWpkDCInlMmMSLnv6PctAVuqOD2_w==)on my website.
2. Showing your support as a delegate by voting for me at the District Assembly on April 8th.
3. Make a donation of ANY amount to my campaign today to show your support for a Conservative majority power in Congress triumphing on Election Day!

As your next Congresswoman, I am eager to demonstrate the resolve that the American people have for Conservative values being upheld in government. Together we can show the Radical Left Democrats that all the money in the world will not help them hold onto the power they have exercised as corrupt tyrants! Power will return to the people with our Red Wave this year!
