clean_body: Democrats desperate to retain power! | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, $4.4 MILLION dollars worth of TV advertising ads have just been booked in the Denver area by the House Democrats' chief political action committee. Democrats are desperate to maintain their majority by wooing Colorado voters, and We The People are determined to reclaim it! These ads will saturate the airwaves in the 7th Congressional District, and this initial allocation being spent by the Democrat House Majority PAC in our neck of the woods this early in the midterm campaign season is the 3rd highest investment nationwide! | == | The disastrous policies of the Radical Left Democrats cannot be allowed to continue, and that is why we cannot afford to be complacent about our victory in the upcoming midterm election. Uniting behind America First candidates is the only way to reverse the devastation at our southern border, the record high inflation, the indoctrination in our schools, and our shaken national sovereignty. You can help be a part of this historical Red Wave today by performing THREE actions: 1. Show your support for my America First campaign by completing a Delegate Pledge my website. 2. Showing your support as a delegate by voting for me at the District Assembly on April 8th. 3. Make a donation of ANY amount to my campaign today to show your support for a Conservative majority power in Congress triumphing on Election Day! As your next Congresswoman, I am eager to demonstrate the resolve that the American people have for Conservative values being upheld in government. Together we can show the Radical Left Democrats that all the money in the world will not help them hold onto the power they have exercised as corrupt tyrants! Power will return to the people with our Red Wave this year! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Together we can triumph in restoring common sense governance for We The People! Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

To help level the playing field, Democrats Serve was born. Since launching in May 2021, of the 29 endorsed candidates who have appeared on a ballot so far, every single one has won their election.

For the 2022 midterms, the PAC has made endorsements nationwide in competitive elections, including: U.S. Senate Candidates Cheri Beasley (NC), Val Demings (FL), and Sarah Godlewski (WI); U.S. House Candidates Christina Bohannan (IA-01), Matt Castelli (NY-21), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Val Foushee (NC-06), Kara Hahn (NY-1), Jonathan Logemann (IL-17), Seth Magaziner (RI-02), Karin Norington-Reaves (IL-01), Ruben Ramirez (TX-15), and Tony Vargas (NE-2); Incumbent House Democrats Carolyn Bourdeaux (GA-07), Jahana Hayes (CT-05), Andy Kim (NJ-03), Tom Malinowski (NJ-07), Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01), Katie Porter (CA-45), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), Abigail Spanberger (VA-07), Elissa Slotkin (MI-08), Lauren Underwood (IL-14), and Susan Wild (PA-07); Gubernatorial Candidate Katie Hobbs (AZ); and Attorney General Candidate Aramis Ayala (FL).

If you’d like to support Democrats Serve, you can [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43847508/338959778/-1840301555?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.06_b1_crockett-invite_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.06_b1_crockett-invite_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExYTdkODc5LWQ1YjUtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N8CfoFI7BhXygjg88tBJUiZx30zb1wH3jX2pIdA9vTQ=) to make a donation.

body:
I know you've heard a lot from my team lately, but I just want to send one more message to say thank you.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43847511/338959812/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1212-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGE3ZDg3OS1kNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKOZwRod9j0VuHUUSqlmuSqstWtD4Wg5C4V_n9xyfo=)

Peter,

I know you've heard a lot from my team lately, but I just want to send one more message to say _thank you._
Because of regulations around legislative sessions, my team just entered a fundraising blackout. It's the second blackout of the year, so we've only had about three weeks to fundraise since the election year started.
**But over the span of just a few weeks, thousands of you have stepped up to contribute.** I'm happy to say that I reached my goal last night, and I won't have to make any budget cuts to our campaign.
**To keep in touch with me during the fundraising blackout, please consider following me at[@Michelle4NM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43847512/338959813/734040361?refcode=jtk1212-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGE3ZDg3OS1kNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKOZwRod9j0VuHUUSqlmuSqstWtD4Wg5C4V_n9xyfo=&emci=2a77dc22-48b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0da7d879-d5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [@michellelujangrisham](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43847513/338959814/327818179?refcode=jtk1212-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGE3ZDg3OS1kNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKOZwRod9j0VuHUUSqlmuSqstWtD4Wg5C4V_n9xyfo=&emci=2a77dc22-48b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0da7d879-d5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Instagram, or [Michelle Lujan Grisham](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43847514/338959815/391317458?refcode=jtk1212-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGE3ZDg3OS1kNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKOZwRod9j0VuHUUSqlmuSqstWtD4Wg5C4V_n9xyfo=&emci=2a77dc22-48b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0da7d879-d5b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Facebook.**
I know it may not seem like it now, but November is just around the corner, and I'm grateful to have such a strong grassroots team by my side.

Thank you again,

Michelle Lujan Grisham

| Peter,

Congratulations to the Amazon warehouse workers in Staten Island for successfully unionizing after overcoming innumerable obstacles along the way. This achievement is the first step toward a bigger movement fighting for worker’s rights across the country.

**As a former member of BCTGM Local 50G at the Kellogg’s plant here in Omaha, I unequivocally stand with union workers and I am committed to being a pro-union Congresswoman.**

clean_body: This achievement is the first step towards a bigger movement fighting for worker’s rights. | = | Peter, Congratulations to the Amazon warehouse workers in Staten Island for successfully unionizing after overcoming innumerable obstacles along the way. This achievement is the first step toward a bigger movement fighting for worker’s rights across the country. As a former member of BCTGM Local 50G at the Kellogg’s plant here in Omaha, I unequivocally stand with union workers and I am committed to being a pro-union Congresswoman. = It’s simple, Peter: we cannot have a full economic recovery without an economy that works for all of us. Fair wages, safe working environments, and time off should be non-negotiable. I am looking forward to being a Congresswoman who fights for all workers. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

| | |
# Weekly Update 4.6.2022
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends: **
This week we discuss Inflation and its impact on National Security. The Biden Administration has flooded our economy with an excess money supply in the short 15 months since inauguration, resulting in the highest inflation rate in more than 40 years. Now, his $5.79 trillion 2023 budget spews even more inflation-causing "COVID-relief" into our overheated economy as he seeks to pay for it with a brand new tax.

---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* This Week in Congress
* Alan on the Issues

---
| **Recent Events:**

Alan at the **Henry County GOP** meeting in McDonough on **Tuesday, April 5**
---
|
---
| Alan meeting with residents of **Henry County**
---
|
---
| Great turnout at the **Henry County GOP** meeting!
---
| **Upcoming Events:**
**Tuesday, April 12 th – 7:00 – 9:00 PM**: Alan is speaking at the **Oglethorpe GOP** meeting. Please join us at the **Oglethorpe Public Library** located at 115 Chatham St, Oglethorpe, GA 31068

**Wednesday, April 13 th – 6:00 – 8:00 PM**: Alan is looking forward to participating in the **College Republicans Forum** at the **UGA Miller Learning Center** in Room 102. The UGA Miller Learning Center’s address is 48 Baxter St, Athens, GA 30602. It will be a great Forum, hope to see you there.
---
|
**VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary! Early Voting begins May 2nd!**

---
| **This week in Congress:**
Last week Congress received President Biden’s $5.79 trillion [budget](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=425cee6419&e=bcd0e72a5a) for 2023 a month behind schedule, which includes requests for more Covid aid despite [states still having billions](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=c0a44db344&e=bcd0e72a5a) of unspent federal dollars in their coffers from past stimulus and recovery bills. If that is not bad enough, the president also seems to have made his calculations assuming that some version of his ‘Build Back Better’ legislation had passed, despite it being stalled in Congress. The president also wants a minimum 20% tax on income and unrealized capital gains for families worth more than $100 million. The House passed the MORE Act, which would legalize marijuana at the federal level and impose an initial 5% tax on purchases. The bill would need 60 votes to break a Senate filibuster, where the prospects for passage are not strong. Members of the Senate negotiated and [agreed](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=7ffbd9a300&e=bcd0e72a5a) to a deal for $10 billion in pandemic aid, half the size that the White House requested. The lack of funding for international vaccine efforts has angered Democrats and could complicate passage in the House.
---
| **Alan on the Issues:** **Inflation and Economic Security**

Economic security is a pillar of our national security. Inflation and stagflation are threats to our economic security, and put the well-being of our families, businesses, and institutions in jeopardy.

**Key Takeaways:**
* Out-of-control inflation is beginning to hurt small businesses, farms, and American families
* Current skyrocketing inflation is a direct result of failed policies emplaced by Biden
* The U.S. annual inflation rate reached 7.9% in February 2022 – the highest rate in 40 years
* This inflation would undoubtedly worsen with passage of Biden’s “Build Back Better” Act

---
| [CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Inflation and Economic Security](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=24153fbf48&e=bcd0e72a5a "CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Inflation and Economic Security")

subject: Ser y Hacer

body:
There are many stories of Joe’s tireless leadership for Galveston, and one is as American as it gets. It can be described in one word: “Citizenship.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13618798?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=b0871a9709&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Joe’s campaign for Texas Attorney General has for two years promoted a [**transformative platform**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=05818db421&e=5d8d80652b) — and one priority that Texans of all political backgrounds applaud is that Texas Government must respect local decision making authority.

Cities, counties and school boards are the best government because they are the most responsive forms of government. **They truly represent the people.**

Joe knows what he’s talking about here because he served as Galveston Mayor, Mayor Pro Tem, Council Member District Three, Wharves Board Trustee, Park Board Trustee and Chairman of the City of Galveston Ethics Commission for a combined 14 years of service to his city.

There are many stories of Joe’s tireless leadership in his service to Galveston, and one is as American as it gets. **It can be described in one word: “Citizenship.”**

**In fact, Magdalena’s testimonial says it best:**

_"In 2012, Ser y Hacer Galveston program was created by Magdalena Alvarado and Mary Longoria. There was no meeting room to meet, but the heart and soul of this organization was not going to let that to stop them from helping the community. Mr. Jaworski opened the doors to this organization to promote U.S. citizenship, and help the community. His support helped many people reach their dream of becoming citizens from this country. USCIS District Director Sandy Heathman was very glad to meet with Mr. Jaworski, Chief Leeroy Amador, and Galveston ISD Superintendent Mr. Larry Nichols to discuss the logistics of having the Galveston community begin preparation classes with a citizenship information focus, and interviewed on the island.

The seed was planted by this first group and Ser y Hacer continues to work with the community knowing that Mr. Jaworski continues to be
supportive of the needs of Galveston. Ser y Hacer will forever be grateful to Joe Jaworski for always listening to the Galveston community."_

_**— Magdalena Alvarado**_

_Pictured above is the first class that passed the first Ser y Hacer citizenship class and proceeded to become U.S. citizens. _

**It's simple: Joe cares and he gets things done. And that's what he will do as our Texas AG.**

[**Donate today to help us elect Joe as our next Texas Attorney General.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=443cd950c5&e=5d8d80652b) All the best, — Team Jaworski

\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Vice President Kamala Harris**
**Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM
---
---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this year’s midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can’t break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That’s why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that’s why I’m coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won’t sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That’s why it’s so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it’ll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you’re able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala
---
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
---
---
Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate

First, let me say: Last year, right here in Wisconsin, the child tax credit was estimated to benefit **_over one million children._**

If Senator Johnson can't support programs that will directly help Wisconsin families feed, clothe, and shelter their children, perhaps he shouldn't run for re-election. Rep. Bryan Steil is just as culpable -- he voted against the American Rescue Plan, the very law that expanded the child tax credit to what it is today.

**In Congress, I will do everything in my power to support and extend the child tax credit, because I believe that this credit isn't a handout, it's a life raft.**

**[But first, I need to get to Washington. clean_body: | Friends, Want to see what happens when we elect lawmakers without an ounce of compassion? Check this out: | = First, let me say: Last year, right here in Wisconsin, the child tax credit was estimated to benefit over one million children. If Senator Johnson can't support programs that will directly help Wisconsin families feed, clothe, and shelter their children, perhaps he shouldn't run for re-election. Rep. Bryan Steil is just as culpable -- he voted against the American Rescue Plan, the very law that expanded the child tax credit to what it is today. In Congress, I will do everything in my power to support and extend the child tax credit, because I believe that this credit isn't a handout, it's a life raft. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This is one of many, many reasons we cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the House or the Senate. name: Alex Walker
subject: I'm gay

body:
I’m Alex Walker, and I’m running for Congress to beat extremist Republican Lauren Boebert in Colorado.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854549/338994854/-1630035065?refcode=20220406_CGVA_Walker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWFjODE5ZC1mOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYMA54OZgKQtLbw2fS3cdaGgEnoPhQS_1DVsGhwKjdk=)
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854550/338994855/353151928?refcode=20220406_CGVA_Walker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWFjODE5ZC1mOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYMA54OZgKQtLbw2fS3cdaGgEnoPhQS_1DVsGhwKjdk=) I have a confession: I’m gay. I know – shocker! But guess who, for some weird, creepy reason is obsessed with it? **Colorado Congresswoman Lauren Boebert.** And that bothers me. You see, lawmakers have been targeting the LGBTQ+ community for years, but with the help of extremists like Boebert, they’re finally breaking through. Texas has outlawed all gender affirming medical care for transgender teenagers. In Iowa, their governor just signed a bill banning transgender girls and women from competing in women’s sports. And **right here in Colorado, our own representative is fighting against the Equality Act** , a bill that would outlaw discrimination based on sexual orietation and/or gender identity. **She even claims that a law that gives us equal rights encourages the “supremacy of gays.”** This is not a joke. She literally said that. And when LGBTQ+ kids see this coming out of an elected official's mouth, it’s harmful. They feel scared. They feel isolated. They feel ashamed. According to the Trevor Project, a young person identifying as LGBTQ+ attempts suicide every 45 seconds. And what Lauren Boebert does makes it worse. That’s why I’m running against her. Because **we deserve leaders who understand what it’s like for people struggling with their identity, mental health, or just coping with the ups and downs of a crazy world.** We deserve leaders with empathy who work hard to solve actual problems facing real Coloradans. I know it’s tacky... but in order for us to build the team we need **to beat Boebert, we’re going to need your help.** [_**Anything you can give means the world to me and my campaign. Will you join us by splitting a contribution between this campaign and CommonGood to help us kickstart our quarterly fundraising efforts?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854551/338994856/353151928?refcode=20220406_CGVA_Walker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWFjODE5ZC1mOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYMA54OZgKQtLbw2fS3cdaGgEnoPhQS_1DVsGhwKjdk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854552/338994857/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWFjODE5ZC1mOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYMA54OZgKQtLbw2fS3cdaGgEnoPhQS_1DVsGhwKjdk=) | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854553/338994858/-1630035065?refcode=20220406_CGVA_Walker&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWFjODE5ZC1mOGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYMA54OZgKQtLbw2fS3cdaGgEnoPhQS_1DVsGhwKjdk=)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Another Sellout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Peter: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60060720:6twYBCopN:m:1:3253819041:1FE22536820437264F79F00766D233CB:r)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
**[Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60060720:6twYBCopN:m:1:3253819041:1FE22536820437264F79F00766D233CB:r)**
_You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year.
**[Let 's make this latest sellout the last one we ever see.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60060720:6twYBCopN:m:1:3253819041:1FE22536820437264F79F00766D233CB:r)**
Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund

clean_body: | | | | Peter: They did it again. Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates. And what did they do? Nothing. Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children. What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire. You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do. The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs! In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country: MO BROOKS in Alabama; JOSH MANDEL in Ohio; TED BUDD in North Carolina; ADAM LAXALT in Nevada; and Senators MIKE LEE , RAND PAUL , and RON JOHNSON. Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America. SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter. You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact. If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year. Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund | PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES** | | "DONATE" Senate Conservatives Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 | Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Peter,
Remember in October 2020, when the news story about Hunter Biden’s laptop broke just before Election Day?
* The Fake News denied it.

**This is an election year, friend****!!**
This means the GOP is going to do whatever it takes to regain power, even if it means destroying our democracy and this country. _Big Lie?! Big load of crap, if you ask me._
**But if Democrats don't get their act together ASAP, we could be in for a rude awakening come November.**** Republicans are going to use their dirty tricks to snag control of Congress for themselves, and if that becomes reality, we can kiss the progress we've made under President Biden goodbye.**

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
before Donald Trump and his pal Madison Cawthorn rally for their hand-picked candidate Ted Budd on Saturday...
#

We want to show just how strong the grassroots support for Cheri Beasley and our campaign is before Donald Trump and his pal Madison Cawthorn rally for their hand-picked candidate Ted Budd on Saturday.
They’re here for one thing: to fire up their far-right base to defeat us. So, we need to prove our campaign has what it takes to go toe to toe with them and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat.
**[That’s why we need 5,000 people to endorse Cheri Beasley before Trump’s rally starts on Saturday. Will you add your name to the list by personally endorsing Cheri?](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/cb-em-personal-endorsement-apr22/?source=em220406-1-T2T3&refcode2=673.357359.m3ZFeK&akid=673%2E357359%2Em3ZFeK)**

It may seem like a small action. But something as simple as signing on to say you support Cheri makes a real difference.
It sends a message that we won’t stand by while Donald Trump and special interest super PACs try to buy this seat.
When you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Cheri, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives and building a brighter future — and that’s something worth fighting for.
So what do you say?
**[Add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate. Please help us reach 5,000 signers before Trump’s rally on Saturday.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/cb-em-personal-endorsement-apr22/?source=em220406-1-T2T3&refcode2=673.357359.m3ZFeK&akid=673%2E357359%2Em3ZFeK)**

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: ICYMI: Seriously, dude?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Politics deserves the bad reputation it has, and it will only change when better people represent us.
#
Derek,
I really need everyone to see João’s email yesterday about his (Democratic!) opponent’s super PAC spreading lies about what we stand for. **🤢 **[Good news though — it was taken down in Philly for being so dishonest!]
Derek, it would break this mama’s heart if any of my kids grew up to play dirty in any career, sport, etc. **We must be better as a party and as people.** Politics deserves the bad reputation it has, and it will only change when better people represent us.
**[We’re getting that done the *right* way — one grassroots donation at a time. Do you think you can add $5 or any amount now to help John + our 100% people-powered campaign fight back?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&t=1&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)**
I’m so, so proud of our strong, clean, KIND campaign. No yucky corporate PACs or dirty money. _Definitely_ no attacking fellow Democrats with B.S. GOP talking points. Just people coming together + fighting for what’s right.
—Gisele ❤️
P.S. August’s shirt says it all. Can you believe my baby turned 8 yesterday?! We’re raising our kids (and growing our campaign) with kindness.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&t=2&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)
_\----Forwarded Message----
_ From: John Fetterman
Date: April 5, 2022
Subject: Seriously, dude?
Derek,
As Democrats, we all know that Republicans *love* to smear Democrats as scary bogeyman “socialists.”
**Well, uh, today we found out that Connor Lamb’s super PAC is spending nearly <checks notes> half a MILLION dollars in dark money on TV attack ads to do JUST THAT to me.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&t=3&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)
_The whole ad is full of gross misrepresentations, especially the fact that they found a rare photo of me wearing a suit_ 🙄
This is a *big* deal, Derek. It’s the FIRST time that a fellow Democrat has weaponized paid media to attack me during this primary. I mean, come on my dude.
Call me crazy, but I don't believe that Democrats should be doing the GOP’s job for them — _and certainly not with stone-cold attack lines straight outta the Republicans 101 textbook._ 🤔
**[If you believe the same thing I do, can you please rush $5 now to help me respond to this baseless attack? We gotta raise as much money as possible TODAY to show Conor Lamb + his super PAC that these dumb attacks are going to backfire.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&t=4&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&amounts=5&t=23&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)**
Derek, I truly can’t think of a greater contrast to these super PAC attack ads than our people-powered campaign.
I mean, Conor Lamb’s super PAC is *literally* run by D.C. insiders with deep ties to corporate interests + funded by mega-rich donors writing enormous checks.
Meanwhile, just this morning, we announced raising $3.1 MILLION in Q1 with an average contribution of like $28 and over 23,000 new donors. Plus, unlike Conor Lamb’s campaign, we are up on the airwaves (TV + digital) getting our own *positive* message across.
Let me be clear: **Conor Lamb’s super PAC ad is one last desperate attempt to save a campaign that’s stuck at 10% as of the last poll.**
It won’t work — especially if we can raise a lot of money today online to make it clear these kinds of attacks on fellow Democrats are B.S. and will backfire. Every dollar they spend ($440k as of this morning), we’ll try to raise twice as much to show them what we’re made of.
It’s not an exaggeration to say our campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
**[Are you with me on that? Then donate $5 now to help us fend off these phony attacks from Conor Lamb’s super PAC and show that they only make us stronger heading into the general election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46349?refcode=em20220406-5284&t=24&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)**
Before I sign off, I have to tell you how grateful I am.
It’s only because of this community, and because of the deep support we have in every corner of Pennsylvania, that we can brush off these attacks and live to fight another day in the General. Me + Gisele + the whole team are deeply appreciative of all your support, whether it’s been financial, volunteer help, or spreading the word about our campaign. It means the world. 😭
Thank you, again, for having my back. Let’s WIN this together.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220406-5284-footer&t=25&refcode2=5284_434096_KaSRUK&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5284%2E434096%2EKaSRUK)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hello,
This is very simple: **Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas did not recuse himself from a decision to provide his wife’s text messages to the January 6th committee.**
In fact, Clarence Thomas was the only Justice on the Supreme Court AGAINST providing his wife’s messages to the January 6th committee. How is _that_ not a massive conflict of interest?
Even if you ignore the fact that Ginny Thomas – a Supreme Court justice’s wife – was texting White House chief of staff Mark Meadows and spouting the Big Lie just days after the election... Why would Clarence Thomas not recuse himself? What’s the big deal?
If you’re thinking there should be laws against this type of thing, you’d be right. There _are_ laws against this nonsense. **If Clarence Thomas is not willing to recuse himself from all future cases involving the 2020 presidential election and the January 6th committee, then he must resign!**
I served our country across the globe for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I took an oath to protect our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic. My Republican opponent Chuck Grassley continues to peddle the Big Lie in an attempt to gain favor with the GOP’s overlord Donald Trump.
And Trump is repaying him: He already came to Iowa to host a rally for Grassley, patting him on the shoulder and saying, ”Thanks, Chuck.”
The polls show I can defeat Chuck Grassley. His approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been in every poll. **But Senate control is going to be decided here in Iowa, and that’s why Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to spend attacking me.**
**In order to fight back and win, we need to raise another $12,500 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still short. If I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue in ‘22, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43855133/338997776/-42398318?refcode=em20220406pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGFmMGQ0Yi1mZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CvxpsSjBl467cqw6R9Z5kOximMmMnEk704fo060Ls4=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hello, This is very simple: Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas did not recuse himself from a decision to provide his wife’s text messages to the January 6th committee. In fact, Clarence Thomas was the only Justice on the Supreme Court AGAINST providing his wife’s messages to the January 6th committee. How is that not a massive conflict of interest? Even if you ignore the fact that Ginny Thomas – a Supreme Court justice’s wife – was texting White House chief of staff Mark Meadows and spouting the Big Lie just days after the election... Why would Clarence Thomas not recuse himself? What’s the big deal? If you’re thinking there should be laws against this type of thing, you’d be right. There are laws against this nonsense. If Clarence Thomas is not willing to recuse himself from all future cases involving the 2020 presidential election and the January 6th committee, then he must resign! I served our country across the globe for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I took an oath to protect our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic. My Republican opponent Chuck Grassley continues to peddle the Big Lie in an attempt to gain favor with the GOP’s overlord Donald Trump. And Trump is repaying him: He already came to Iowa to host a rally for Grassley, patting him on the shoulder and saying, ”Thanks, Chuck.” The polls show I can defeat Chuck Grassley. His approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been in every poll. But Senate control is going to be decided here in Iowa, and that’s why Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to spend attacking me. In order to fight back and win, we need to raise another $12,500 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still short. | | There’s some breaking and historic news on the unionizing front, Peter! Last Friday, employees at one of Amazon’s largest warehouses voted overwhelmingly to form the company’s very first union. Amazon has been notoriously anti-union, reportedly spending upwards of $4 million on union busting consultants in 2021 alone. These workers overcame big money and major odds to earn a victory that instantly earned an important place in US labor history, and set a nationwide example of what’s possible even in the face of a massive corporate onslaught. Wins like this one also underscore the importance of the PRO Act, and why we’ve got to keep pushing to get it passed in the Senate right away. This landmark legislation is key to America’s future, and can ensure workers are able to unionize without interference from their employers. If we get the PRO Act passed, I’m willing to guarantee that Amazon warehouse won’t be the only one unionizing its workforce. _**[We’re collecting signatures to show my colleagues on Capitol Hill just how popular the PRO Act is, and why it’s important we get it to the President’s desk immediately. Add your name if you agree that we need to pass the PRO Act now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43849049/338967025/132632813?refcode=em_20220406_p_a_union&ms=em_20220406_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ2MzEyZi1kY2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iH8I0Oo9yvYqI1AMAgclNCPGQfcF2ze5OqKiz2qZAqo=&emci=d321e1ef-b4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9ad6312f-dcb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926)**_ Around this time last year, I organized a delegation of members of Congress to visit an Amazon warehouse in Bessemer, Alabama. Peter, we saw firsthand how their workers were also determined to unionize, in spite of the company’s union-busting tactics. In fact, Amazon’s interference was found to be so unethical that the warehouse is now conducting its second union election after the results from the first were thrown out. Every detail of what’s happening at these Amazon warehouses all over the country demonstrate why we need the Senate to pass the PRO Act as soon as possible. Our country’s labor laws are badly outdated, and it’s past time for Congress to do something to level the playing field for workers everywhere. [_**Peter, sign your name if you agree the Senate must make the PRO Act needs to become the law of the land.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43849053/338967029/132632813?refcode=em_20220406_p_a_union&ms=em_20220406_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ2MzEyZi1kY2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iH8I0Oo9yvYqI1AMAgclNCPGQfcF2ze5OqKiz2qZAqo=&emci=d321e1ef-b4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9ad6312f-dcb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) Let’s go!

Around this time last year, I organized a delegation of members of Congress to visit an Amazon warehouse in Bessemer, Alabama. Peter, we saw firsthand how their workers were also determined to unionize, in spite of the company’s union-busting tactics. In fact, Amazon’s interference was found to be so unethical that the warehouse is now conducting its second union election after the results from the first were thrown out. Every detail of what’s happening at these Amazon warehouses all over the country demonstrate why we need the Senate to pass the PRO Act as soon as possible. Our country’s labor laws are badly outdated, and it’s past time for Congress to do something to level the playing field for workers everywhere. Let’s go! | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

name: Herschel Walker

You’ll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. You'll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. |
---
Peter,

**_The New York Times_ just attacked me.**

You'd think they would focus on important topics like 40-year high inflation, President Biden's disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, or the record number of illegal immigrants crossing our Southern border.

Instead, they want to talk about my high school report card, how bad of a candidate I am, and why I shouldn't be a senator because I'm not a career politician.

No, seriously. Their headline says it all.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a47356b10314e9583927073dde8d69e&_e=Op-2XRt_nECXjfUw7At9nLc5My3JLLj21vzbc1nex2GcuJRmTVHpP_8OdGFsHka3mkhH4fxXS5qZZyItY8vz0bPZ0yg_SewX1TBQLJG-khCj69oM0RJ_qjvEXALeba3cNDI1Zq2FQRxj4ufXcnvwSL-DqnBrDwTp4ywa4n2S1hl1EJ1jwo5m0vSJC_MvFHjBqFMxmrWYfMihYCG_0i9fXD0snOhvS7LgVx2RCFVAwfU6sDBdVtiyCPf0GjKSdiiRAessOvnowQmE7jktpoCEOt1S-yrsO7FjXG-PuTJPafUsvGLd91P5-VDamq-smmb4wnZ7KNCPsKDthg9eUskNHvMS0AFSROE-gWIa8kNJ6DPQOI58Cdma3DLq1qAvAMWwwjIEKpISN-qCCtJaZPZGSEzyyo7ekxomZqudM1jpwAlM729kFFpHCsuGRsdkP5RoJcFbrAe1EJR9vlG-e-HGOCEmqI1tgnvq_hCiCXlXihsnKpHGKZoq_cQg62QuimBbhEDtz9GT1FUOBPZIXh63c8GRcECc1JNnZdk3DRefD_3vQwqTwvVMywpQdYVytDRfr3Y1GCITI6WCAtMDhGR0ZcCJn0M3BZTTHHk29VvxAfE%3D)
There's a saying in conservative circles that is truer today than ever:

**_If_ The New York Times _is attacking you, you must be doing something right._ **
The media bias is out of control in America and in our race. CNN, _The New York Times_ , and _The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ have been attacking us since before the campaign even started. They've collectively written over 30 hit pieces about us while only writing one semi-challenging piece about our Democrat opponent.

**Growing up, my coaches taught us that when the other side double-teams a player or changes their defensive scheme to focus on one key offensive player, it's because they respect -_or fear_ - the abilities of that outstanding player.**

The same is true in politics. The Democrats and their allies in the media are double-teaming me because they're scared of losing the Senate race in Georgia.

But they clearly don't know me very well. **I WON'T BACK DOWN.**

**[Peter, will you stand with us and push back against the media bias?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a47356b10314e9583927073dde8d69e&_e=Op-2XRt_nECXjfUw7At9nLc5My3JLLj21vzbc1nex2GcuJRmTVHpP_8OdGFsHka3mkhH4fxXS5qZZyItY8vz0bPZ0yg_SewX1TBQLJG-khCj69oM0RJ_qjvEXALeba3cNDI1Zq2FQRxj4ufXcnvwSL-DqnBrDwTp4ywa4n2S1hl1EJ1jwo5m0vSJC_MvFHjBqFMxmrWYfMihYCG_0i9fXD0snOhvS7LgVx2RCFVAwfU6sDBdVtiyCPf0GjKSdiiRAessOvnowQmE7jktpoCEOt1S-yrsO7FjXG-PuTJPafUsvGLd91P5-VDamq-smmb4wnZ7KNCPsKDthg9eUskNHvMS0AFSROE-gWIa8kNJ6DPQOI58Cdma3DLq1qAvAMWwwjIEKpISN-qCCtJaZPZGSNaoHpE02JSKSj-8i0QBj7j_XlhhI30Ar3JXDYcBMClvf11xEso5jf5A0tKKcfWIxCBsqPCt102FfnnUaJ4u10xJSe4AfKx0Q4_uPHXlVVZBuAstWBGhNRUIFKRNseiUGoPyQCl_W6ILudg3THYXB__vkD-36tB8CDsY_asPX9SeQAEEwbGP3AgRJP93IWgIeuVosCxfXLFtJeHBuTislKY%3D)**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: The GOP are trying to kick me off the ballot because they know I can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Here's what you need to know:
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

For the last week, Republicans have been trying to desperately kick me off the ballot because they're scared I'll defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and prevent Mitch McConnell and his allies from taking back the Senate. **Here's what you need to know:**
**_FIRST,_** Republicans tried to get me kicked off the ballot by challenging my petition signatures.
**_THEN,_ **their desperate attempt to disqualify me FAILED after a bipartisan panel rejected their challenge.
**_BUT NOW,_ **Washington Republicans filed a lawsuit asking a judge to have me removed from the ballot anyway!
Peter, it's not only ridiculous – it’s _undemocratic_ that the GOP is trying to delegitimize our grassroots campaign. They know I can win because I’ve done it before. I was the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue and I beat a man who was an incumbent more than twice my age.

The GOP is watching our movement grow again, and with Sen. Grassley facing RECORD-LOW approval, they’re scared we'll flip this seat blue and ensure Democrats maintain control of the Senate. **They should be scared. We are going to win this.**
**However, these attacks are only the beginning, and the Senate Republican campaign has more than $41 million in the bank to _keep_ attacking me. [We need a major surge in grassroots resources to fight back, and we still haven't closed in on our emergency $50,000 fundraising goal: please, will you donate $5 or more now to defeat Sen. clean_body: Here's what you need to know: | | | Hi Peter, For the last week, Republicans have been trying to desperately kick me off the ballot because they're scared I'll defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and prevent Mitch McConnell and his allies from taking back the Senate. Here's what you need to know: FIRST, Republicans tried to get me kicked off the ballot by challenging my petition signatures. THEN, their desperate attempt to disqualify me FAILED after a bipartisan panel rejected their challenge. BUT NOW, Washington Republicans filed a lawsuit asking a judge to have me removed from the ballot anyway! Peter, it's not only ridiculous – it’s undemocratic that the GOP is trying to delegitimize our grassroots campaign. They know I can win because I’ve done it before. I was the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue and I beat a man who was an incumbent more than twice my age. The GOP is watching our movement grow again, and with Sen. Grassley facing RECORD-LOW approval, they’re scared we'll flip this seat blue and ensure Democrats maintain control of the Senate. They should be scared. We are going to win this. However, these attacks are only the beginning, and the Senate Republican campaign has more than $41 million in the bank to keep attacking me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Your support means everything. Together, I know that 2022 is the year that we can retire Chuck Grassley and give Iowans their voice back in the U.S. Senate. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Make friends while making a difference [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=18924a57a1ad4186a6e9895e52872a4d&_e=_Mh3Cj-uZueMXtegPOPOlme7JG88-FIQuu7G8fqKOXGbK9F9an9oQVX-DIGbC1-2I2vQd8OBAuok2tI3yivPPDMIcbRtcOCHXGrNOkSvv4BI3ht4cqPLKrjaLAhuUCA6PNTT-Qv2Nd3OU80MJJCDc_hd99jmEJc91P_s-coBYYlmaARarSBhg-40axDXZ65IyTTNlGo5PKdnpylNeUQWmpXGb3-GJMZxd3Ep7SmxKKAspee25W97Zh965FBpOFRTp66lEKrTqw70T72J9olfIQ%3D%3D) Peter, I wanted to reach out to you about some great opportunities coming up to get involved with Matt’s campaign and make an impact in our community. We’ll be at Campaign HQ again, so stop by to join Matt for a slice, and join the fight as we call voters throughout the district to spread Matt’s message. **WHEN:** Monday, April 11 from 5PM - 7PM **WHERE:** 1362 Thousand Oaks Blvd, Thousand Oaks, CA These events are a great way to make friends while making a positive impact, and I hope you can make it! body:

This week, election integrity champion Captain Seth Keshel announced his endorsement of Dr. John Di Paola | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d3eee46a04c4/wl0w2dvf9x-15925550?e=b369608f84)

| |
---
| |
### **CAPT. SETH KESHEL ENDORSES DR. JOHN DI PAOLA FOR U.S. CONGRESS (OR-05)**
---
| WILSONVILLE, OR (APRIL 6, 2022)— This week, election integrity champion Captain Seth Keshel announced his endorsement of Dr. John Di Paola for Oregon’s Fifth Congressional District.

“In the fight for medical freedom, retired surgeon Dr. John Di Paola stands above the crowd in promoting liberty over mandates,” stated Keshel.

“He will wholeheartedly oppose all forms of medical tyranny, work to implement any federal components of the 10 points to true election integrity, and fight to protect Oregon’s economy from environmental overreach. He has my endorsement for OR-5.”

Captain Seth Keshel, who was recognized by former President Donald Trump as an election integrity champion and served in the United States Army working in intelligence, is a well-known expert in the fields of election integrity and fraud.

To learn more about Dr. John Di Paola, please visit [DipaolaForCongress.com](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=32ccd23874&e=b369608f84)

Hi there, team. As we gear up for a general election fight this November, this phase of the campaign will be critical for building relationships with Pennsylvania voters across PA-01. While Ashley is hard at work on the campaign trail, she often hears stories of families struggling to keep up with the cost of healthcare, childcare, rent, education, and more. These stories are familiar to Ashley’s own experience growing up, and why she’s running for Congress. To understand what issues Ashley should focus on and fight for in Washington, we want to know your top priorities. name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Conservatives Dominate in Local Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=1)
---
## **Conservatives Dominate in Local Elections**
While Democrats try to [ _hang their hats_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TteBNAQXAm-1eoRX2n9Yh0d_msAakgID6YXPeLY2_1hCf9XF_2LraSdqrha7ZPeGKil7mJeiRFlgrweJQ29GDpWKNGN3o4XM7xPRSsbUSnFp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=2) on winning a mayoral race in a city where their party has routinely carried 80 percent of the vote, the enthusiasm for conservatives was clear in last night’s Spring Election. Across the state, **conservatives were successful in roughly two-thirds of the races in which we were active** , including swing and Democrat leaning areas. This success was a testament to the strength of the grassroots Republican operation, including the infrastructure provided by our county parties, and Wisconsinites’ frustration with harmful and divisive curriculum in our schools, attacks on [ _election integrity_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tug1U98m5fTMwfqRZPKhlPjRqHmXw73_7XF_ep0I99IRQ0-nZpJOE3h5_H0XZSKqIOh0kH47sPNV0p10kuuQWGLPRb9psSnQ0K4zknYdiqTT&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=3), and far-left overreach from liberal local elected officials. **Some highlights from last night’s election include:**
* Maria Lazar’s victory marked the second time an Evers appointee was defeated in the Second District Appellate Court.
* Samantha Kerkman became the first woman, and [_reportedly_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TnfNR2Os07bazRql6v4pW4ZEPMTuxwDohPWUbfksuNUC9Nx3i-kPwYiz5Pw52OVaiJlJOZYpus1B4EbCfdSKM-gZd4Yo-TV19U8HqsCqSRX7&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=4) the first Republican, elected as Kenosha County Executive in a historically Democrat county.
* A conservative was elected County Executive in Portage County, the heavily Democrat area once known as Dane County North.
* After Democrats spent about $100,000 on digital advertising on three Green Bay City Council seats, conservatives won two of those three seats and a majority on the council.
* **Adams, Calumet, Door, Kenosha, Marathon, Rock, and St. Croix counties all flipped their County Boards. An additional 9 County Boards are now within 3 seats of a Conservative majority.**
* Conservatives nearly doubled their seats on the 30-person La Crosse County Board, going from seven seats to 13 and nearly flipping control.
* **Every targeted Conservative candidate won their School Board elections in Cedarburg, Elmbrook, Manitowoc, Menomonee Falls, Germantown, Wausau, Oconomowoc, Whitnall, Waukesha, Altoona, Amery, New London, Neenah, West Bend.... and many others!**
* All 3 Conservative candidates in the Wausau School Board were victorious, leading to an 8-1 majority on the board, a board that in 2020 Democrats had control of 7-2.
* 3 School Boards in Kenosha County flipped to Conservative control.
* Conservative Jane Lang became the second female Mayor in the City of Neenah's history while winning in a city President Biden won by over 1,000 votes in 2020.
* Conservatives in the City of Pewaukee saw phenomenal success as they won the mayoral election and their 3 target aldermanic races.
* Waukesha, Washington, and Langlade County all won over 80% of their targeted races across their respective Counties.
* Waukesha had over 170 candidates across the County.
* Conservatives in Rock County won almost 90% of the County Board races they were targeting, ultimately flipping the County Board their way. They also elected conservatives to School Boards in their two major Democratic cities of Beloit and Janesville.

This massive success for conservatives couldn't have been done without the tireless efforts from our grassroots, and most importantly, from those brave individuals who put their name on the ballot and ran for office. **Conservatives are energized and it is clear the momentum is in our favor heading into November!** | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=5 "Click here to view our press release") [Click here to view our press release](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=5)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conservatives_dominate_3&n=9)

name: [NEW] Urgent Supreme Court Polling >> Team Ruiz
subject: re: Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | TEAM RUIZ SUPREME COURT POLLING | | | | We’re thrilled that President Biden made HISTORY and nominated the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has proved to us and the rest of America that she is highly accomplished and will be an AMAZING Supreme Court Justice. She even stood up to right-wing bigots, like Lindsey Graham and Ted Cruz who tried to drag her name through the mud during her confirmation hearings!! That’s why we’re throwing our full support behind her! | | | | Thanks, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Team AOC
subject: Starbucks workers win big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Knowing when and how to organize your co-workers to create a safer, better work environment can be a daunting task, but it doesn’t have to be.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220406-2926-header&t=1&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA)
On April 1, Starbucks workers at one of the company's flagship stores won a momentous union election – becoming the first unionized Starbucks in New York City and the tenth election won by Starbucks Workers United.
From the first unionized Starbucks in Buffalo, NY this past December, to the John Deere strike in October when over 10,000 workers stopped work for five weeks to demand a better union contract – **there's no doubt that we're seeing a rise in worker organizing across the country to demand better pay and better working conditions.**
**If you're inspired by these efforts and wondering how to organize at your own workplace, we're here to help!**
[**_If you as a worker are concerned about your workplace and are interested in talking to your coworkers about organizing, click here to check out our list of resources and organizing kits.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/4255?source=em20220406-2926-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=2&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA)**_
Last week, Alexandria met with workers at the Astoria Starbucks – which was the first location in Queens to join the unionization effort – to hear about their efforts and amplify their work. Having worked in the food and beverage industry for years, Alexandria knows firsthand that it's one of the most exploited industries – yet so few of these workplaces are unionized.
More than 145 Starbucks locations have filed for union elections nationally. However, this has been no easy feat. **Union busting is a sophisticated and lucrative business.** From the start, Starbucks baristas – whose average age is just 24 – have felt a great deal of pressure from the top, as higher-ups have pushed workers to doubt themselves and their peers.
You can show your support by sharing this video on [_YouTube_](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13170?t=3&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA) or [_Twitter_](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13171?t=4&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA) and also by tipping workers, leaving them notes, and changing your order name at Starbucks to 'Union Strong'. ✊
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13170?t=5&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA)
The act of organizing means coming together to address issues important to you as a worker — from sexual harassment to management, workplace bullying, wages, and benefits. It's not about a single person or single store, it's about building community to improve the lives of everyone.
**Knowing when and how to organize your co-workers can be a daunting task.** [**_Click here for a list of tips, resources, and virtual trainings to help you get started in formulating a strategy and winning.**_](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/4255?source=em20220406-2926-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=6&akid=2926%2E2526796%2ECPMBWA)
Thank you so much and happy organizing.
Team AOC

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: Knowing when and how to organize your co-workers to create a safer, better work environment can be a daunting task, but it doesn’t have to be. On April 1, Starbucks workers at one of the company's flagship stores won a momentous union election – becoming the first unionized Starbucks in New York City and the tenth election won by Starbucks Workers United. From the first unionized Starbucks in Buffalo, NY this past December, to the John Deere strike in October when over 10,000 workers stopped work for five weeks to demand a better union contract – there's no doubt that we're seeing a rise in worker organizing across the country to demand better pay and better working conditions. If you're inspired by these efforts and wondering how to organize at your own workplace, we're here to help! Last week, Alexandria met with workers at the Astoria Starbucks – which was the first location in Queens to join the unionization effort – to hear about their efforts and amplify their work. Having worked in the food and beverage industry for years, Alexandria knows firsthand that it's one of the most exploited industries – yet so few of these workplaces are unionized. More than 145 Starbucks locations have filed for union elections nationally. However, this has been no easy feat. Union busting is a sophisticated and lucrative business. From the start, Starbucks baristas – whose average age is just 24 – have felt a great deal of pressure from the top, as higher-ups have pushed workers to doubt themselves and their peers. You can show your support by sharing this video on or and also by tipping workers, leaving them notes, and changing your order name at Starbucks to 'Union Strong'. ✊ The act of organizing means coming together to address issues important to you as a worker — from sexual harassment to management, workplace bullying, wages, and benefits. It's not about a single person or single store, it's about building community to improve the lives of everyone. Knowing when and how to organize your co-workers can be a daunting task. Thank you so much and happy organizing. Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Burril?=
subject: Weekly Update from the Burril Campaign:
body:
It's been an exhilarating couple of weeks. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/burrilforcongress/burril-prayer-message-authenticity-16058923?e=80f8383115)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Burril For Congress Team,

It has been an exhilarating couple of weeks on the campaign trail!

Our road team continues to roll across our western counties with purpose and a very tight schedule. Doors keep opening and we meet new people every day.

We launched our TV ad campaign on WLOS and Fox News channel this week and the response has been great! People who did not know I was running have been reaching out to offer their support. Our TV ads will run every day through the May 17th Primary Day.

My many years of volunteer service to Western North Carolina and the people I know because of my extensive community involvement is making my name recognition accelerate quickly now that we are advertising.
---
|
---
---
| The Burril message of Conservative, Christian, Businessman is certainly encouraging many people to support us and the word we are hearing over and over is _**authenticity**_.

With all of the news stories coming out about our current Congressman, our meeting conversations quickly turn to credible, mature, responsive leadership. It is obvious that the undercurrent is strong for a Congressional change in this district.

Today's cultural forces are so strong and must be counterbalanced with thoughtful, disciplined, men and women. People of this district are starving for authentic, faith-based people to lead this country. _They are frustrated with politicians who talk the talk but do not walk the walk._

A Spirit filled life of peace and grace is not weak. It is actually much stronger than any reliance on culture. Let's place our flag in the ground for authentic, faith-based Congressional representation.

I ask you to tell your family, friends and neighbors about our [campaign](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=0427c45153&e=80f8383115). It's time to bring back to Washington committed public servants who have our nation's best interest in mind.

All my best,
---
|
---
Matthew Burril
Luke 1:37
Candidate for U.S. Congress
| | | | | | | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=315154659a&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=6d6c9677e9&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=5dc6a87c14&e=80f8383115)
---
|
---

Burril for CongressPO Box 1778Fletcher, NC 28732-1778

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Asking for a small favor from you today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've decided to run for reelection in 2022. The Republican Primary is on May 3rd and we're asking for you to personally endorse my campaign before Ele It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNevJNpSZDzFIszUGj0pdME03NqNnSTq-lOY_CieceJr0HVzHCGEHFe9Ic7F80HxZp1wZS3gJKWcRGU24Y6nKytjOprmS_8b-zxeWzq0AmV-HQkCZl8Je5cO9UN_yBH5aEmDKvzXy3ofJ4bEocDZ8HuU46sD2-rXWZQieOOXhr5ZdnTMF9EFSoJ_EhNUEVaNk9PGfcvwPGHfdWNDYwjiVJUEU%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNesjxyVsRWTHi0pygHVsN2QXMZVUHMFiMJfK-A2gcylZzP2jyaol2u_AjIlFwgFFFKfBzWEQ1mMrcyXZD8BwIPeFiO4z_BJzLdDGw5HH-39HM4qs8nAk8SpHVithcqn97YopGEl4_cgt3xe42QrUoNLcPmxThmA2C9y3X93GOyIRScrtZbjVCb_gDvFSXCPCI08k1Cm3Vy2UsWRlGQaycFNM%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNevRf28vzeF4O2_ASvIdXMN2p4xbshWU_NCwcbDWQ-5FD7jG3WmRrR_Fm5TGm7EnB5nC9B4lMsZgFHCG8oX67h1qOYO0f3ZVgcG72_sOdI6GHN3XdQerQeW3yLOkFdni-n0Ndn74zJjx_d7okbsPBPpJb3AlPSk4wyXnUFtFH8wxNEKi0Wq4py9S2z1PzaDIqgw7Ooj_7ypJ2tEJgbOY5IL8%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNetv4a7ZdIurVGkno6vg3_NOmLq1OuTXElvOcLkZElIzkjo-ajN8uiSaK2wlSJCweOJuMWjpNryDXIe6ICgJRXc5o5vY9QbEGTcV1261rUHIP953-cEGOlsfZDPu9NZqCXOT-_g0gMzdCDONXdxui94JJ3OmDS2j-sz29OveG_n-ZCmocPtuDWR-DED32me2Sb_UQnrp_8BQ2vzhpTKaOSPk%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNegKUJ6bKuetj8waDMPoF9x3dtobYH3umURDl1GVQvWSR8twYqGpo_nR4vR3ZMfUJZxmZZ2I8BSxNt4ktU2RZSGdT3rD5LgSdU4z6ovjYW6KJx_d5Dn0lQFN4in5SNyzJ0VNHkjqhtEq-kje-WSVedHnd8FJj4skrJwYHiK0X29NYVI7IpLqWN6hk4ZA599kjDCaJ8R70O11mKXWaRADSOps%3D)**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNemELSs_CvrRcdNysR5_fPTkUFqi6ZwqIuakNcO3aOkPnhy2xV_9zsKHKrWMFhnJ55K_DtVndK5FVxqNHPy6fFUbrSmBHTpDO_BsdHMqfE61XiZ5CoPlqVNaiC0EMu7IQz4eS7Z4_Rgd6dG4xYbVG7rj8xMJ__BJM4fZdo_WxMPtCdkmRnSMtgUY43iJrJNQ-fp0JBrv9kcYT6x3HNyEAaAI%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=417e9f5a248443f7a09b00770fec358b&_e=iRrN5N8Pe4Yo3UgSfg6D2f1TfUQBfrzi-0OUtnhAu55bTXqkvgaTLYvRFnvu9ElUwCaosjfsV7ItHx9waLeLbNXBjVnjpGB_6DRHesIHK3Ccop1iydoLFbYl-QY_DXdi4Tx4rR-lkTCd3rOapSTo5BC9HUaa6mihV6V5PNghW1Hwb5pyJQhKCztnLnpcRV1PYqrzpXgRCJ83ed9kGlgqjB3u2-8SBSY0DMhQBEnohtfbPBhanWYQFx3uaBsXSBiEco3nk2pnti3FxfKHDBgTeJADpPxtRYYyf89Uinvffgq7wqdMv_JVcXw5He07m-3Ihv5Dk4EFMEPmROrirqpNetinwiy78eN6-D69DyD05FluNmsGCBERnZiqrNgHt-zc5So6EyPk8-aqD7-148LzhOLx3Pq7GzCTSYC5T5Io6aPjbpesjgyY2jHeBTIr1xiIEADv59Cw3KUCGrVxjgmcm8B-CR0cuFHnW4jY7RNGKnLdtbgmQpGSi6Rrn6pEZghuqSaAbrX1sbsOr6cJmHP3fIDTTgjA5WKDFL5_mB3tEhU%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
