name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Weekly recap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624df1511dda454c18a28adb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624dc4553a22de33493a3d0e%26ss_email_id%3D624df1511dda454c18a28adb%26ss_campaign_name%3DWeekly%2Brecap%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-06T20%253A01%253A01Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=X9ProVcqrTkAJM4Wdg7NFI7mgCg%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Stands with Mid-Michigan Workers and Families**
Yesterday, I held a press conference at the Marathon gas station to shine a light on the impacts the Biden-Slotkin agenda is having on hard working Mid-Michigan families. A mother of four, a senior couple on a fixed income, a long haul trucker, and a finish repair worker all joined me to share the stories of how the Bermuda triangle of bad policy making in Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Elissa Slotkin are negatively impacting their lives.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624df1511dda454c18a28adb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F422347256366353&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=Yuzo0QenPKBlPKUZMBRo66C_5TE%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624df1511dda454c18a28adb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F422347256366353&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=Yuzo0QenPKBlPKUZMBRo66C_5TE%3D)
---
#### **Barrett Praises $4.7B Infrastructure Investment**
This bi-partisan legislation that I co-sponsored makes strategic and sound investments where Michigan needs it most. This funding will provide more access to safer drinking water, provide for safer roads and bridges, and provide reliable broadband internet to our rural communities.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624df1511dda454c18a28adb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F419838033283942&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=yVwUtTx5ktYAMQpJbBVUefD5zzE%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624df1511dda454c18a28adb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F419838033283942&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=yVwUtTx5ktYAMQpJbBVUefD5zzE%3D)
---
#### **Rally for the People of Ukraine**
I will be joining Joe Norton and the Ukraine Support Accelerated organization this Sunday from 2pm-5pm at 8580 Grand River Ave, Brighton, MI 48116 for a rally to help raise funds and equipment for the people of Ukraine. Please contact Joe Norton at [810-588-4058](tel:+18105884058), or [jnorton@ussport.org](mailto:jnorton@ussport.org) if you are interested in donating your time or funds.
---
[_ _ RSVP TODAY _ _](mailto:jnorton@ussport.org)
---
| [](mailto:jnorton@ussport.org)
---
---
|
---

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43850493/338975831/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmMwZjkyNC1lNGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uevygb9BJz3u6zOJEuGR57UXJNdq3CwQsrZA7XXx8kg=&emci=c2b89367-b6b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0bc0f924-e4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last week, the House took a historic step in lowering prescription drug prices when we passed legislation that would cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month. I was proud to help pass this crucial bill because this is a fight that's personal to me.

When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. Like the other 1.6 million people in this country with Type 1 diabetes, I depend upon insulin to stay alive.

However, over the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed – jumping from $40 a vial to upwards of $300. There is absolutely nothing to justify this price hike. This is Big Pharma greed, plain and simple.

I'm one of the lucky ones. I have insurance that helps pay the cost of my insulin. But throughout my career as a pediatrician, I've seen families struggle to afford the medications they relied on. So they'd ration their medication, cut pills in half, or skip taking them altogether. And when that medicine is insulin, taking just enough to stay alive but not enough to stay healthy is a dangerous – sometimes deadly – tightrope to walk.

**No one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why I've been fighting in Congress to lower the cost of prescription drugs.**

I'm working to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us.

This bill to cap the cost of insulin is a step in the right direction, but we have a lot more work to do, and I'll continue fighting until everyone can afford the life-saving medication they need.

Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. That’s why the House passed historic and bipartisan legislation that would cap consumers’ out-of-pocket cost for insulin at $35 per month – a move that voters overwhelmingly support.

**But in a despicable move, Liz’s Republican opponent, Ashley Hinson, voted against this life-saving legislation which will lower costs for Iowa families.** Unlike her opponent, Liz will take action to make life-saving medications affordable. [**We need Liz in Congress, Peter, so please, will you help fight back against her opponent by chipping in right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43851069/338979190/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.06_b1_tmhq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAwOGIxZi1lNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZuRV2GNGe8Lux-9uie5uT5S9x3Nb1sRKa3m9yOzS0I=)

clean_body: Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. = Hi Peter, Last week, Liz’s opponent took a vote that disregarded the lives of so many Iowans – she voted against capping the price of insulin at $35. = Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. That’s why the House passed historic and bipartisan legislation that would cap consumers’ out-of-pocket cost for insulin at $35 per month – a move that voters overwhelmingly support. But in a despicable move, Liz’s Republican opponent, Ashley Hinson, voted against this life-saving legislation which will lower costs for Iowa families. Unlike her opponent, Liz will take action to make life-saving medications affordable. = | = Liz is running in one of the most competitive districts in the country. Her opponent has shown time and time again that she doesn’t care about Iowans and will block legislation to lower health care costs. clean_body: Your support is turning Florida redder than ever before! | Peter, Conservatives are up big in Florida. We just expanded our voter registration advantage to over 100,000 voters... ... and we have a +7 favorability score right here in Miami-Dade County, which boasts 163,000 more registered Democrats than Republicans. Four years ago, Miami Dade voted for socialist Andrew Gillum by 21 points. That’s a 28-point swing in our favor! More and more voters are realizing that the Democrat party has nothing to offer America. They’re full of empty promises and radical ideas, but they have no idea how to actually run our country. Governor DeSantis has shown our state what true conservative leadership looks like, and as a result, record numbers of Floridians are supporting the Republican party. Your support has helped us turn our state into a bastion of freedom and prosperity in the sea of decline that is Joe Biden’s America. But to keep Florida FREE, we’re counting on your sustained support. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

subject: Why we need a good start

Hey Peter, We are well on our way to delivering real change for the people of Florida, but we need your | | | Hey Peter, We are well on our way to delivering real change for the people of Florida, but we need your help. The campaign reached out yesterday because as we get closer and closer to the Primary, we will need all hands on deck. This campaign is about the people of Florida, not about backroom corrupt deals or large dark money donations. This campaign is about you, about all of us, who have a stake in the future of our state and our world. I need your support. When we come together in the name of building a world that works for all, not just the wealthy few, we have everything we need to change everything. It comes as no surprise that party-over-people Senator Ted Cruz endorsed former Ohio Treasurer Josh Mandel for the open U.S. Senate seat during the Republican primary.

Mandel, who is a huge supporter of restrictive voter ID laws that would make it even harder for marginalized communities to cast their ballots, is a notorious Donald Trump loyalist. And like Senator Cruz, Mandel has perpetuated the dangerous and false claim that the 2020 election was "stolen."

Senator Cruz’s endorsement of the former Ohio Treasurer could mean a big boost for Mandel – but we can’t let voters be swayed by obstructionist Republicans who care more about party-power than the people of Ohio.

**[Will you chip in today and help us fight back against Trump-loyalist Josh Mandel?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43856499/339008976/1375374031?refcode=em22_220406_Mandel_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220406_Mandel_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjY3YjZlOC0wN2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XstIb3_wDLH9fhRDHLPUMR4KXZiTLHclS6to82DWJLA=)**

Both Cruz and Mandel are known to purposefully create division for political gain – we cannot let fear-mongering politicians get the upper hand on the ballot. We need to fight back, but we need your help.

name: Sarah Godlewski for U.S. Senate
subject: Asking for your personal endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
A simple but important step you can take to show the strength of our grassroots team right now. Republicans know that Wisconsin’s Senate race will be a dead heat, and if we flip this seat blue, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the Senate majority.

Right now, Sarah is the only Democrat who’s beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll, and she’s the only candidate who has won two statewide elections — making her one of the GOP’s top targets. Winning this race will require an unprecedented people-powered movement.

**[That’s why we are asking you to add your name and personally endorse Sarah Godlewski’s campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin. It’s a simple but important step you can take to show the strength of our grassroots team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43851371/338980421/-589298804?ms=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&refcode=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&source=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ITnZ70M8csAvJllOFpdCgCxcEM7gn0vL1LS90rU0uZANCtcr48EWObl1seinOm0XNgOk9I1UlADTaX3pSKMrtKITIs+xEctLcvXphBi8kpFClVcFL3fEUkPajApSeBO5KhuqVMek4Y2P4P1vKCXibjZp34jQM35H5p1L8qi6fGU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWY4MzBlOC1lN2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJ7JadQ8yw5UaLKx6mJAdSZ0bsVStNBOnSWpm3dxedM=&emci=e0e0b83a-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59f830e8-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**
| [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43851372/338980422/-589298804?ms=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&refcode=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&source=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ITnZ70M8csAvJllOFpdCgCxcEM7gn0vL1LS90rU0uZANCtcr48EWObl1seinOm0XNgOk9I1UlADTaX3pSKMrtKITIs+xEctLcvXphBi8kpFClVcFL3fEUkPajApSeBO5KhuqVMek4Y2P4P1vKCXibjZp34jQM35H5p1L8qi6fGU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWY4MzBlOC1lN2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJ7JadQ8yw5UaLKx6mJAdSZ0bsVStNBOnSWpm3dxedM=&emci=e0e0b83a-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59f830e8-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)
---

But first, let us tell you a little bit about why she ran for Senate in the first place.

Sarah is a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, the product of a proud union home — and frankly, she couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson.

Before she first ran for public office, Sarah led a bipartisan grassroots campaign to prevent Scott Walker from eliminating the State Treasurer’s office, a critical check and balance on our government. She stopped his power grab with 62% of the vote, which is a landslide victory in Wisconsin.

Then, Sarah ran for the office she saved and won her second statewide election by a larger margin than the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — and even flipped nine Trump counties.

As Treasurer, Sarah has focused on finding commonsense solutions for working families. She lifted a GOP gag order on climate change, provided millions of dollars in relief to public schools during the pandemic, partnered with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million from the American Rescue Plan for people at risk of losing their homes, and is working on a bipartisan bill that would create retirement-like savings accounts for every child in Wisconsin.

Sarah didn’t get into public service for fame, money, or power. She got in the fight because too many politicians weren’t lifting a finger to make life easier for struggling families. Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, so she stepped up.

Now, she’s stepping up again to run for U.S. Senate and work to lower everyday costs for families, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, expand affordable childcare — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done.

Sarah will continue to be an advocate for working families in Washington, but in order to do that, she needs your grassroots support to build a campaign strong enough to take on Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat. So, we’re asking:

**[Will you add your name as an official endorser of Sarah Godlewski’s campaign for United States Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43851373/338980423/-589298804?ms=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&refcode=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&source=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220406_endors_engg_gq_act___sg4s_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ITnZ70M8csAvJllOFpdCgCxcEM7gn0vL1LS90rU0uZANCtcr48EWObl1seinOm0XNgOk9I1UlADTaX3pSKMrtKITIs+xEctLcvXphBi8kpFClVcFL3fEUkPajApSeBO5KhuqVMek4Y2P4P1vKCXibjZp34jQM35H5p1L8qi6fGU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWY4MzBlOC1lN2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJ7JadQ8yw5UaLKx6mJAdSZ0bsVStNBOnSWpm3dxedM=&emci=e0e0b83a-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59f830e8-e7b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**

This toss-up race is too important to sit out, and Ron Johnson is too dangerous to get another six years in Washington. With your support, Sarah can defeat him and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin.

Thank you in advance for adding your name to our growing list of personal endorsers. It really makes a difference for our campaign.

— Team Sarah

clean_body: A simple but important step you can take to show the strength of our grassroots team right now. Republicans know that Wisconsin’s Senate race will be a dead heat, and if we flip this seat blue, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the Senate majority. Right now, Sarah is the only Democrat who’s beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll, and she’s the only candidate who has won two statewide elections — making her one of the GOP’s top targets. Winning this race will require an unprecedented people-powered movement. | But first, let us tell you a little bit about why she ran for Senate in the first place. Sarah is a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, the product of a proud union home — and frankly, she couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson. Before she first ran for public office, Sarah led a bipartisan grassroots campaign to prevent Scott Walker from eliminating the State Treasurer’s office, a critical check and balance on our government. She stopped his power grab with 62% of the vote, which is a landslide victory in Wisconsin. Then, Sarah ran for the office she saved and won her second statewide election by a larger margin than the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — and even flipped nine Trump counties. As Treasurer, Sarah has focused on finding commonsense solutions for working families. She lifted a GOP gag order on climate change, provided millions of dollars in relief to public schools during the pandemic, partnered with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million from the American Rescue Plan for people at risk of losing their homes, and is working on a bipartisan bill that would create retirement-like savings accounts for every child in Wisconsin. Sarah didn’t get into public service for fame, money, or power. She got in the fight because too many politicians weren’t lifting a finger to make life easier for struggling families. Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, so she stepped up. Now, she’s stepping up again to run for U.S. Senate and work to lower everyday costs for families, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, expand affordable childcare — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done. Sarah will continue to be an advocate for working families in Washington, but in order to do that, she needs your grassroots support to build a campaign strong enough to take on Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat. So, we’re asking: This toss-up race is too important to sit out, and Ron Johnson is too dangerous to get another six years in Washington. With your support, Sarah can defeat him and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin. Thank you in advance for adding your name to our growing list of personal endorsers. It really makes a difference for our campaign. — Team Sarah Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

Peter,

My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9f8877c6f18f4612a4a116446bff5d6c&_e=-EtfpAtOqQSOiAeYNZaP_i-t1lRmkl6WprS6pj7sIhx51dHn7Pb2tv7jMWk_7uJ5n_M_E09LhOvpnVrww34tBBkpD4kX-02py-Vik2-87ksxczVkO3ilOGCbV72juPhHmes4ZJhUK2XcMVtYvwfVst-XVl2y8zins7X7QWNvHKXTNB6sUoNFDV3hNYwX0RinSdrM_NLfjD27-7AQgt3WEvZxO3Z9hbl_7sHl5hSREl9X_iSndotyz6SoZcyClPsLlFpSgtj2nqC3XsKNYTyEnF433PdyHSbJ-KG6kDjU1oKPBSw4VXe9w7nPVGWBkYKdjts1817ffQxN6kEWlStjvGPgfxpafAIaL2y8L-ZW9hIcibYG2HbLTMMnLpfrxdmUDOBF17gmgKwlCXv29heGyK4nxiGssOtRLPUyD5YzCBc%3D)

Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? name: Jayapal HQ
subject: FWD - Cancel it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Extending the student loan payment pause is the right thing to do — but it’s not even close to enough on its own.
#
Peter, big news: the Biden administration is extending the moratorium on federal student loan payments from May 1 to August 31. **Organizing works!**
Extending the student loan payment pause is the right thing to do, _but it’s not even close to enough on its own._ We have to do MORE — and President Biden can still go one giant step further and cancel student debt through executive action.
[**Now is not the time to relent. Will you add your name to Pramila’s on a grassroots petition urging the President to cancel student loan debt?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11897?t=1&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)
Thank you for joining Pramila in this fight,
All of us at Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Mon, Apr 4, 2022
Subject: Cancel it
Peter, the moratorium on federal student loan payments is set to expire on May 1st.
**That's a big problem:** 9 in 10 student loan borrowers aren't prepared for payments to resume, especially as the rising costs of groceries and basic necessities eat into their paychecks.
**But there's a solution to this crisis:** With a swipe of the pen, President Biden can free millions of people across America from the crushing burden of nearly $2 trillion in student loan debt.
[**Can you add your name next to mine on a grassroots petition urging the president not just to extend the moratorium again — but immediately**** _cancel_****student loan debt?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11897?t=2&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11897?t=3&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)**
Forgiving student debt is an economic issue AND a racial justice issue. Women hold two-thirds of student debt, and Black borrowers owe $25,000 more on average than white borrowers.
And the burden of student loan debt is not just a pandemic problem — 1 in 4 borrowers were already behind on payments even before the very first case of COVID-19 was found in America. **Restarting student loan payments will dramatically increase delinquencies, causing unnecessary financial catastrophe for many Americans.**
[**Enough. It's time to cancel student loan debt once and for all. If you agree, add your name to our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11898?t=4&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11897?t=5&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220406-1162-footer&t=6&refcode2=1162_420207_i1r3dC&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1162%2E420207%2Ei1r3dC)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: My work to protect Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#
Friend —
One of the issues that inspired me to take a leap of faith and challenge my right-wing state senator in 2018 was his history of obstructing progress on abortion rights in New York.
You see, the Reproductive Health Act, legislation that codified legal abortion on the state level, was introduced in the state legislature in 2007 to protect New Yorkers in the event that _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned.
But for over ten years, the RHA remained in the legislative graveyard — because Republicans, and fake Democrats like my state senator, were preventing its passage.
I knew I had to do something, especially in the wake of Donald Trump’s election — so I ran for office against the very man standing in the way of codifying Roe, despite the fact that so many people were telling me I didn’t have a chance.
**You probably know where this is going — after my election in 2018, I joined Democrats in the State Senate to pass the Reproductive Health Act and protect the right to an abortion in New York state during the very first month after taking office.**
Now, even with Joe Biden in the White House and Democrats in the majority in both the House and Senate, _Roe v. Wade_ is under attack. And truthfully, it’s time for Democrats in Congress to take our state’s lead and get serious about protecting the right to an abortion. The fight to protect the right to choose feels hopeless these days, but I know we can change the course, because I’ve done it before.
As your representative for NY-3, I will do everything in my power to support access to reproductive healthcare. But I’ll need your help to get there, so please:
[**Make a contribution of $5 to my campaign today to help me win this campaign and take my work supporting abortion rights to Congress.** **[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220406-2-60&refcode2=679_59515_j298S7&akid=679%2E59515%2Ej298S7)** Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. All my best,
Alessandra
Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=679%2E59515%2Ej298S7).

clean_body: | | | The lack of seriousness is astounding | | | Team, we’re going to keep this simple. Every single member of the AZ GOP voted against capping insulin at $35 a month. Despite complaining for weeks about high prices and inflation, when presented an opportunity to help Arizonans struggling with the massive price hikes Big Pharma has put on insulin – which is medically necessary for those who need it – every single member of the AZ GOP voted no. The hypocrisy is just amazing. The patent for insulin was originally sold for $1. Now, those who need it pay hundreds, if not thousands, of dollars a month in order to get the medicine their body needs to survive. If Republicans truly cared about high prices, they would have supported our AZ Dems’ efforts to cap insulin prices at $35 a month. Instead, they voted against an insulin price cap, showing their true colors when it comes to helping Arizonans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We promise to always fight for you, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . This campaign is historic in more ways than one, friend.
Not only am I running to become Florida's first Black U.S. Senator, I also just found out something incredible:

**I am one of the highest-raising candidates in Florida history – all because of supporters like you.**
Last quarter, **271,903 supporters** from across the country contributed when it mattered most – all the $5, $20 and $100 donations helped this team build one of the strongest Democratic grassroots campaigns of this election cycle. We hit our goal and brought in **more than $10 million.**
But I also want to warn you that we can't let up now. **National Senate Republicans raised nearly $12 million in February alone** – which they will use to attack me because they know that Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep Senate control if I win this race.
I know I come to this team for support a lot. And, while Marco Rubio cashes million-dollar checks, I know it may seem like a $5 donation to this campaign won't make a difference – but the truth is, every single dollar counts in a race this close.
**I can't win without your help, so I have to ask: [Today, will you please donate $5 to help me keep up my momentum and reach more Florida voters? This critical race hinges on your dedicated support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43856656/339014559/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2839-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjUzMTJkYy0wOWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RRAAxyU3lcGkr1JqEyQiKAiYaumF9ybnJqZly7mkFdA=)**

Not only am I running to become Florida's first Black U.S. Senator, I also just found out something incredible: I am one of the highest-raising candidates in Florida history – all because of supporters like you. Last quarter, 271,903 supporters from across the country contributed when it mattered most – all the $5, $20 and $100 donations helped this team build one of the strongest Democratic grassroots campaigns of this election cycle. We hit our goal and brought in more than $10 million. But I also want to warn you that we can't let up now. | | [Matt Gaetz](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=MeCn6g1xVq9zRTU00VPpDBP6rXpfxoBEhBno4lAumiI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1JlYmVrYWhKb25lc0ZvckNvbmdyZXNzLyIsInIiOiJiN2RlNjg0OC0wZTQ4LTRkMmItNDAyOC02MGMwYzE0MDY3ZDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) thinks those living with diabetes and dependent upon insulin should have to pay hundreds of dollars each month or more for necessary medication as [punishment for being overweight.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=3lJeerMiiNNJMt13JEt_dwZbggGbi5ZvDstpNAeQ9ws.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhdG9kYXkuY29tL3N0b3J5L25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MvMjAyMi8wNC8wNS9tYXR0LWdhZXR6LWluc3VsaW4tY29zdC1pbmNyZWFzZXMtd2Fpc3RsaW5lcy85NDY3NDQ1MDAyLyIsInIiOiJiN2RlNjg0OC0wZTQ4LTRkMmItNDAyOC02MGMwYzE0MDY3ZDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) Help us put a face to the disease! Send us a short video clip of yourself, a loved one, or a friend saying "My name is [your first name], and I'm a diabetic." Send your short video clips to our [Facebook page here](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=MeCn6g1xVq9zRTU00VPpDBP6rXpfxoBEhBno4lAumiI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1JlYmVrYWhKb25lc0ZvckNvbmdyZXNzLyIsInIiOiJiN2RlNjg0OC0wZTQ4LTRkMmItNDAyOC02MGMwYzE0MDY3ZDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) or email them directly to us at: Info@RebekahJonesCampaign. You can even send them to us as a reply to this email. We won't identify you beyond your first name.
We're going to force Gaetz to face the very real people his vote against capping insulin prices impacts. Gaetz' medical tyranny through discrimination is unacceptable. We want to show Gaetz and his GOP allies that diabetics are people deserving of dignity, love, and affordable medication.
---
| | | [**Support candidates that fight medical discrimination. DONATE TODAY!**](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=a0Gqm9cIXuIS6RcsB16j6Mcz4WADgd1JVEC2zxj86Fg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJiYmIyMDliMy1mOWRkLTRhNzMtNDgyMS1kN2YyMDg3YWQ5ZmUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | What exactly did Matt Gaetz say? Gaetz falsely claimed that obese people running up the drug's price, writing that insulin's cost ["increases as waistlines increase](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=r6XxmfaXKQIfXqi5JfvkWWpkpIQZoh41Gi64xXkQCQ0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5kZXBlbmRlbnQuY28udWsvbmV3cy93b3JsZC9hbWVyaWNhcy91cy1wb2xpdGljcy9tYXR0LWdhZXR6LWluc3VsaW4tYmlsbC1sb3NlLXdlaWdodC1iMjA1MDU5NC5odG1sIiwiciI6ImUzMGVjZGRjLTJhZmQtNDFkMC1iZWMxLTcwMjllNjMzNDczMCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)." Insulin costs have [sharply increased](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=FpIJASm20vWupFMYpSPOzF4kr05Ygt67lJTcelmmCGk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1lcmljYW5hY3Rpb25mb3J1bS5vcmcvcmVzZWFyY2gvaW5zdWxpbi1jb3N0LWFuZC1wcmljaW5nLXRyZW5kcy8iLCJyIjoiZTMwZWNkZGMtMmFmZC00MWQwLWJlYzEtNzAyOWU2MzM0NzMwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) over the last decade, with some insulin users spending [upward of $2,000 a month on the drug](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=IREhO2o3pj4MVjwt5wj0MLybMb4jXambHmLeOCltysQ.). About one in four Americans [reported rationing insulin](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=JPXS3m_2YD2pcwy5_YCbJxO3-jI0XxT4tAniFCdhOdU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qYW1hbmV0d29yay5jb20vam91cm5hbHMvamFtYWludGVybmFsbWVkaWNpbmUvZnVsbGFydGljbGUvMjcxNzQ5OSIsInIiOiJlMzBlY2RkYy0yYWZkLTQxZDAtYmVjMS03MDI5ZTYzMzQ3MzAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) to save money. Diabetes, whether Type I or Type II, should never be considered "punishment," and often times those who are insulin dependent are not obese, as Gaetz suggested. Even if they were, allowing pharmaceutical companies to charge outrageous prices for a necessary medication would still not be acceptable. More than 7 million Americans rely on insulin to manage their condition, according to the CDC. And about 12% of Florida's 1st Congressional District
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=YFGKBFbUUWndbXeYSRkRY437PmR1YdihZ8RmgAZfKis.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9naXMuY2RjLmdvdi9ncmFzcC9kaWFiZXRlcy9EaWFiZXRlc0F0bGFzLmh0bWwjIiwiciI6ImVhOGZlMjk5LWM1ZDgtNGQ1MC03MjgzLTFmOGQ5ZDYyOTFiYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)
---
| | Source: CDC, https://gis.cdc.gov/grasp/diabetes/DiabetesAtlas.html#
---
| | What do other countries pay for insulin? The bill Gaetz voted against caps insulin costs to $35 per month. The United States currently has [the highest insulin prices in the world.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/ddO00Sri3/c?w=h9kE0okar7MlMAfV6uPm95Ahw5Wmw2MVQkGQ6eVjEtw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmFuZC5vcmcvYmxvZy9yYW5kLXJldmlldy8yMDIxLzAxL3RoZS1hc3Ryb25vbWljYWwtcHJpY2Utb2YtaW5zdWxpbi1odXJ0cy1hbWVyaWNhbi1mYW1pbGllcy5odG1sIiwiciI6IjNmMjM3OTk3LTBhMTYtNDM2Ny1hMjZhLThkOGNmNTQ5YmY1ZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) In 2021, the list price for a unit of insulin in the United States was nearly $100. In Canada, insulin costs $12 per unit.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Our right to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Piercy Robinson Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
When it comes to our right to keep and bear arms, I have a simple rule: No Compromises! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/04-06-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=740650042e&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| I care deeply about the right to keep and bear arms, and I know that most Idahoans do as well. The Second Amendment recognizes this as one of our core inalienable rights and declares that it "shall not be infringed." **_I agree_!**
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3ca446c0ab&e=823fa8e224 "Shall not be infringed!")
---
Click the image above to watch the video.
| In my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, I earned an A+ rating from the NRA and an A+ endorsement from Dick Heller, the lead plaintiff in the famous _District of Columbia v. Heller_ Supreme Court case. I believe the right to keep and bear arms, which is recognized in both the Idaho and U.S. Constitutions, is amongst our most fundamental, and I strongly oppose “red flag” gun confiscation laws and other attempts to circumvent this right. I have consistently stood up for your right to keep and bear arms, and as your Governor, I will continue to fight against any encroachment on our 2nd Amendment Rights — including any infringement coming from Washington, D.C. Our state, counties, and cities should all consider carefully how they will respond to federal overreach that violates our fundamental rights. It is my intention to make Idaho a “2nd Amendment Sanctuary State” devoid of any form of “red flag” laws, where the presumption of innocence in self-defense cases is always guaranteed. I would also like to see the state do more to incentivize the increased production of firearms and ammo in Idaho. **When it comes to our right to keep and bear arms, I have a simple rule:_No Compromises_!**
---
|
### It's less than six weeks until the Election!
---
| You know how critical this primary election is to protecting Idaho's future. Our individual rights — **including our right to keep and bear arms** — our state sovereignty, and our traditional conservative values are all in grave danger if we don't succeed! Please help us **Make Idaho Free Again** by [**Donating**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0a729229bd&e=823fa8e224) [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c8c4bf833a&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b751ce98be&e=823fa8e224), or [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=02887d9b92&e=823fa8e224) today!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=42668d0708&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f892949188&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4660a5eb88&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cf0556b98f&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4c37af934a&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d977f859a9&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

name: Team Ryan
subject: We need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3163%2E3611125%2ESAPwFx ][IMG]

Folks—Democrats have a lot of work to do this year if we hope to
EXPAND our Senate majority, so we want to know what you think:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220406_EN_Flippable4_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=3163%2E3611125%2ESAPwFx ]What are Democrats’ top 4 flippable opportunities in the Senate? We
need to hit 5,000 respondents.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220406_EN_Flippable4_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1008&akid=3163%2E3611125%2ESAPwFx ]Vote for the 4 most flippable seats

With a razor-thin majority, every seat counts this year—whether it’s Ohio,
Pennsylvania, Florida, Wisconsin, North Carolina, or Missouri—we’ve got a
lot on the line and a lot of ground to cover.

Everything we hope to accomplish depends entirely on expanding Senate
control. We’ve seen that whether it’s passing major voting rights
protections or bringing down health care costs, a 50/50 split just isn’t
good enough.

With key races all across the country, Democrats need reliable data to
make strategic investments in competitive states.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220406_EN_Flippable4_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1009&akid=3163%2E3611125%2ESAPwFx ]We need 5,000 respondents to answer: which 4 Senate seats do Democrats
have the best shot at flipping in November?

We need to hit 5,000 respondents. We’ve seen that whether it’s passing major voting rights protections or bringing down health care costs, a 50/50 split just isn’t good enough. With key races all across the country, Democrats need reliable data to make strategic investments in competitive states. name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Call on the White House to transition to clean energy now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This can't wait.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220406-908-footer-ak&t=2&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)
Hey, do you have a second? We promise to keep this quick.
We’re currently joining forces with Progressive Change Campaign Committee and The People United _(who have endorsed our campaign)_ , as well as other progressive organizations and campaigns, **to call on the White House to transition to clean energy now.**
Russia’s devastating invasion of Ukraine proves that America MUST lead the world in a clean energy transition to stop our dependence on fossil fuels. A clean energy transition will stop dictators like Putin from being able to fund their regimes, their wars, and their atrocities with fossil fuel money, beyond the obvious need to combat climate change.
This war is empowering authoritarian leaders like Vladimir Putin, and other rogue oil-producing nations, to act with impunity knowing that democratic countries depend on their oil and gas to survive. And all the while, price-gouging oil companies are trying to profit from tragedy by hiking up gas prices.
**[Can you add your name to join us and call on the White House to transition to clean energy now? This can’t wait.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31043?t=3&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31043?t=4&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)**
If you have a car, I’m sure you’ve seen how much prices have been gouged at the pump in Cresco. Right here in Ohio, gas is hovering around $4 a gallon and it’s putting working families across the nation at an even bigger strain.
Signatures will be delivered to the White House and allies in Congress to show widespread popular support for this clear, concise, and popular message. That means that every name on this counts.
**[It’s going to take all of us joining together to get this done. Let’s show the White House just how strong the movement behind clean energy is. Can you add your name in support now?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31043?t=5&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)**
With gratitude,
Morgan Harper HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220406-908-footer&t=6&refcode2=908_90090_gN3-xu&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=908%2E90090%2EgN3-xu)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Do you want someone like my opponent, Derrick Van Oden, who took part in the January 6th Capitol Riots and then lied about it? name: Kat Cammack
subject: 🚨Major Endorsement Alert🚨
body:
I just hung up the phone with President Donald Trump who has endorsed my re-election campaign for Congress! Here's what he had to say...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013kSSjaUf0QKNSAUGpRwhkuAw40ShknuOGHSoHsSUlSQucO4viZ_VRlpOwR12kN2PI1R1rY_6lu3V0vKefmi3EmWCoDivDgIo3uExefbxnk9jUG8tdV0yKJVOJgxdpBiPnsZkw7-xdFMW_D4nZYhbSU9ySv9SxYbi7CICtGUNUWvsZhHoY3nRxhM2Z19ahkE4&c=c8bah5IfalGjhdl3B7brd6pJ10-avhLdOZmRiqgbyPjhlvYYspq9Xg==&ch=0rFPYTBSTLUazbBoED71qq5rQNwJQJj5AN-lggbgDCvV8cfDo-Mo2A==)
---
| Friend
I just hung up the phone with President Donald Trump who has endorsed my re-election campaign for Congress! Here's what he had to say...
Statement from President Donald J. Trump: "Congresswoman Kat Cammack is doing a terrific job representing the people of Florida in Congress! Kat is working hard to Secure our Border, Promote American Agriculture, Defend the Second Amendment, Support our Brave First Responders, Military and Vets, and Hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left Accountable for their ongoing failures. The youngest Republican woman in Congress, Kat is a fighter for our America First agenda and our Country's future. Kat has my Complete and Total Endorsement!" \- President Donald J. Trump
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013kSSjaUf0QKNSAUGpRwhkuAw40ShknuOGHSoHsSUlSQucO4viZ_VRlpOwR12kN2PI1R1rY_6lu3V0vKefmi3EmWCoDivDgIo3uExefbxnk9jUG8tdV0yKJVOJgxdpBiPnsZkw7-xdFMW_D4nZYhbSU9ySv9SxYbi7CICtGUNUWvsZhHoY3nRxhM2Z19ahkE4&c=c8bah5IfalGjhdl3B7brd6pJ10-avhLdOZmRiqgbyPjhlvYYspq9Xg==&ch=0rFPYTBSTLUazbBoED71qq5rQNwJQJj5AN-lggbgDCvV8cfDo-Mo2A==)
---
| I am honored to have President Trump's support. As a part of the America First movement, having Trump's endorsement means so much to our campaign. He's a leader who always puts our people, country, and future first!
With him on our team, I know we can defeat the Radical Left this year. President Trump has boosted our campaign's momentum, and now it's up to you to pitch in and keep it going into November! [Help my campaign build on this incredible momentum! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013kSSjaUf0QKNSAUGpRwhkuAw40ShknuOGHSoHsSUlSQucO4viZ_VRlpOwR12kN2PI1R1rY_6lu3V0vKefmi3EmWCoDivDgIo3uExefbxnk9jUG8tdV0yKJVOJgxdpBiPnsZkw7-xdFMW_D4nZYhbSU9ySv9SxYbi7CICtGUNUWvsZhHoY3nRxhM2Z19ahkE4&c=c8bah5IfalGjhdl3B7brd6pJ10-avhLdOZmRiqgbyPjhlvYYspq9Xg==&ch=0rFPYTBSTLUazbBoED71qq5rQNwJQJj5AN-lggbgDCvV8cfDo-Mo2A==)

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Announcing Veterans For Reeves
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Reeves for Congress
body:
Announcing Veterans For Reeves
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/H6s-u0cNi6CU1-mS1PPaqdHfO0c=265)
---
| Announcing Veterans For Reeves
---
| _______________________________________________
---
| Today, my team is beyond excited to announce yet another coalition in support of our campaign: Veterans for Reeves. As a veteran myself, I have the deepest respect for all who have served our country; as a Senator I always make it a priority to serve those who have served us. In the General Assembly I serve as Co-Chair of the General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus with Delegate Nick Freitas, who is a founding member of Veterans for Reeves. I’m eternally grateful that these brace Americans have chosen to support me in my crucial race against Abigail Spanberger.
---
| | | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/qI3z-tGL9pELRapnYJlqOaTNzsc=265)
---
| We have a variety of individuals from across the military supporting us: from the Army, to the Navy, to the Air Force and the Marines. There are several individuals here that I would love to tell you about. First is Major General (Maj. Gen. Ret.) [Malcolm Frost](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FMalcolm_B._Frost/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/UMZlulL-C1gJdTBzmIVh6p3e4mM=265). Maj. Gen. Frost boasts an outstanding career in the Army, graduating from West Point in ’88 and going on to serve in Bosnia, Afghanistan, and Iraq while climbing the ranks. Maj. Gen. Frost has served our country diligently, being awarded three Bronze Stars in the process.
---
| Another fantastic individual who I am proud to have standing at my side in this race is Master Seargant (Msgt. Ret.) Charles ‘Chuck’ Covington. Msgt. Covington is a current resident of Greene County and did astounding work in the US Air Force, having been deployed to both Iraq and Afghanistan. Not only was Msgt. Covington hand-picked to lead an intelligence cell that is credited with the capture of 15 high value Iraq leadership targets, but he went on to serve in Kandahar overseeing yet another intelligence cell tasked with disrupting IED materials from entering Afghanistan.
---
| | |
---
| We also have The Hon. Daniel Cortez, a Marine Veteran who served in Vietnam, Sergeant Martin Martinez, and fellow Marine Gunnery Sergeant (GySgt. Ret.) Jose ‘Joe’ Feliciano. All of these men I am proud to call close personal friends and who are champions in the local Hispanic community as well as staunch political activists. They are also founding members of our Latinos For Reeves Coalition.
---
| I wish I had the space to highlight every one of our founding members, and their incredible service to our country, but this email is already running long so the last I will talk of is the Hon. Donald P. Loren. Don Loren is the former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Veterans Affairs and former U.S. Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense as well as a retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral, former member of the Virginia Governor’s Military Advisory Council, and a small business owner. He has long been a staunch advocate for Virginia’s active duty military and veterans and stated that “Bryce Reeves is the right person to represent the military and veteran men & women of Virginia, as well as their families, in Congress.”
---
| | | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-congress%2Fsb528_petition_catch/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/szUtGlwLrIhYX1VcbhTrDozTAzk=265)
---
| While I am thrilled to have our team growing in the race against Abigail Spanberger, it is important to note that there is still work to be done here in Virginia.[ My Senate Bill, SB528, will cut taxes for retired veterans](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F221%2Bsum%2BSB528/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/FbhuvAKWrOW8Rh2NO_p3E-5JiLg=265), giving them the break they deserve and encouraging them to stay in Virginia instead of leaving for opportunities in other states! I'm pushing the Democrats in the General Assembly as hard as I can to get this through. I have spent my entire service in the Senate standing with veterans, and I will keep doing so in Congress. So if you’d like to join Veterans for Reeves, please [click here](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/2/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/c9qK9MvtHmcKdrr3WvBNN6MH2BU=265); we'd love to have your help this year!
---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
| _______________________________________________
---
| | CLICK HERE
---
| | | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBryceReevesVA/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/1IBj3s3Q4aeZg12vKT1NYzZtOUQ=265)
---
| [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FReevesVA/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/81otIMaqy5tQS1C0q_8VBQSJy5w=265)
---
| [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Freevesva%2F%3Fhl=en/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/Erd9QlRX9GqhL2eyHo-JIvkYy0A=265)
---
| [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUC-XG8xaWaGnCZjFE29OvpJg%2Ffeatured/1/0100018000c098e9-42cc7afc-51e5-451b-b011-6f05054e9fe0-000000/fX2i52Shr46k6wMzqn6KUTx0CX8=265)
---

McLean, VA 22101, United States

They are also founding members of our Latinos For Reeves Coalition. | I wish I had the space to highlight every one of our founding members, and their incredible service to our country, but this email is already running long so the last I will talk of is the Hon. Donald P. Loren. Don Loren is the former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Veterans Affairs and former U.S. Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense as well as a retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral, former member of the Virginia Governor’s Military Advisory Council, and a small business owner. He has long been a staunch advocate for Virginia’s active duty military and veterans and stated that “Bryce Reeves is the right person to represent the military and veteran men & women of Virginia, as well as their families, in Congress.” | | | | While I am thrilled to have our team growing in the race against Abigail Spanberger, it is important to note that there is still work to be done here in Virginia., giving them the break they deserve and encouraging them to stay in Virginia instead of leaving for opportunities in other states! I'm pushing the Democrats in the General Assembly as hard as I can to get this through. I have spent my entire service in the Senate standing with veterans, and I will keep doing so in Congress. So if you’d like to join Veterans for Reeves, please ; we'd love to have your help this year! | Sincerely, | | | | Bryce Reeves | _____________________________________________ | | CLICK HERE | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 374 McLean, VA 22101, United States | | Paid for and Authorized by Reeves for Congress | | or

Peter,

My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=71b2ac984b5b4df89873bcdcbdc6d5ed&_e=yc2E306GKJzDSD4GdBeTQRtZMBL8mIWEvpm18yimcd-0x0YnYrWYb24pXMWRjF1qiHZLQZwnjAwEOz_L8X9hH-FUEkuoCAbRl1-Yj6sUGKD0abf2AmxUEYKfmqkZnO2EnE3D7ANt95kWOsfiCGg8nl-s1Oc9bGJSluRVF9hT7IrXH7C6uesESKvJ4ZwNJFUkf6qOaOyUn-5Metgy7C3edpLNQtOlZpP1sFWWB_iWpbMBkWfccLyQ7_-mZeWsXwv7w06grAwB4LWnNHdIY8vepQ31B56dZb6BaI7AldIQn4o1dlEMbYd_KQwPG7r7Lg1WM0S5CMnz9rxdFH0oKuY8Pd7x3LSEAUAd_VXywlOJfzm9h_pO8euvQd82lAg9iamGk1WXWPzkudVu3bbtzyMX0A%3D%3D)

Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? It doesn’t need to be much - even just $5 or $10 will give my campaign the momentum it needs to build a winning foundation.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=71b2ac984b5b4df89873bcdcbdc6d5ed&_e=yc2E306GKJzDSD4GdBeTQRtZMBL8mIWEvpm18yimcd-0x0YnYrWYb24pXMWRjF1qiHZLQZwnjAwEOz_L8X9hH-FUEkuoCAbRl1-Yj6sUGKD0abf2AmxUEYKfmqkZnO2EnE3D7ANt95kWOsfiCGg8nl-s1Oc9bGJSluRVF9hT7IrXH7C6uesESKvJ4ZwNJFUkOXyBZH4uX9RiOmqBTBVCTALKy0a9Qccn9-fkfW2uoASyTL1gdn4hbveDKMDKjlPQHE3cnyFeDMCXQL9NNyQhaHPUkQVD_FtP5dq1lLzZ8pIWwCvRwmIlX5DRa4E5I2GHzBnII13JFppCnvOEkHYdd33zNggDVlqX_0MUPo8wTlHQQRdaebdKpJksuTvjhrVCj1Dcw7qkKZm-rUIwT6xwvA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man. | Peter, My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect. As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives. I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means: 1. Securing our border 2. Standing for life 3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and 4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement. Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter. I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. | | | | | | | Washington needs to STOP the games and fight for what’s right. If I’m lucky enough to be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona I will ALWAYS fight for YOU, protect our values, and stand up for what we believe in. For Liberty, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Rand’s scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, this week
our team found out that Rand Paul has raised a record number of corporate
donations in an attempt to stop our movement.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220406?refcode=em20220406-1728&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1728_346206_4K7G8L&akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L ][IMG]

Let’s make this clear: 75% of Rand Paul’s campaign money comes from
corporate money, rich people, and big business.

And when you look at his voting record in the ten years he’s been in
office, it makes perfect sense. Rand Paul has catered his agenda time and
again to the rich and powerful, leaving the rest of Kentucky behind.

Meanwhile, our campaign raised nearly half of our donations from
Kentuckians – an unprecedented demonstration of the energy on the ground
for this race. 98% of our donations were from grassroots supporters like
you.

It just goes to show how scared Rand Paul is of our movement. If we keep
growing this grassroots momentum, we know we’ll be in a strong position to
end this era of failed leadership and bring real change to Kentucky.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220406?refcode=em20220406-1728&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1728_346206_4K7G8L&akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L ]Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to
help us continue building our people-powered movement? Every dollar you
give helps us reach more voters in every corner of Kentucky so we can pull
off a historic win this November.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220406?refcode=em20220406-1728&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1728_346206_4K7G8L&akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L ]Contribute $5

THIS is how we’re going to elect a new chapter of leadership that will
always put people first.

THIS is how we’re going to finally elect a leader who will fight for
urgent policies like Medicare for All.

THIS is how we’re going to transform the future of our Commonwealth and
our Country.

It costs $0.05 for our campaign to contact 1 voter in Kentucky. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220406?refcode=em20220406-1728&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1728_346206_4K7G8L&akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L ]Can
you chip in $20 right now so we can contact 400 voters in Kentucky and
start doing the hard organizing work it’ll take to defeat Rand Paul?

Thank you,

Leo
Deputy Campaign Manager, Charles Booker for Senate

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220406-1728-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1728_346206_4K7G8L&akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1728%2E346206%2E4K7G8L

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A pause is not enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

More than 43 million people owing more than $1.7 trillion: That’s the
student loan debt crisis in America.

This week, President Biden announced another extension of the student debt
pause, marking the 5th time the pause has been extended since March 2020.
But pausing payments is not enough.

On the campaign trail, Joe Biden pledged to cancel $10,000 of student debt
per person. But as President, Biden has failed to provide permanent relief
to the 43 million Americans with student debt.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102597?refcode=em20220406-22748&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt ]NO ONE should go into crushing debt for pursuing higher education. If
you’re with Justice Democrats in this fight, chip in $3 or
any amount to fuel our work today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102597?refcode=em20220406-22748&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt ]Contribute $3

At Justice Democrats, we firmly believe in an Economy for All — an
important part of this position is canceling student loan debt. Tens of
millions of people in America are held back by mountains of student debt.
The $1.7 trillion of student loan debt deepens the racial and class divide
in this country, and deepens the struggle felt by so many households.

JD’s in Congress are working to outright cancel student loan debt.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102597?refcode=em20220406-22748&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt ]Chip in $3 so we can send more progressive fighters to
join them.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220406-22748-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22748_1203867_5sLpTt&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22748%2E1203867%2E5sLpTt

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Beto HQ
subject: Take a look (re: new ad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Watch our new ad >>
#
We just released a new digital ad focused on what Beto will do to support teachers and improve public education across Texas.
We need as many Texans as possible to see our new ad. [Will you watch it right now and then chip in $3 so we can put it in front of more Texas voters?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54904?refcode=ema20220406-183865&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=183865%2E444211%2EPKrTAi)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54904?refcode=ema20220406-183865&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=183865%2E444211%2EPKrTAi)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54910?refcode=ema20220406-183865&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=183865%2E444211%2EPKrTAi)**
As Governor, Beto will fully fund public school classrooms, raise teacher pay, increase benefits for retired teachers, and end the state’s over-reliance on high-stakes, high-pressure standardized testing.
**Greg Abbott is underfunding Texas schools by about $4,000 per student** compared to the national average, burying Texas in the bottom ten states for per-student funding. **And thanks to Abbott, Texas teachers are also underpaid by $7,500 a year** compared to the national average. To make things worse, most teachers haven't received a single cost of living adjustment on their retirement benefits in almost 20 years.
Beto will fight for teachers and our education system, but we need to make sure that every voter knows this. [Every dollar you contribute will help build momentum for Beto and spread the word about his unifying vision for Texas’ education system. Please pitch in now to keep our ad going.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54904?refcode=ema20220406-183865&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=183865%2E444211%2EPKrTAi)
We’re so thankful to have your support.
— Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220406-183865-footer&t=23&refcode2=183865_444211_PKrTAi&akid=183865%2E444211%2EPKrTAi)**

name: Team Elaine
subject: BREAKING: GOP attacks Elaine on House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853402/338989810/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220406_FR_Kevin_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTNiZGYzMy1mNGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JGgWTXijcnuiR3PDdht9EzR9BMMT_nS7hRk3uFU9zQ=) This is urgent, folks: House Republicans are attacking Elaine for having the courage to urge Attorney General Merrick Garland to take more action on the January 6th cases. They twisted Elaine’s words into a threat – claiming that she is using her power to jail political opponents and condemn AG Garland for not doing it fast enough. The sad part is, _Republicans are going to believe that this is true._ These are the types of attacks Republicans will be launching against Elaine until Election Day in order to flip her seat and replace her with a far-right Trump loyalist. body:
I want to highlight some grassroots supporters for Tobias.
---
| | Dear Peter,

With our coalition of endorsers growing so much over the last month, I don’t want to forget about our most important endorsement: Everyday Oregonians like you. I want to highlight some grassroots supporters for Tobias and the rest of the team, so [**I’m asking folks to tell us why you endorse Tobias.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853455/338990088/-301907407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTA3MWM4Yi1mNGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L-kUhgA8ShoGVF2dkvul25i9P_HLT2iSkV2LQEt7TU=&emci=4014f484-f4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=15071c8b-f4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)

Whether you’ve been with us since the beginning or you’re just coming on board, **Tobias Read’s vision for the future of our state has brought together people from across Oregon.** We know why our friends at UNITE HERE are supporting Tobias: His strong support for essential workers and the jobs that support them. And we know why Governors Roberts and Kitzhaber are supporting him: He has the vision and leadership experience to get things done.

So, Peter, **[why are you supporting Tobias? Please let us know here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43853456/338990089/-301907407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTA3MWM4Yi1mNGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L-kUhgA8ShoGVF2dkvul25i9P_HLT2iSkV2LQEt7TU=&emci=4014f484-f4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=15071c8b-f4b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** and we’ll feature some of the responses on our social media!

Thanks,
Jessica LaVigne

Peter, for over two years Dr. Fauci has lied.
* _Lied about masks._
* _Lied about treatments for COVID-19._
* _Lied about the origins of the virus and the funding behind it._
* _And then he’s lied to cover up lying about all of it!_

There’s no doubt about it: he’s a menace to society. _ _ But I think we've learned an important lesson from all of his dishonesty and failure: it's time to FIRE FAUCI and make sure no one ever has the authority to harm our nation in the way that he did.__
---
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW >> **](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ded6add26b7e4a9fae6588603b0db75f&_e=2Eb46wt2Yo82Hsem37_ZP1Bgi-nzkbBUljq_tIudyp_iH973smxyoJ8FgVSu-9V-yH9eK33Q5aO4Y5pA-jKMJ3txAQKzgJyEIUxmiGmFRIKcaxLgcAr4hHrkCKDPMUB0YIcWEqT3vZ-ICk-1CMxLRfrZfZxsdwKULd1QVP2y8bSiHJ-ITnf31btKnF7GVR6dTBNLNixp6yC2yrGS-So3JG2apBSpryxduM5HwsVbeD5kxQkM-JcUzoOVoSuwR13CDE3zinCvkBK8jCIoJb22jx5WY0P9ZkBLGeHZ0UjOMKbz0L78f5FBIIf4YUM2pogNLDx-y9hZ-R1UkBsQpmk1QgU7_5iJsP_N7_MldXjRX65PjTQu8nlUu43JPhgpZaeWWdk50X3t8DcoS5vtMbGSvA%3D%3D)

Fauci was wrong, over and over again, but his position allowed him to become a dictator in chief. That position should never exist in America. No one person should have unilateral authority to make decisions for millions of Americans -- especially not an unelected bureaucrat at the NIAID. To ensure that ineffective, unscientific lockdowns and mandates are never foisted on the American people ever again, I introduced an amendment to eliminate Dr. Anthony Fauci’s position as director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases and divide his power into three separate new institutes. But I think we've learned an important lesson from all of his dishonesty and failure: it's time to FIRE FAUCI and make sure no one ever has the authority to harm our nation in the way that he did. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Bumbling Billy’s Tears
body:
He thought it was sooo funny as he broke into an auctioneer's cadence as I was escorted from the room by police.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fB2TxnJP1P3qfYaogtP1Kg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fB2TxnJP1P3qfYaogtP1Kg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA)Just a few years ago, I was at the United States Capitol to observe the Congressional testimony of Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey.

And . . . **you know me. I had to say something.**

As I spoke loudly enough from across the room to confront little Jack, Congressman Billy Long (R-MO) began auctioning me off like cattle to drown out my questions, and mock my valid concerns about censorship.

**He thought it was sooo funny as he broke into an auctioneer 's cadence while I was being escorted from the room by police.**

And now, ironically, nearly four years later, Big Billy Long is crying crocodile tears to the media and feigning outrage that YouTube just removed one of his campaign videos!

Sure, Rep. Long was a jerk for what he did to me, but you know what? **I 'll fight against the Big Tech Tyrants any time they censor ANY candidate or elected official in America!**

Right now, my legal team and I are putting the final touches on a massive lawsuit that drills down to the root of Social Media Bias and Censorship, and when we file, Big Tech will have to rethink their decade-long strategy of intentionally silencing and suppressing dissenting voices.

[Back my lawsuit today with your most generous donation so we can have the funds we need to take on these Tech Tyrants!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fB2TxnJP1P3qfYaogtP1Kg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA)

As we head into another election season, and ultimately the 2024 Presidential Election, Facebook, Twitter, Apple, Google and Amazon are going to step up their efforts to silence us and triangulate our influence away from the general public.

**They don 't want you to have ANY influence in political debates . . . or even in society!**

I can't express how important it is to take the fight to them, and my lawsuit will do it in a way they have never anticipated.

[So please, help fund my legal efforts and the fight to protect Free Speech.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fB2TxnJP1P3qfYaogtP1Kg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA)

**The Big Tech Tyrant 's legal strategy will be to outspend and outlast me**. We can't let that happen. [Any amount you can contribute today will be greatly appreciated](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fB2TxnJP1P3qfYaogtP1Kg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA) and will help keep me in the fight for the long haul.

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
(C) 2022 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/wtboaEy495laIeSdYxAHgA)

name: Dr. Annie
subject: Moments like this are exactly why I’m in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
No one should have to shovel thousands of dollars over to pharmaceutical companies each month just so they can live healthily and happily.

| Nancy Mace’s votes against capping the cost of insulin proves just how out of touch she is with working families.

Working in the hospital, I’ve seen firsthand how drug prices can make or break a family’s financial freedom—it’s a disgrace in one of the wealthiest countries on the planet. When parents are grappling with their child’s new diagnosis of diabetes, they shouldn’t also have to worry about how the cost of the medications will affect their ability to put food on the table.

_No one should have to shovel thousands of dollars over to pharmaceutical companies each month just so they can live healthily and happily._

**Mace has made it clear: she’ll choose her political interests over the people of the Lowcountry every time.**

[I can’t sit back and watch Mace choose her Party over the Lowcountry again and again. Join me in condemning her actions by signing on today→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854189/338993427/-1566892475?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220406_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=A+8ky07e2YETG/WZNR4Yc9UaNrcAkskuj6J2PEYUwma3WrbDQlqJOcFUyrqow2On&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY2YzFiNC1mNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeXWqqY3d6XzkanFv7_I8BYPDwyodV_kQSuTLKbSWz0=&emci=7766c1b4-f6b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7866c1b4-f6b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43854190/338993428/-1566892475?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220406_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=A+8ky07e2YETG/WZNR4Yc9UaNrcAkskuj6J2PEYUwma3WrbDQlqJOcFUyrqow2On&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY2YzFiNC1mNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeXWqqY3d6XzkanFv7_I8BYPDwyodV_kQSuTLKbSWz0=&emci=7766c1b4-f6b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7866c1b4-f6b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

Dr. Andrews

| With nearly 10,000 signatures, yesterday we filed my Republican petition for the newly drawn 24th Congressional District. Collecting over 7 times the amount of signatures needed to qualify from the 14 counties of this district, I'm humbled by the overwhelming support.

Simply put, this means we are well on our way and have amassed a strong network of grassroots supporters and volunteers throughout this new district.

I want to thank everyone who took time out of their busy schedules to help in this massive effort. We had county committees, town committees, friends, and volunteers out on the streets sharing our strong Republican message - this incredible showing would not be possible without each of you.

This means one thing - we are going to take back the House, restore strong conservative leadership in Washington, and save our state.

Thank you!

Best,
Chris Jacobs
