name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Racial, Ethnic, LGBT Quota for Corporate Boards
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution.

| | |

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | April 06, 2022

# [Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Racial, Ethnic, LGBT Quota for Corporate Boards](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58514&L=27054&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcXVvdGEtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58514&L=27054&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcXVvdGEtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch: California Court Opinion Explains Historic Ruling against Race, Ethnic, LGBT Quotas ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58514&L=27068&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtY291cnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1leHBsYWlucy1oaXN0b3JpYy1ydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that the California Superior Court has released its full opinion in the case decided last week declaring that the State’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for diversity on corporate boards of California-based corporations violates the California Constitution. The court found that only in “very particular cases should discrimination be remedied by more discrimination.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58514&L=27068&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtY291cnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1leHBsYWlucy1oaXN0b3JpYy1ydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 06, 2022 ---|---|--- | | = = Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution. = | | | = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that the California Superior Court has released its full opinion in the case decided last week declaring that the State’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for diversity on corporate boards of California-based corporations violates the California Constitution. The court found that only in “very particular cases should discrimination be remedied by more discrimination.” = Judicial Watch A year after the Biden administration bowed to international pressure by revoking the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based militant group, the U.S. is laughably denouncing the militia’s recent “acts of terrorism” against “civil infrastructure.” Known as Ansarallah (proponents of Allah) or Houthis, the Islamist organization recently launched drones and missiles at civilian targets in Saudi Arabia, including energy and water facilities. == The Wall Street Journal The conservative legal outfit Judicial Watch sued, arguing the law violated the state Constitution’s equal protection clause by establishing explicit set-asides based on racial, ethnic or sexual preference. == | CLIPS = = | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

He’s Ready to Replace Sean Patrick Maloney

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=07deb58c50ac4f8eb394904d91b69bb4&_e=3yx-iZh-DO-l-gSHkHXD2rW6z918uicPrgOE2_4dGh2syS-35X2tPlBQRQZHYgcTDaSjRY14RsQ2cS-f0QKOmOj5tij4A151exn1UEXJrwUQNzod3SyvvaJpS7_D2dc1rEU6k-0WOPESR91Z8x9dttSiFSd94GQYD42GBvPySkHyU66K4g397rMNanxOAkgQu3q2K7hqQon3FGGGe76nWLcREeWAjIJwoJtGmCqirnOxUJrDHnvHj7Bq-xP0QvV4KfIl2urq7xNLucWETc8slJ0ZWDRAPC3w-s0knShuth0zPNIPAgqjjs9gVjhsn5XM2EOO647DElLmfVM88SNXrCxiuDu-0clr8o8qjcw__wsb4W-czztyXs-hUddx5JAT7AXqpvu8-xoV3fNsCzjBbDoK-DtptKke9psPLyN3mFoIaS5W9X7DULEqmlh7SL1pZfilcerQ6ic7s9BBuwV_Ig-v4NCjzPHrhB7iQW6-i5ZybfTAaWhfhrm1OXaztQNi)

Friends,

_As a State Assemblyman and Sergeant in the Army National Guard, Colin Schmitt**has proven himself to be a leader and exactly the person we need in Congress.** I know that he will tirelessly work to make America stronger at this pivotal moment in our nation’s history and represent the hardworking New Yorkers that he is elected to serve. **I’m proud to endorse Colin Schmitt for New York’s 18th Congressional District and I look forward to serving with him in the United States House of Representatives.**_
| [**JOIN ME IN SUPPORTING COLIN - $50**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=07deb58c50ac4f8eb394904d91b69bb4&_e=3yx-iZh-DO-l-gSHkHXD2rW6z918uicPrgOE2_4dGh2syS-35X2tPlBQRQZHYgcTDaSjRY14RsQ2cS-f0QKOmOj5tij4A151exn1UEXJrwUQNzod3SyvvaJpS7_D2dc1rEU6k-0WOPESR91Z8x9dttSiFSd94GQYD42GBvPySkHyU66K4g397rMNanxOAkgQu3q2K7hqQon3FGGGe76nWLcREeWAjIJwoJtGmCqirnOxUJrDHnvHj7Bq-xP0QvV4KfIl2urq7xNLucWETc8slP2A4KpzEdMA36Wx6EDdZJEh4F6NXLYz9F0sfohqkz4c2HrNmc4CjKhpkJKd86kjDPGoCI8YSj1hb0gowUiviYEzdbNnZwwpxnitrrVrvlemrejxKA3kGaaRlY6TCKSJWza7lnzzRFa2qJHmDznFu7VoHNw9QV-GwM9nNJzzA_aF1sAg41lxwKDy5Dzfwfd2gXGx4tXcjpMGXQGdu1TgHLAg5qcl0uEKarzK5txBAcwY)
---

For years, the people of New York’s 18th district have been under the leadership of someone who is only focused on his own political gain and special interest groups. **Sean Patrick Maloney is NOT a servant of the people - he is a servant of the Far-Left.**

_**Now, more than ever, we need patriots who are ready to defend Conservative values and push back against the woke ruling of out-of-touch Democrats.**_

We must Take Back the House in November and there is a lot of work to be done until then. If we cannot count on the grassroots support of people like you, this movement will not thrive. **NY-18 needs Colin Schmitt, not a DCCC Chairman in Pelosi’s back pocket.**

body:
Our primary election is just under six weeks away, and our campaign is ramping up.
#
**Our primary election is just under six weeks away, and our campaign is ramping up.**
We’re traveling the district, hosting events to connect with Democratic voters, putting up signs, and organizing phonebanks to make sure everyone knows about Erica’s vision for bold, progressive change in rural eastern North Carolina.
**We can feel the excitement and momentum on the ground — but our opponents are working hard to defeat us.**
[**If we want Erica to protect this seat, center rural communities, and fight for working families in Congress, we need the resources to get out the vote for Erica and win this primary election. Can you help us out and rush $5 to our campaign?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47925?refcode=em20220406-1066&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1066%2E3698%2E5WR8Ef)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47925?refcode=em20220406-1066&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1066%2E3698%2E5WR8Ef)**
**Here is the harsh reality we face: This is expensive work, and we need significant resources to compete.** And the work doesn’t stop after our May 17th primary — we’ll then face off against a GOP opponent and far-right groups who will spend millions to flip this seat.
Republicans are already hard at work in North Carolina to end our House majority. Donald Trump is holding a rally with Madison Cawthorn this weekend to rally their base across the state. **This is only a preview of what’s to come.**
We must protect this seat to prevent a far-right takeover in Congress, and Erica is the best candidate to get the job done. But she can’t do it alone, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
[**With our competitive primary coming up, we need a surge of donations to get our message of bold, progressive change to voters so Erica can win the primary and protect this seat in November. Will you rush a $5 donation now?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47925?refcode=em20220406-1066&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1066%2E3698%2E5WR8Ef)
Every donation will help train volunteers, run digital ads, put gas in the campaign van, pay for voter outreach tools, and more.
Thank you for everything,
— Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220406-1066-footer&t=22&refcode2=1066_3698_5WR8Ef&akid=1066%2E3698%2E5WR8Ef)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

We’re traveling the district, hosting events to connect with Democratic voters, putting up signs, and organizing phonebanks to make sure everyone knows about Erica’s vision for bold, progressive change in rural eastern North Carolina. We can feel the excitement and momentum on the ground — but our opponents are working hard to defeat us. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: You and me vs. Amazon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**Amazon gave my corporate opponent $5,000 earmarked for the primary election: in other words, to defeat me. Chip in now to help me fight back, because it’s you and me — all of us workers together — against Amazon.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43857208/339030717/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjcwNGQ0OC0xY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u95wZ2hkweb6RCWBptH4A0CZaPxr1fP5Gifq7chiWe4=) Amazon workers in New York just voted to form the first ever Amazon union 🎉 Despite the corporate union busting that Amazon deployed, the workers prevailed. It’s incredible to see. Amazon’s next step will likely be to delay contract negotiations as long as possible — a favorite tactic of union busters. That’s why I support the PRO Act, which would require employers to follow a set process to reach a first contract without endless delays. [**I am the most pro-labor candidate in this race. Unlike most of Congress, I will actually fight for the PRO Act — not just say nice empty words about it and let it sit on the shelf gathering dust. Please contribute a couple bucks now to help me win and fight for workers in Congress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43857209/339030718/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjcwNGQ0OC0xY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u95wZ2hkweb6RCWBptH4A0CZaPxr1fP5Gifq7chiWe4=)**.** body:
I've endorsed Erik Aadland, have you?
Peter, it’s Congressman Jack Bergman.

I know Erik Aadland emailed you already, but now I’m emailing you.

**With everything that’s going on in America, it’s clear we need more veterans, more energy experts, and more principled Conservatives in Congress.**

[**Erik Aadland embodies all three of those needs, and that’s why I’ve endorsed him. Now, I’m asking you to join me in doing the same and endorse him for Congress.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c47b824a7a646c5a582bb0fc58f3f6d&_e=WwwGJRrebSEBacsP6OdVRlNWakkQZ02KQd1wtXE9zoQhygH1qzGCwtP9o072NUzje5ICVJSn5Az-XmXtb21wnwhl0XCMC7_FKA6axSvRvPRgGUTCb_Q1ZFN-kHX6cX7bBVUbg-ch4otWNaalrgAjTjYNgIqGhT-1zdn4-2QADvenmPURpxzUAO14GFU_O_LZzr3ugPHYgAMkLuGfj2ojBzxmIpTaRf_nLeoM-U5toxx-DmRauy0ero51Bzi4DQSPeaVVWOYdwL_YwPBDO05Eo3f5RPJVN_EPjs95RTRhyvk5LWAdVaUZOJnm_izJEu6APSshvvo_aWWGsrc3CA7U7VY7XMoHwvUpvIPq1vxdjJ2yza8H6zVuJ_IgbTKv50MdPjhPBR-up4B0zHOxWY1AdAcUPi6WyxA8rtBOXYRzDmtCrhhP-1nCbMHzdLkuTtlX)

**As a Marine, I put my life on the line to protect our liberty and freedoms. I know what dedicated service to this nation looks like, and a combat veteran like Erik Aadland is your guy.**

We don’t need another radical Liberal trying to defund the police, we need a Conservative that fights for America. [**If you agree, then endorse Erik Aadland, and let’s get back to serving the American people.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c47b824a7a646c5a582bb0fc58f3f6d&_e=WwwGJRrebSEBacsP6OdVRlNWakkQZ02KQd1wtXE9zoQhygH1qzGCwtP9o072NUzje5ICVJSn5Az-XmXtb21wnwhl0XCMC7_FKA6axSvRvPRgGUTCb_Q1ZFN-kHX6cX7bBVUbg-ch4otWNaalrgAjTjYNgIqGhT-1zdn4-2QADvenmPURpxzUAO14GFU_O_LZzr3ugPHYgAMkLuGfj2ojB1nFdz1-fVizbAg2NS34qU0pJ5k1dIJcfwxQOd1lIOviFHXYrXYlSU-1-lBb9UrfELZRC2D_R4pC12KZLfBRWvRptGzoHrIXSMvD0FEVvIJ1EKmr2SuRqKvLf8_MW_tK94mzWLhGe5ew4PS5vk6nS1rNL4ajUf4tNukDp99w0QYcTx56ee3U7l_vNYCoKDa-rbguqtSYrBKce74WEkOmRkkn3KO6wNyBHovYx4mIZAMd)

clean_body: I've endorsed Erik Aadland, have you? Peter, it’s Congressman Jack Bergman. I know Erik Aadland emailed you already, but now I’m emailing you. With everything that’s going on in America, it’s clear we need more veterans, more energy experts, and more principled Conservatives in Congress. As a Marine, I put my life on the line to protect our liberty and freedoms. I know what dedicated service to this nation looks like, and a combat veteran like Erik Aadland is your guy. We don’t need another radical Liberal trying to defund the police, we need a Conservative that fights for America. Semper Fi, Lt. General Jack Bergman (RET.) name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Did you hear?
body:
No more deportations [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-r/) My Friend, _**Did you see the news that the Biden administration is planning on ending Title 42 on May 23rd?**_ Under Title 42, our Border Patrol has sent migrants back to their home countries 1.7 million times. **[I'm curious to hear from you - do you believe that Joe Biden's immigration policy is hurting America?](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-j/)** [YES](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-t/) [NO](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-i/) I am committed to securing our southern border, which means ensuring that our Border Patrol has the resources they need to get the job done. **[_Tell me today, do you think Joe Biden's immigration policy is hurting America_](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-d/)?**Thank you,
Glenn [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-h/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-qjyeg-yddjllujiu-k/)

What “terms” did Mike violate? “Content that advertises false claims about widespread fraud, error or glitches that changed the outcome of the U.S. 2020 presidential election is not allowed on Youtube.” It’s classic Big Tech – you better step in line, or else you’ll get canceled. Don’t dare to dissent or question anything, or else you’ll be removed. We all know that we need an investigation into what happened in 2020. We can’t let the liberal media and Big Tech stifle us any longer. We have to elect America First Republicans who aren’t afraid to stand up and fight for what’s right. Rush your support for Mike Durant TODAY! Thank you, Big Tech Alerts PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense.

I remember the economy we had under President Trump and wonder how so many people could be so naive to elect Democrats like Abigail Spanberger and Joe Biden into office. What happened to our economy? The Radical, Far Left. This is affecting the pocketbooks of Virginians across the commonwealth, and the seventh district deserves better. I hope you’ll chip in to support my campaign. | | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.
